name: NRSC Fundraising Division
subject: Guess what?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Winning back the Senate majority will take every one of us doing our part.
Friend,

The Republican-led House of Representatives made good on one of their signature campaign promises.

In a sign of solidary with the American taxpayer, House Republicans voted to reverse legislation Democrats passed last fall that provided the IRS with $80 billion to hire 87,000 new agents. _**Unfortunately, the version of the bill will die in the Democrat-led Senate.**_

Over the next two years, we will see more of the same song and dance we witnessed this week. The House will pass meaningful, fiscally responsible legislation; Senate Democrats will obstruct and nix it from becoming law.

**Rinse.
Wash.
Repeat.**
If you want to stop Biden and Senate Democrats from standing in the way of capitalism, economic growth, and individual liberty, then we need your help today. **The only way we're going to stop harmful legislation from taking effect, like hiring 87,000 new IRS agents, is by taking control of the Senate.**

**[If you're able, please consider helping us get our country back on track by donating $2.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=adf204d94c0f460d8d03ef5eae62ba1a&_e=UVwh4wcVvR9IW6bG9EZphqWM9c4VIaCsP32v_ZUSnjkZqM-rpvksz99t1pVjiI-IZUziDFnYdn6ZXRkxstQxXLGiGfB7MA9HO5sMzC8l8ClSN1SeVDMfhG6voaL_c7Ro4MTzPuee4-ptO_jZr8dCpo8r1ttcFBH9ShLTpijND0w2S687lxieLBqbvGz0ZffIPH1eMNhx3Qw8HXr038l5v4cfn4-fNOiiEnOQatv1zkJluY7D4OKil0mLrvMPDWaJdnEwjvvuo9uKdoYVEI8vnGgo-lYZZFt1Gqsn4wIEfkIZh1fDQ53HzeaMO_pmNT2MfEDGLxuBsp5JjdG5z2kxpdxsU716OeehHb4AiCFMIQ0IhYjatDD8eG_VDBaijuMfOBlt70Y7nKX3BuD55j3ZdTLYXqWV4o4wUxGGLP3KcmU6r0HHWXxYe60rOSe8NjrU)** Winning back the Senate majority will take every one of us doing our part. Quite literally, we have no time to waste.

| [** CHIP IN $2 >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=adf204d94c0f460d8d03ef5eae62ba1a&_e=UVwh4wcVvR9IW6bG9EZphqWM9c4VIaCsP32v_ZUSnjkZqM-rpvksz99t1pVjiI-IZUziDFnYdn6ZXRkxstQxXLGiGfB7MA9HO5sMzC8l8ClSN1SeVDMfhG6voaL_c7Ro4MTzPuee4-ptO_jZr8dCpo8r1ttcFBH9ShLTpijND0w2S687lxieLBqbvGz0ZffIPH1eMNhx3Qw8HXr038l5v4cfn4-fNOiiEnOQatv1zkJluY7D4OKil0mLrvMPDWaJdnEwjvvuo9uKdoYVEI8vnBX4eS4aYUCbag-8_Xz1Vk9mUwJ-zwRCqKTXuL2m5cn5_twXyODaARC3WZsHp_9c8asAxu6dr3MovmUXT3J0wIJ8Mub42zyf05mckDJmiYfBECFhDebpFhO4s6C4enRrzfEaT7MfpE5dFe0ZHjtJ7ixZCEoU_NOuqJG5LXwgXoiOozbxdffXVG5V3OZf-w2TXg%3D%3D)
---

While House Republicans will deliver on their campaign promises to the American people, Senate Democrats will stand in the way of conservative victories every single time. That alone should be enough of a reason **[to donate to our efforts right now.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=adf204d94c0f460d8d03ef5eae62ba1a&_e=UVwh4wcVvR9IW6bG9EZphqWM9c4VIaCsP32v_ZUSnjkZqM-rpvksz99t1pVjiI-IZUziDFnYdn6ZXRkxstQxXLGiGfB7MA9HO5sMzC8l8ClSN1SeVDMfhG6voaL_c7Ro4MTzPuee4-ptO_jZr8dCpo8r1ttcFBH9ShLTpijND0w2S687lxieLBqbvGz0ZffIPH1eMNhx3Qw8HXr038l5v4cfn4-fNOiiEnOQatv1zkJluY7D4OKil0mLrvMPDWaJdnEwjvvuo9uKdoYVEI8vnGgo-lYZZFt1Gqsn4wIEfkLHmxu_5TIlDkqyDw2zRmMt6lJbmIzyG7SxT8rGiUbjWnXVu9gSnw1SHzBUD8ASyLk-Eesy7w5cj4NYR7mxx7BVY2K8P89Yq9awje1DjRcFRh_1-UvGUnVkUSUeR5iZmTDOR7kfPuacMWueZwzTTSXL)**

We all know that elections have consequences. Unfortunately for Senate Republicans, we drew the short straw in the last election. Now we're seeing first-hand the downside of being outspent in critical battleground races 3-1: **voting for bills passed in the House that Democrats will certainly block.**

The only way to get off the sidelines and back into the driver's seat is by winning back the majority. Fortunately for us, the map favors Republicans in the 2024 election. But just because we're favored doesn't mean we will win without putting up **a strong fight.**

We can't think of a single reason the IRS needs an additional $80 billion in funding; not now, not ever. Making hardworking Americans the target of government audits would be a mistake. That's why we need your help today. **[Chip in $2 right now to help us win back the Senate and put a stop to the lunacy in D.C.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=adf204d94c0f460d8d03ef5eae62ba1a&_e=UVwh4wcVvR9IW6bG9EZphqWM9c4VIaCsP32v_ZUSnjkZqM-rpvksz99t1pVjiI-IZUziDFnYdn6ZXRkxstQxXLGiGfB7MA9HO5sMzC8l8ClSN1SeVDMfhG6voaL_c7Ro4MTzPuee4-ptO_jZr8dCpo8r1ttcFBH9ShLTpijND0w2S687lxieLBqbvGz0ZffIPH1eMNhx3Qw8HXr038l5v4cfn4-fNOiiEnOQatv1zkJluY7D4OKil0mLrvMPDWaJdnEwjvvuo9uKdoYVEI8vnGgo-lYZZFt1Gqsn4wIEfkKlYGoj_IKRbQK4_wSsiwHGyroA9QoXGr3khCtdSm9mm47OxLcFEWDeZLcWXh6PoYS4DSmTAPSZPS59Pdv0vmFJJsdFf-5e0LJQIIiFlT2uZbkEZWwmU5P1TQy01uve5X30W6zydLXOp4WNrVXZdj2n)**

Thank you,

NRSC Fundraising Division

[** CHIP IN $2 >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=adf204d94c0f460d8d03ef5eae62ba1a&_e=UVwh4wcVvR9IW6bG9EZphqWM9c4VIaCsP32v_ZUSnjkZqM-rpvksz99t1pVjiI-IZUziDFnYdn6ZXRkxstQxXLGiGfB7MA9HO5sMzC8l8ClSN1SeVDMfhG6voaL_c7Ro4MTzPuee4-ptO_jZr8dCpo8r1ttcFBH9ShLTpijND0w2S687lxieLBqbvGz0ZffIPH1eMNhx3Qw8HXr038l5v4cfn4-fNOiiEnOQatv1zkJluY7D4OKil0mLrvMPDWaJdnEwjvvuo9uKdoYVEI8vnBX4eS4aYUCbag-8_Xz1Vk9Iy7YgexGj_SGccxdZzYHvqRkDPPMISdUi0xIala41SHcBXuh6_a5byJnOygJZ5Nv8wjM0RDKROonOln1jqE0TvYg8j_dtm-JobzYrzSw96KiDRZZmO0ymsrV9dHUJkoAjyX6w5MGVsLtyFH0OSqvaPhsttaVI2ihGrQ0VElH7ZQ%3D%3D)

name: SIGN THE CARD
subject: Happy birthday, Michelle Obama!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
**Michelle Obama is a hero to all of us, friend – and yesterday was her birthday! **

As our nation's First Lady, she was an advocate for women and children's rights, and even after leaving office,**she's been a staunch defender of democracy **– **including speaking out against the GOP's "Jim Crow 2.0" ****draconian ****voter restriction laws. **
**Since there are SO many reasons to be grateful for her, friend, we wanted to show our gratitude by rounding up as many signatures as possible for her birthday card!**

**[But with only a few hours left, we're still missing your name. Please, friend, will you sign the card and wish Michelle Obama a "happy birthday"?!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57487257/388128587/1727082671?code=jtk2197-su-fl&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fab-2023-priorities&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiNWFhNDA0LThkOTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0-jMvXRhwKhd1mnFqnJALRMk-cKa55YsaXd9RSHtNY=&emci=3723654d-5097-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=7b5aa404-8d97-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=23124236)**

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Here’s how YOU can go green 💚
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria fought to make climate-friendly upgrades to your home or vehicle more accessible.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230118-3809-header&t=1&akid=3809%2E2526796%2ESSVBe7)
Have you thought about going green?
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230118.yK-cXY&refcode=em20230118-3809-P_FND_EXP_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3809%2E2526796%2ESSVBe7)
The cost of new energy-efficient appliances, weatherizing your home, or switching to an electric car is expensive — we know!
**But in last year’s Inflation Reduction Act, Congress included a LOT of tax credits to help make it more affordable to make green upgrades in your life.** In fact, you can get up to $4,000 towards a used electric vehicle, 30% of your costs covered for switching to solar, and low-income families can get credits to help them with other upgrades!
**Want to find out what tax credits you can get for going green?**
* Visit [WhiteHouse.gov/CleanEnergy](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16060?t=3&akid=3809%2E2526796%2ESSVBe7)
* Click on the purchases you’ve been thinking about to find out how much in tax credits you can get
* Get more information on the updated credits as they’re released by signing up for email updates at [WhiteHouse.Gov/CleanEnergy](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16060?t=4&akid=3809%2E2526796%2ESSVBe7)

Last year, Alexandria fought for these credits in Congress to give you CASH MONEY to make climate-friendly upgrades to your home or vehicle. Later this year, **we expect _even more credits_ to be rolled out for appliances like electrified ovens and stoves.**
This is just the beginning, though.
[Alexandria is still fighting in Congress for MORE climate-friendly credits, investments, and policies to combat the climate crisis and save our planet. You can help by making a $3 contribution to our campaign right now — can we count on your $3 today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230118.yK-cXY&refcode=em20230118-3809-P_FND_EXP_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3809%2E2526796%2ESSVBe7)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230118.yK-cXY&refcode=em20230118-3809-P_FND_EXP_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=3809%2E2526796%2ESSVBe7)**
There is still SO much work to be done, and we must keep going to secure continued, major infrastructure investments in items like high-speed rail, walkable cities, and more.
[If you can, make your $3 contribution today to help Alexandria keep fighting for climate-friendly investments and a Green New Deal.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230118.yK-cXY&refcode=em20230118-3809-P_FND_EXP_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=3809%2E2526796%2ESSVBe7)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230118?refcode=em20230118-3809-P_FND_EXP_GND&t=26&refcode2=3809_2526796_SSVBe7&akid=3809%2E2526796%2ESSVBe7)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230118-3809-P_FND_EXP_GND&t=27&akid=3809%2E2526796%2ESSVBe7)**
---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Fellow Patriot, _If it walks like a Democrat, and talks like Democrat, it’s _Brandon Presley_. _

Brandon claims to be “moderate” but he wants to bring Joe Biden’s liberal values to our great state of Mississippi.

**But let me be clear: I’m here to stay - and won’t let that happen. **

Brandon Presley has dark money flooding in from Washington DC elites, so if we’re going to keep our conservative values, I need grassroots Mississippians to step up. subject: China must be held accountable' for role in fentanyl epidemic
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
These drugs are killing our loved ones and plaguing communities across America. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/china-must-be-held-accountable-for-role-in-fentanyl-epidemic?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=00ceadf3b6&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter, Fentanyl is a serious problem in our country that the Biden regime continues to ignore.

We must get tough on those that are contributing to this drug crisis, including China!

**These drugs are killing our loved ones and plaguing communities across America.** **[Congress and Mr. Biden can immediately take action to stop fentanyl from pouring into our country by sealing off our border](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=c6c526f080&e=645b3b1338).**

**It is a known fact that fentanyl is manufactured in Chinese labs and sent to Mexico. China must be held accountable for their role.**

Fentanyl poisoning remains a leading cause of death.

_It comes from_ _China_ _and Mexico through our open borders.**105,000 Americans killed last year.**_
**These tragic deaths are 100% preventable.**

We have to secure our southern border, and we have to do it as soon as possible - the lives of countless Americans depend on it.

Chinese made fentanyl delivered to Mexico and walked and driven across our border.

_**Sold to young adults 18-35** by mixing fentanyl into other recreational drugs. 100,000 dead in 2021_.

**Seal the border. Life in prison for drug dealers.**
Fentanyl is genociding our youth and killing hundreds of thousands.

It's become the number one cause of death for young people. This is unacceptable.

[_**We must secure our border. We must finish the border wall. We must enforce an immigration moratorium. That's America First**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0100863e4e&e=645b3b1338).
[HOLD CHINA ACCOUNTABLE](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4f8610ba7b&e=645b3b1338)

[**_CONTRIBUTE $100_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=345b7b66e3&e=645b3b1338)

[**_CONTRIBUTE $50 _**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=38fd5306bd&e=645b3b1338)

[**_CONTRIBUTE $25_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4f4ba75696&e=645b3b1338)

[**_CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=1c5fd8063c&e=645b3b1338) _**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f1999b0638&e=645b3b1338)**_

We are proud to announce that Congressman Jim Banks is running for the U.S. Senate in Indiana in 2024!

Congressman Banks has been a consistent, conservative voice in the House and has worked tirelessly to defend hard-working Americans and promote a pro-American agenda. In fact, he has the single most conservative voting record of any Indiana Congressional representative.

As Senator, Jim Banks will continue to fight for a secure border, cut wasteful government spending, stand up to Communist China, and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda.

**Jim Banks is the best choice for Indiana.** He served our military in Afghanistan, and now he is running to serve us in the U.S. Senate. We ask that you join us in supporting his candidacy. clean_body: U.S. Senate Race Announcement | Dear Patriot, We are proud to announce that Congressman Jim Banks is running for the U.S. Senate in Indiana in 2024! Congressman Banks has been a consistent, conservative voice in the House and has worked tirelessly to defend hard-working Americans and promote a pro-American agenda. In fact, he has the single most conservative voting record of any Indiana Congressional representative. As Senator, Jim Banks will continue to fight for a secure border, cut wasteful government spending, stand up to Communist China, and stop Joe Biden’s radical agenda. Jim Banks is the best choice for Indiana. He served our military in Afghanistan, and now he is running to serve us in the U.S. Senate. We ask that you join us in supporting his candidacy. | Thank you for your support. We look forward to staying in touch. Sincerely, Team Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

Here's what's **IN** and **OUT** in Washington for 2023:

**IN:** HOLDING GOVERNMENT ACCOUNTABLE
**OUT:** LAME-DUCK LEADERSHIP

**IN:** LOWER TAXES
**OUT:** MASSIVE GOVERNMENT SPENDING

**IN:** CORN
**OUT:** ANTI-FARMER LEGISLATION

**_[Donate here to help keep up these trends in 2023!](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=d6ed04dfae054532a13312cba3ed78b7&_e=wcFfSh9niKbGQIuwDDH6ZO1BpbDI8fof8h1oVln9Sf-pJlkFy_ykUgIkvtVkNa2VX3SBaqafnVwJSPrL3tHcLqN7DYOXQmebkts_E9Kw6temJagEETap0qrN89cUea6R0enEgUBx4XR8aAWEMtnfLZ84v4ITT7OxGU5Ryt4UqyuBjymcDxIFTIM4kCFwA1qIKsHRHA-osXeBALTog5ufmzNbD5DsKRU1TsjOFPpNTlFXOb1OZbLqZCz4fjz_9EdNQOWv8m4wjU7CAqKVBL8JJz7d2FhEGxUVyvmAKFdzhA5mmXBKqTa-DM0vGA5klIBhYrDXCTFLp-CC9ZsasrCCnZ1UgM3O62Q-8nWwVkGjNo8Ni85t7_UapIbAcezkznTAoLDGKMakqzFlfCuRRfWsEEpQ3MEaOyjUm1F5pbHTNvvqqjZNw0x3i_hXcQoj_9NkuDIan36FFYyAZILfyBeYMg%3D%3D)_
**
**Here 's why:
**
Holding the government accountable to the people is critical to upholding public trust!

We must rein in Big Government and put an end to Biden's fiscal insanity!!

Massive government spending threw gasoline on the fires of inflation.

Washington needs more Iowa common sense, and Washington needs to understand that more spending fuels inflation and hammers Americans' pocketbooks.

**_It's time to put an end to soaring Bidenflation once and for all._

Hi there –
Last week, Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries emailed you about the urgent need to donate so we can elect Democrats.
With Republicans officially in control of the House, they’ve gone on an ultra-MAGA rampage to dismantle everything Democrats have accomplished over the past two years.
It’s clear: We must do everything we can to elect more Democrats and take back the majority.
That’s why we’re asking you to make a small donation of any amount between Leader Hakeem Jeffries and DASS so we can elect more Democrats. Please, donate now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jeffries-split-jan23?refcode=EM_FR_011823_B2_Hakeem-FWD_30ac &amount=15]

Saturday, I was sworn in as the new Democratic Leader.
Today, I promise you this: House Democrats will always fight for you and your family.
But right now, I’m humbly asking you to fight with us. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jeffries-split-jan23?refcode=EM_FR_011823_B2_Hakeem-FWD_30ac &amount=15]
After Republicans’ historically dysfunctional start, everyone will be watching to see what kind of fundraising numbers Democrats post. The support you show in my first few days as Leader is essential to reclaiming the House for Democrats so we can continue to deliver For The People. I’m asking: Will you rush $15 to make this a historic fundraising period for Democrats? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jeffries-split-jan23?refcode=EM_FR_011823_B2_Hakeem-FWD_30ac &amount=15]
Here’s the deal:
Speaker McCarthy is rushing to outraise us to prove that we don’t have what it takes to reclaim the Majority.
We’re going to prove him absolutely wrong, folks. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jeffries-split-jan23?refcode=EM_FR_011823_B2_Hakeem-FWD_30ac &amount=15]
Which is why we need a powerful surge of support – 1,000 gifts in my first crucial days as Leader – to kick this year off with a strong foundation for victory, outraise extreme MAGA Republicans and hand them their first upset of the year.
Can I count on you to step up in this defining moment?

name: DLCC Special Election Team
subject: Two weeks away from SIX special elections
body:
Our candidates are geared up and ready to start working, but special elections are often underfunded and overlooked by voters. | | |
---
| | We’re two weeks away from the first of SIX special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire. **These next six races of 2023 are big opportunities for Democrats:**
* Winning in Pennsylvania is essential for Democrats to **HOLD** the House majority – if we lose these races, Democrats could be pushed back into the minority.

* New Hampshire’s race is a **TOSSUP** that we must win to ensure we keep our razor-thin chamber margins.

* If we keep winning special elections in New Hampshire, we could **FLIP** the chamber sometime this year.

Our candidates are gearing up for a tough fight because special elections are notoriously unpredictable – earlier this month, our Democrat flipped his Virginia Senate seat by just _696 votes._ **That’s why we need your help to come together so we can build campaigns strong enough to meet this critical moment.** [Chip in $7 today to help state Democrats WIN in crucial special elections in Pennsylvania, New Hampshire, and beyond>> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLZFkTvQ_D_sKMPxDAc898PP51EFKWnWhyxd3CqgxHJHyHbZ_AY1JGYWvT3g-opGQM_FtOooK6_vk67DMC-4zRVEPxrRkD_r5AlT82uakMpfwS2n_49SUysnXg8Xb3ycJfgOfJ2TFzr6G0RQdXxCgV3JX3sByOQvO6Y0arroqOfU1k5KYrbmkeSEc4ZjY91Qbj8muPoxNaHk-3-k-Sz4GkqrVX8cMxl7gMO4PsjL-57kmgRcGhoKOHzkIYjPDNH2lqM0uFFnyBshIvRG0uiFMRipQqKqbMqexAyJKpME5_wiLQJgQpZzkq0twdZHTmV7tBsapXTNGawI_HDFsRS3GHQ-JB-CXIUHrSxO3FlcUOpm9nRl9PlQCmd5E-z2k3Lr3AbuIxU34X3rHfBgMeXmL2SQ/3sz/tjSyYXeoQ4Gg5-LNI2giUQ/h0/1mzBuqrqzll1LOsb7LHpN_IP8BHUpZhE46i3itrQyYE) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: Our candidates are geared up and ready to start working, but special elections are often underfunded and overlooked by voters. | | | | | We’re two weeks away from the first of SIX special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire. These next six races of 2023 are big opportunities for Democrats: Winning in Pennsylvania is essential for Democrats to HOLD the House majority – if we lose these races, Democrats could be pushed back into the minority. New Hampshire’s race is a TOSSUP that we must win to ensure we keep our razor-thin chamber margins. If we keep winning special elections in New Hampshire, we could FLIP the chamber sometime this year. Our candidates are gearing up for a tough fight because special elections are notoriously unpredictable – earlier this month, our Democrat flipped his Virginia Senate seat by just 696 votes. Friend,

**WE DID IT.**

**Congratulations to the Republican Party on taking back the speaker’s gavel from Crazy Nancy Pelosi and reclaiming the House Majority.** _\- I knew we could do it._

This is a big Republican VICTORY, and going through numerous Roll Calls has made the position and process that much more IMPORTANT. This has made the Republican Party STRONGER and more UNITED than ever before. _OUR NATION IS AT STAKE,_ and now, we can get back to our efforts to **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

_Democrats will never stop working against us._ **They’ll do everything in their power to use the People’s House to defend and protect Biden’s radical agenda.** It’s time to get to work securing our borders, shutting down illegal immigration, stopping Joe Biden’s inflation nightmare, cracking down on violent crime in Democrat-run cities, restoring free speech, protecting our Second Amendment, bringing home our manufacturing from China, and holding the Biden administration accountable for their corruption and crimes.
**These are the policies Americans voted for, and these are the policies that House Republicans must fight to deliver.**
Over the next two years, we can begin to save our Country, and then, we will work together to achieve new heights of national greatness when we take back the **White House in 2024.**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: RE: USPS issues
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
I’ve heard from thousands of Ohioans worried about missing mail and theft -- from urgently needed medications to paychecks.
I reached out to Trump-appointed Postmaster General Louis DeJoy for answers. You want to know what I heard back?
Nothing.
Under DeJoy’s leadership, the Postal Service has instituted policies that slow down mail delivery and make it more susceptible to mail theft. Those issues are costing Ohioans millions in stolen checks and goods and putting the lives of mail carriers at risk.
When I ask for answers on behalf of 12 million Americans -- people who have been wronged by USPS leadership’s incompetence and neglect -- we deserve a response and we deserve changes to be made if business as usual is no longer working.
If DeJoy isn’t up to the job, then he should go. I’m calling on DeJoy to resign and asking you to join me. Will you add your name to mine? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/qFtJUE7RFUuTHkBM0EKckw2]
With gratitude,
Sherrod
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public.”_

**Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms – especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS! | | | | Dear Friend, The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people. Yahoo News reports: “House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public.” Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS! They want to bury: • Videos from police body cameras, • Videos from on-site security cameras, • Videos from countless smart phones, • Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement, • And so much more. They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble. They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building. They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie. So, they’re trying to bury that evidence until everyone they’ve falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age. I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray. Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation. Thank you so much! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Friend, it’s been two years since the fake insurrection on January 6...and the real reign of terror launched by Biden and his lawless FBI and DOJ on Trump supporters and peaceful protesters. |

name: Your America
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7869%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=0tG91rdmU9efoFgUS47xog&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92196%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yPNZs3r4cKYkN29kapN05Q&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92197%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LGrrUEK7nC7OtJFUVFb%2f8A&sysid=1)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92197%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LGrrUEK7nC7OtJFUVFb%2f8A&sysid=1)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7869%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=0tG91rdmU9efoFgUS47xog&sysid=1)_

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: What's on your mind, Fellow American?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
I want to hear from you. What are the top issues you want to see addressed in the Senate? | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398834:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r)
---
Fellow American -

A lesson I learned early from my parents was to ask the right questions and listen.

My parents ran our family-owned restaurant, liquor store, and pool hall, where they would listen to our customers talk about all kinds of issues.

>From watching my parents interact with customers, I learned early on that listening is just as important as asking the right questions.

**That's why I want to hear from you, Fellow American. If we are going to move our nation in the right direction, it's important for me to take a moment to listen to what YOU think are the most important issues in 2023.**

| [** 2023 Issues Survey
Begin Now -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398834:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r)
---

I sincerely hope that you'll take just a few minutes right now to complete this important survey.

There's a lot happening in our nation. We have a crisis at our southern border, the cost of goods continue to soar, and we're still dealing with the lasting effects of the COVID-19 pandemic.

**[Your feedback will help me make informed decisions as a U.S. Senator, so please let me know what you think.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398834:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r)**

In 2022, we hoped to Reclaim the Majority in the U.S. Senate, but we fell short.

Here's the good news, Fellow American - **Republicans have a narrow majority in the House of Representatives, and the 2024 election map is favorable to Republicans in the Senate. Democrat senators like Joe Manchin and Jon Tester will have to overcome Joe Biden's double-digit deficits from 2020.**

We can win next year - but we need a winning message TODAY.

Fellow American, I am counting on you to help craft our winning message. **[Please start Team Graham's 2023 Issues Survey NOW:](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398834:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r)**

[** BEGIN SURVEY NOW -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398834:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r)
---

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398834:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r)

Lindsey Graham

P.S. As a United States Senator, it's my job to listen. Once I hear the feedback, I can integrate those ideas to find solutions to our nation's toughest problems. **[Please complete our 2023 Issues Survey, and after- I hope you will also include a personal contribution of $10 or more to help us RECLAIM THE MAJORITY in 2024!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398834:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r)**

[** BEGIN SURVEY NOW -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398834:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r)
---

* * *
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398835:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398835:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r)
---

We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. To receive only the most important emails, please [click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398836:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r) We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWDMiOEDNE).

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398837:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398838:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398839:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61398840:WDMiOEDNE:m:1:877327319:02A5065A63580376FC4BAEBF97483AA6:r)

name: Jessica Anderson - Executive Director | Heritage Action
subject: Joe Biden visits the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
And here’s why he finally made the trip. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0480%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=8pFwojx4TE8bnsqiFST3AQ&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656194%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L3M9bF05kGPN99Tb0EAZWA&sysid=1)
---
Hey friend, after two years of avoiding the crisis and ignoring the pleas of border states, Joe Biden has _finally_ visited the southern border. **But don’t be fooled. ** Joe Biden didn’t wake up one day and suddenly want to secure our border. **This is all a cover-up. ** ** ** **The Biden administration's incompetence and deliberate decisions: ** **❌ Endangered** American citizens and immigrants **❌ Allowed **deadly drugs to flood into our neighborhoods **❌ Essentially Relinquished** operational control of the border to the cartels **❌ Gave taxpayer money to NGOs** to help move illegal immigrants throughout America _(The extent of this NGO operation was first uncovered by The Heritage Foundation’s government oversight project)._
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zks1a3h8ln0v6e7k0001fg3ovvdeqb3plva0f6do_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chh66o34c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zonu08f9s8pkv68v36r2vcfgipl6kne4mcvvg6fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chh66o34c3h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoc6m0bqpon607oojcu3tdpbac39cmvti2vdvth8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chh66o34c3h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zl94rke55vlbrhv6jdm0r3ls0nhr7sb2uu0ke58o).

name: Brianna
subject: The Decline of Radical Gerrymandering…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Spoiler Alert: It could be roaring back if radicals have their way in Supreme Court cases.
|
---

Friend -- according to new research, state-level changes, big data, and state judicial decisions weakened gerrymandering's grip on the political makeup of American democracy in the last three elections.
So here’s the situation -- extreme Republicans in North Carolina have a long history of manipulating maps. But voters keep prevailing in overturning those maps in court.
However, less surprisingly, it could come roaring back if anti-democratic radicals have their way in the decisions due from the U.S. Supreme Court later in the spring.
**[Help All On The Line as we prepare for those SCOTUS decisions and protect fair maps from radical gerrymandering in 2023 and over the decade.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57490682/388165858/-1401627240?refcode=20230118_AOTL_F_radicalGM_RedLitexNC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI4NGVkZDQ0LWY5OTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0DNfwzOPYdbXUeKr4GrjHRBFDzH9UE5yNQ8yDhud3DM=)**

**Here are examples of how the rise of radical gerrymandering diminishes fair democracy in some AOTL target states:**
* In states like Alabama, lawmakers want to disregard decades of legal precedent and are pushing for the adoption of a new race-blind test under the Voting Rights Act.
* In Ohio, right-wing lawmakers elected under a gerrymandered state legislative map continue to push anti-democracy legislation including restrictive voter ID legislation and a measure designed to make citizen-led constitutional amendments harder to pass.
* In Florida, the political interests of elected officials paved the way for the passage of gerrymandered maps in flagrant disregard of the state’s constitutional prohibitions.

Fair redistricting is part of the foundation of our democracy. It ensures neither party becomes too extreme or polarized. We cannot allow a new wave of radical gerrymandering districts to go unchecked.
**[Will you make a donation today to boost AOTL’s plan to protect fair redistricting and maintain the integrity of our democracy for generations to come? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57490696/388165899/-1401627240?refcode=20230118_AOTL_F_radicalGM_RedLitexNC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI4NGVkZDQ0LWY5OTctZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0DNfwzOPYdbXUeKr4GrjHRBFDzH9UE5yNQ8yDhud3DM=)**

subject: You NEED To Check This Out! HUGE... | From The Desk Of Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
I want to personally invite you to join me for February's National Prayer Zoom Call hosted by Pastor's For Trump with special guest Roger Stone. Roge
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9970.1.a662f1d5c697c7f35d39547a1c2792d3)
---
**I want to personally invite you** to join me for February's National Prayer Zoom Call hosted by [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9971.1.83139271061e4c91149ead36fea1894a) with special guest **Roger Stone**.
**Roger Stone** is a seasoned political operative, speaker, pundit, and New York Times Bestselling Author featured in the Netflix documentary ‘ _Get Me Roger Stone_.’
A veteran of ten national presidential campaigns, he served as a senior campaign aide to three Republican presidents: **Nixon** , **Reagan** , and **Trump**.
Mr. Stone will provide us with **insights** and **updates** regarding the 2024 race for the White House.
We will have Pastors from across the nation lead us in a time of prayer and I believe it is important for you to join us.
This National Prayer Call is not just for Pastors only but for believers across America. Therefore, encourage others to join in!
You can register at [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9972.1.175427ba06c155e54ccad820edbf26f3) and when you register an email will be sent to you prior to the Zoom Conference Call with the link and details of how to join.
The National Prayer Call will take place on Monday, February 6 at 7:30pm EST.
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9973.1.9ac09369ce430695dafdd9b0c2afd001), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9974.1.e543f3defc224246f93d0e99b2858af5), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9975.1.606b152daa7d67343249767db5b964c1), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9976.1.d9db936e5f9476ef577a4519483e6c97), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9977.1.89e0f62953ec5fc43612dbb942f2df5a) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9978.1.fc521c58fce007c33cc604dcd3ce34a5)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9979.1.8673d0898ffdd92afe473996e175e2d2)
| | [ Join February's National Prayer Call ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9980.1.0630a89a1a9e2c89c4636366da20965e)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9981.1.a4d0fc1e3cfd489237b7ed57073e5165)
---
Recently, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9982.1.2c0392651075324a9b666c0602496c18) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9983.1.cc26258554011a9581532a155323c579)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9984.1.b0b3a38d7f0c92e2c46fb4d99c657762) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9985.1.8d580e50368a689c024e677cecec3c31) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9986.1.fe784db8aed2fd76aba6e5bbb4a4c94f) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9987.1.91d5ebb80207cd167f93907734c20db8) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9988.1.aa5edd41908fb30d0516925b3292d8eb) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16979339.9989.1.fb1f9870f635f8133cbd18d15b975835) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
---
---

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Protect Children from Poisonous Drugs/ McGuire House Bill 1922
body:
Press Release January 19, 2023
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 19th, 2023
McGuire introduces bill to protect Virginia's kids from poisonous D8 drugs RICHMOND, VA - Today, Delegate John McGuire announced he is introducing legislation (HB 1922) to ban the sale of harmful Delta-8 products.

This bill makes it a Class 1 misdemeanor to sell, give, distribute, or possess with intent to sell, give, or distribute Delta-8 THC (tetrahydrocannabinol), except as authorized in the Drug Control Act. The bill also directs the Department of Forensic Science to determine the proper methods for detecting Delta-8 THC in substances.
"Many psychoactive edible products land in the hands of children because they are a key profit driver for the high-potency THC industry, e.g., gummies. The National Poison Control centers received 2,362 exposure cases of Delta-8 THC products between January 1, 2021, and February 28, 2022, with 41 percent of those calls involving children. Our children should be number one. It is past time to keep Delta-8 products out of the hands of our children. This bill (HB 1922) aims to do just that."
- Delegate John McGuire, Candidate for Virginia Senate District 10
"Delta-8 is dangerous to our children and is a mounting public health crisis," said James Avery, MD, Co-Virginia State Director with the American Academy of Medical Ethics. "High-potency THC intoxicating products like Delta-8 can never be safely regulated--for anyone. Calls to Virginia poison control centers have skyrocketed because toddlers and children like four-year-old Tanner Clements of Spotsylvania County are getting their hands on and swallowing Delta-8 gummies. Tragically, Tanner died this past May. Speaking as a healthcare professional experienced on this issue, Virginia must ban Delta-8 sales as 14 states have already done. We thank Delegate McGuire for introducing HB 1922, which will ban Delta-8 sales and protect Virginia's kids."

James Avery, MD, CMD, FACP, FCCP, FAAHPM Virginia State Director, American Academy of Medical Ethics Visiting Assistant Professor of Medicine, University of Virginia Medical School

"The Virginia Association of Chiefs of Police strongly supports HB 1922, which would prohibit the sale of Delta-8 THC products in Virginia. At least 18 states have restricted or banned Delta-8 THC, recognizing the serious and sometimes fatal harm associated with these products, most of which have targeted their marketing towards children. It's time for Virginia to take action to protect our children and prevent the sales and distribution of harmful, unregulated Delta-8 THC products."
Ms. Dana G. Schrad Executive Director Virginia Public Safety Foundation

You can read the bill text [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019v-Ag0XALW5-3rPBIkvPBDXWGLSbcQYekdOkkC1sR5YfWQ6hnnkvHlvvvWtUbLMOdk5l5AwsRU52a2qzOmrhYHt7OcdiWV0-LSDutT2iNhULAtL_R7aYESn0w3w-yRG2Q1VY1C3MR_ZQmuPU3p9Q-twzzO_-Pc6bzuthXdUZSF-oP0bjBeah7tdLU6vm87_R5p-ljV4kWOk=&c=ydCJ9d8-YeinV4S2VZua-QC4bp8E3wr7nld_gVPwcF-tMU1iILtNmQ==&ch=vF7A5_tGlYcsWRZeNnb1eFJBG0QuRzDyGUf6CvWqq3JBLndhc7BaMA==). ### Contact: [Press@mcguireforvirginia.com](mailto:Press@mcguireforvirginia.com)

---
| God Bless America,

clean_body: Press Release January 19, 2023 | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 19th, 2023 McGuire introduces bill to protect Virginia's kids from poisonous D8 drugs RICHMOND, VA - Today, Delegate John McGuire announced he is introducing legislation (HB 1922) to ban the sale of harmful Delta-8 products. This bill makes it a Class 1 misdemeanor to sell, give, distribute, or possess with intent to sell, give, or distribute Delta-8 THC (tetrahydrocannabinol), except as authorized in the Drug Control Act. The bill also directs the Department of Forensic Science to determine the proper methods for detecting Delta-8 THC in substances. "Many psychoactive edible products land in the hands of children because they are a key profit driver for the high-potency THC industry, e.g., gummies. The National Poison Control centers received 2,362 exposure cases of Delta-8 THC products between January 1, 2021, and February 28, 2022, with 41 percent of those calls involving children. Our children should be number one. It is past time to keep Delta-8 products out of the hands of our children. This bill (HB 1922) aims to do just that." - Delegate John McGuire, Candidate for Virginia Senate District 10 "Delta-8 is dangerous to our children and is a mounting public health crisis," said James Avery, MD, Co-Virginia State Director with the American Academy of Medical Ethics. "High-potency THC intoxicating products like Delta-8 can never be safely regulated--for anyone. Calls to Virginia poison control centers have skyrocketed because toddlers and children like four-year-old Tanner Clements of Spotsylvania County are getting their hands on and swallowing Delta-8 gummies. Tragically, Tanner died this past May. Speaking as a healthcare professional experienced on this issue, Virginia must ban Delta-8 sales as 14 states have already done. We thank Delegate McGuire for introducing HB 1922, which will ban Delta-8 sales and protect Virginia's kids." James Avery, MD, CMD, FACP, FCCP, FAAHPM Virginia State Director, American Academy of Medical Ethics Visiting Assistant Professor of Medicine, University of Virginia Medical School "The Virginia Association of Chiefs of Police strongly supports HB 1922, which would prohibit the sale of Delta-8 THC products in Virginia. At least 18 states have restricted or banned Delta-8 THC, recognizing the serious and sometimes fatal harm associated with these products, most of which have targeted their marketing towards children. It's time for Virginia to take action to protect our children and prevent the sales and distribution of harmful, unregulated Delta-8 THC products." Ms. Dana G. Schrad Executive Director Virginia Public Safety Foundation You can read the bill text ==. ### Contact: mailto:Press@mcguireforvirginia.com | | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 NFIB 100 == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Mark Warner
subject: Our progress on climate and a greener future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
...and here’s how you can help

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57497326/388180445/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZThkNWNiZi0wMzk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=18pyaEz7reCx9FBmnh4WacRj9UGqmezrySbwctFm_6k=&emci=bd6a7de0-3797-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=6e8d5cbf-0398-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, we made significant progress on climate and the environment in 2022. I recently became a grandfather, and I’m spending a lot of time these days thinking about what kind of planet we are leaving for the next generation. If you’d asked me a couple years ago what the United States was doing about climate change, frankly I wouldn’t have had much to say. But in just the past couple years, under Democratic leadership, we’ve made some important strides. First, we passed a historic infrastructure package to rebuild our roads and bridges, upgrade our power structure, invest in public transit and clean energy, eliminate lead pipes, and work to make our communities more resilient to the impacts of climate change. I was proud to be a key negotiator of this game-changing legislation and get it over the finish line in the Senate. And already, we are seeing historic green investments being made across Virginia – from public transit, to electric vehicle charging, to coastal resilience. But we didn’t stop there. I worked hard with my colleagues to pass the Inflation Reduction Act which, simply put, is the largest climate change legislation in American history. Along with measures to cut health care and energy costs for working families, the bill made a dramatic investment in fighting climate change and protecting our planet for future generations. Over the next few years, we are going to see these investments pay off in the form of new greener energy sources, more electric vehicles, and the growth of a green economy. _[**I am committed to continuing this kind of progress because our environment, our economy, our families, and our future all depend on it. Will you consider making a donation now to keep our Senate majority so we can keep up the fight on climate? Anything you can give before the midnight mid-month deadline makes a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57497327/388180446/1740298768?refcode=mw_em_230119_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZThkNWNiZi0wMzk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=18pyaEz7reCx9FBmnh4WacRj9UGqmezrySbwctFm_6k=)_ The truth is, we are fighting for the future of our planet and the future we leave to our kids and grandkids. Between these historic bills, and President Biden’s decision to re-enter the Paris agreement, we are making progress. But we know there is so much more work that must be done. It’s my commitment to you that I’m going to keep fighting in the Senate to make sure we respond to the threat of climate change and do right by future generations. Thank you, Mark Warner **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57497328/388180447/1740298768?refcode=mw_em_230119_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZThkNWNiZi0wMzk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=18pyaEz7reCx9FBmnh4WacRj9UGqmezrySbwctFm_6k=)**

clean_body: ...and here’s how you can help | | | Derek, we made significant progress on climate and the environment in 2022. I recently became a grandfather, and I’m spending a lot of time these days thinking about what kind of planet we are leaving for the next generation. If you’d asked me a couple years ago what the United States was doing about climate change, frankly I wouldn’t have had much to say. But in just the past couple years, under Democratic leadership, we’ve made some important strides. First, we passed a historic infrastructure package to rebuild our roads and bridges, upgrade our power structure, invest in public transit and clean energy, eliminate lead pipes, and work to make our communities more resilient to the impacts of climate change. I was proud to be a key negotiator of this game-changing legislation and get it over the finish line in the Senate. And already, we are seeing historic green investments being made across Virginia – from public transit, to electric vehicle charging, to coastal resilience. But we didn’t stop there. I worked hard with my colleagues to pass the Inflation Reduction Act which, simply put, is the largest climate change legislation in American history. Along with measures to cut health care and energy costs for working families, the bill made a dramatic investment in fighting climate change and protecting our planet for future generations. Over the next few years, we are going to see these investments pay off in the form of new greener energy sources, more electric vehicles, and the growth of a green economy. = The truth is, we are fighting for the future of our planet and the future we leave to our kids and grandkids. Between these historic bills, and President Biden’s decision to re-enter the Paris agreement, we are making progress. But we know there is so much more work that must be done. It’s my commitment to you that I’m going to keep fighting in the Senate to make sure we respond to the threat of climate change and do right by future generations. Thank you, Mark Warner = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8053d14-42a1-4f25-a65f-217889bb5f1e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zukau06ofq8u690o7kecv4msn7v0nhgvqnj91j00_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chj66o76c5h2bs) |
---

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znmjk6297kv2rnlgo6v53tnp7gp4e2a8k59ef58g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chj66o76c5h2bs) Dear Friend,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8gat230hjjvb1o8ppai66lbsjq7cegumtapm160_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chj66o76c5h2bs)

I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zi5ogupf56d78ukgknp4b70dig2ogvst5klfh488_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chj66o76c5h2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5r3lpmh56qjcum2rftga55o08mjg0n235vupj8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chj66o76c5h2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Friend, I can 't fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcil3j79ork2socf2pmtm4nuff7l6qqg79m4i46o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chj66o76c5h2bs)

625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: 2 AM
body:
It’s the honor of my life to return to Congress, and I’m ready to keep working for Pennsylvanians and all Americans.
| | |
---
Derek, at around 2 a.m. on Jan. 7, after 15 rounds of voting to determine our next Speaker of the House, I was finally sworn in as a member of Congress representing Pennsylvania’s 6th Congressional District. Thank you, thank you. I wouldn’t be here without you.

**It’s the honor of my life to return to Congress, and I’m ready to keep working for Pennsylvanians and all Americans.**
Although it was a sometimes rocky process, we accomplished so much together in the last two years – big investments in our transportation and supply chain infrastructure, climate change mitigation, support for Ukraine, lower prescription drug prices and more – we have SO much to be proud of.

Where do we go from here? With Republicans now in control of the agenda in the U.S. House of Representatives, I’m honestly not sure yet. But you can count on me to aggressively protect the gains we’ve made while seeking creative ways to solve the challenges facing our community and our country. Our to-do list is long.

I hope you’ll continue to stand by my side. I remain focused on serving my constituents and advocating for policies that help working people, but I can't do it alone – not without you.

**[We must work together, Derek. So if you're with me, please donate what you can so we can face the challenges of this new beginning head-on.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57501404/388193196/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk781-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTU3MmUwYy0wYTk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3l4Sz7kDKm3gICPW_wk0W0-N2TI118cujjl7uZk9SJA=)**

Patriot,

No one in their right mind believes that Katie Hobbs won the election — even 69% of DEMOCRATS in Maricopa County believe Americans have been deprived of the right to vote in this election.

**So much fraud has already been uncovered, but it will take more time to reveal the true scale of the corruption that influenced our election.** **[We just need to hold the line.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=45e8a05c007047ae8d807badf4682011&_e=n8qeogsuJX70h4AN4Xdyk54xuiDE3ztw2yvjH9kb_0yu13ci0Xug85JbiSvIIq2qeMlhK0VOeyhOs5xWQq05x8Iu_J3nTewTK6Ho0AFqchpH__tS1yLBAe8NOVNg-W90RcNGOlC6Q1OpiGVWIRGa0KhYUtqVaya8xd1cKR6LlRMw7o7F3dLQx_gfa6N2eH749x997obktSaOCaQdT66VlHi8eHEf3H7zDu4D8LgKdwfFXJa3NZGOVqZMSjDWWMJl3nVA5xAh9E1ED0y3V0KvA-EKJyr4xcweARR1-Is9KSV5Uqd4Cy_egeoUgNe3MX4pgtUVaMVU6E9R50tHteDr5Ig_mZpmu_jh3Z2g1vOxooKBJWCmtqgb68wuCdviQ5tPVFv8JSBluWnpRIstFaLEIQOSiOOuwVI5tvay_HQzxLkzMLWDpOUn3ForlIMlCe7zB60vVFlw-R0aS5YwNQqhfbC74Z6mH4l1rkpCV1qaXCA4_jfc3VAtyl2rWssjnZ-mBK008-gkkiXOlTb2xA5VGg%3D%3D)**

As long as I’m still breathing, I will not stop uncovering the truth.

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Press Release - SB2323 Consolidation of Community Hospitals
body:
|
---
| | |
---
|
## Press Release: Senate Bill 2323
Violates Mississippi GOP Platform on Healthcare
---
| The MS Senate is in the process of debating [Senate Bill 2323](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/vhP7JVLcaYRSKQeyY_qhIw). The bill would specifically allow the government-owned University of Mississippi Medical Center to buy out rural and community hospitals. The bill would exclude the state from any anti-competitive laws providing a pathway for the state to have a complete monopoly on medical services provided by hospitals in the state. The original version of the bill includes language on line 335 that states the legislature understands that the bill is anti-free-market and impacts competition, but they believe that it is necessary for the “benefits of collaboration.”

The original bill also would have also allowed UMMC to make contributions to political committees to further pay off the politicians wanting to pass this bill, although this provision was removed in the committee substitute.

Mississippi Freedom Caucus Chairman Dana Criswell said of the bill:

“This is an attempt at a complete government takeover of our hospital system in Mississippi. This will create a huge government protected monopoly, driving out competition and ultimately putting private hospitals out of business.”

The bill has not yet passed the Senate, as of the writing of the release, and there is discussion of an amendment to include private hospitals in the bill, but it appears that Lt. Gov. Delbert is against the amendment.

Even with the private hospital amendment, it may not provide protection for private hospitals, with the State being shielded from anti-competition laws.

There is nothing good about this bill, which was introduced by a Republican in a Republican supermajority Senate, being led by a Republican Lt. Gov. Delbert Hosemann. According to the Mississippi Republican (GOP) website, Republicans should hold a view of free markets in healthcare, stating “We can have an affordable, accessible and quality health care system by empowering individuals and families, promoting free-market competition.” This bill is anything but free-market and the Republicans pushing it seem to be anything but Republicans.
---
|
---
| The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is the only group of legislators who consistently fight to protect the freedoms and liberties of the citizens of Mississippi.Learn more at: [www.FreedomCaucus.ms ](https://www.freedomcaucus.ms)
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/vNK46kM-LHKtdp1zL40RAQ) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

| | Jim’s a devoted husband, a proud father of three, a current U.S. Naval Reserve Supply Corps Officer, and **he recently announced his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Indiana.**
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN $25 or MORE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztvjt7p6uj1ll1vihq79mo746ku6967tog8hrou0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chgm2o33clh2bs)

| | In 2014, he took a leave of absence from the Indiana State Senate in 2014-2015 to deploy to Afghanistan during Operations Enduring Freedom and Freedom’s Sentinel. He received the Defense Meritorious Service Medal for his military leadership in Afghanistan.

| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvsdrbnr9a4l620m5guf2sgrgmjkcu7iivfm7tc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chgm2o33clh2bs)

| | **But his fight didn’t stop there. ** In 2016, he was elected to Congress, where he worked alongside President Trump to roll back some of the most egregious and burdensome Obama-era rules and regulations. Jim knows what it takes to balance a budget and believes Washington ought to do the same, and**that is why he was tapped to serve as Chairman of the Republican Study Committee’s Budget and Spending Task Force to get our nation’s fiscal house in order. **
