name: Brent Bozell
subject: Breaking - Soros spends $131 Million to influence media
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225143:642UMKGNN:m:1:3331421248:B21B1B1C13FE93DEEF7666125B9FFAE6:r)
Peter,

Our new MRC Business analysis reveals that **Soros specifically funneled at least $131,111,250 between 2016 and 2020 into 253 journalism and activist media groups worldwide** to spread his radical leftist ideas on abortion, Marxist economics, anti-Americanism, defunding the police, environmental extremism, and LGBT fanaticism.

Soros blew past the $100 million global media funding milestone again in just a four-year timespan.

And most people have no idea this is happening, Peter.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is a conservative organization dedicated to exposing Soros ' dealings and working to hold him accountable for advancing his radical left-wing agenda around the globe.**

**That 's why I've set a goal to raise $20,000 before midnight on Friday to continue our investigation of George Soros.**

[_**Peter, can you make an urgent gift of any amount?**__**Click here**_ _**to send your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225143:642UMKGNN:m:1:3331421248:B21B1B1C13FE93DEEF7666125B9FFAE6:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225143:642UMKGNN:m:1:3331421248:B21B1B1C13FE93DEEF7666125B9FFAE6:r)

It is easy to criticize Soros' politics, but as he told The New York Times, he is using his fortune to "bend" the arc of history "in the right direction," and he's using his global media clout to do it.

* **$131 Million to Advance Soros ' Leftist Global Media Agenda**

Soros spends hundreds of millions of dollars around the world in "private-sector investments to advance" his left-wing agenda on topics such as "racial equity" and "climate justice."

The organization states it has doled out $400 million to 54 countries as of April 2022, $9.3 million of which went toward "independent media."

* **Views Pushed by Soros-Funded Outlets Are Radical, Dystopian: **

Global outlet openDemocracy -- which received $1,633,457 from Soros between 2016-2020 -- published an op-ed from a "queer communism" activist who said the COVID-19 crisis "shows it's time to abolish the [nuclear] family."

The Soros-backed Free Press -- financed to the tune of $1,625,000 between 2016 and 2020 -- pressured the Federal Communications Commission to label former President Donald Trump's coronavirus briefings "hoaxes" and censure broadcasters that aired them.

[_**Help expose the extent of how Soros is influencing the globe by**_ _**clicking here**_ _**to send your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225143:642UMKGNN:m:1:3331421248:B21B1B1C13FE93DEEF7666125B9FFAE6:r)

* **253 Journalism/Media Groups Tied to Soros: **

MRC Business discovered that Soros funded at least 253 organizations across the world that focus on news and activist media. **A number of these groups wield massive power over the flow of information in international politics. **

Project Syndicate claimed its commentaries were published 20,393 times in 156 countries in 2021 in more than 66 different languages.

OpenDemocracy claimed it "attracts more than 11 million visits per year" and has projects published "in Russian, Spanish and Portuguese as well as English."

**The Poynter Institute 's Soros-funded International Fact-Checking Network controls global fact-checking for 100 organizations and influences much of Big Tech content and social media with that power.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225143:642UMKGNN:m:1:3331421248:B21B1B1C13FE93DEEF7666125B9FFAE6:r)

It's time for far-Left billionaires to be held accountable for their actions.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media.****Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Now we're attacking the Left and exposing how they're pushing their radical agenda of abortion, Marxist economics, anti-Americanism, defunding the police, environmental extremism, and LGBT fanaticism.

Can you help us continue our investigation into George Soros?

Click any link below to help MRC reach our goal of $20,000 before midnight on Friday.

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225144:642UMKGNN:m:1:3331421248:B21B1B1C13FE93DEEF7666125B9FFAE6:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225145:642UMKGNN:m:1:3331421248:B21B1B1C13FE93DEEF7666125B9FFAE6:r)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225147:642UMKGNN:m:1:3331421248:B21B1B1C13FE93DEEF7666125B9FFAE6:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225148:642UMKGNN:m:1:3331421248:B21B1B1C13FE93DEEF7666125B9FFAE6:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225149:642UMKGNN:m:1:3331421248:B21B1B1C13FE93DEEF7666125B9FFAE6:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225150:642UMKGNN:m:1:3331421248:B21B1B1C13FE93DEEF7666125B9FFAE6:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225151:642UMKGNN:m:1:3331421248:B21B1B1C13FE93DEEF7666125B9FFAE6:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225143:642UMKGNN:m:1:3331421248:B21B1B1C13FE93DEEF7666125B9FFAE6:r)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

_The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible._

name: Don Huffines
subject: Property taxes are insane
body:
Hello, patriots! The path to restoring our economic liberty and unleashing prosperity begins by holding our state politicians accountable. No images? [Click here](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-e-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-z/) [](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-r/)
# HELLO, PATRIOTS!
[](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-y/)
## The path to restoring our economic liberty and unleashing prosperity begins by holding our state politicians accountable.
## [_A Road Map to Abolishing School Property Taxes_](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-j/) is a 3-part series that examines how to eliminate Texans' massive property tax burden.
## In our first paper, [_Texas Property Taxes: A State to State Comparison_](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-t/), we found that Texas has one of the highest property tax burdens in the United States. The effective tax rate on Texas businesses in the state's most populous urban areas is 2.50%. This makes the property tax burden on Texas businesses the 9th highest in the country. Homeowners fare even worse. The average ranking by several websites of the property tax rate on owner-occupied homes is the 6th highest. The driving factor behind Texas' increasing high property tax burden is increased spending by school districts and local governments, which go to great lengths to conceal these increases from voters.
## If Texans want to reduce property taxes, we must convince our politicians to exercise fiscal restraint. The only way to have limited government is to limit government revenue.
[Read Paper 1](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-h/)
## Our second research paper, [_Why Texas Can't --or Won't--Stop the Rapid Growth of Property Taxes_](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-k/), examines Texas politicians' failures and provides a plan for meaningful property relief in this legislative session.
## Texans have a long history of expressing concern over high property tax burdens. Texas politicians also have a long history of being unable (or unwilling) to stop property tax growth.
## Since 1997 politicians have attempted to provide tax relief five times and failed each time. Instead, they have increased spending at the state and local levels, placing ever higher tax burdens on Texans. The failures of Texas politicians provide some lessons for meaningful property relief in the upcoming legislative session.
## To make this happen, the Texas Legislature should limit state spending growth to no more than 4% per biennium and use the resulting surplus to permanently reduce property taxes in Texas.
[Read Report 2](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-u/)
## Our third research paper, _Eliminating Texas' School M &O Property Tax in 10 Years_, will be out very soon!
## Texas' school maintenance and operations (M&0) property tax, about 43% of the current $76.4 total property tax levy, drives the ever-growing property tax burden on Texans. To eliminate the M&O tax, the Texas Legislature must:
## 1) limit annual state spending growth to no more than 2.5%
## 2) allocate 90% of surplus funds created by the spending limit to property tax relief
## 3) freeze and then reduce school property revenue each year until school M&O property taxes are eliminated
## 4) require local governments to get the permission of voters to raise property tax rates above the "No New Revenue" tax rate
## In ten years, depending on what the Texas legislature does this session, the school M&O property tax will be either closing in on $60 billion or $0. Eliminating the M&O tax will not reduce funding for public schools or change school funding formulas. But eliminating the M&O tax will reduce approximately a third of the total property tax burden on Texas homeowners and businesses.
## **Throughout the year, we will continue to release research papers on how Texas can stop the invasion on our border, eliminate property taxes, and implement educational freedom.**
## **Stay involved because you do not want to miss this!**

## For Liberty, Prosperity, and Virtue Always,
## Don Huffines
## President, Huffines Liberty Foundation
[](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-b/)[](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-n/) [Donate](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-p/) | [](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Share ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-fb-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-v/) | [ Tweet ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.cmail19.com/t/t-tw-fjtdktt-yuddtktydi-e/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-fjtdktt-l-s)

clean_body: Hello, patriots! The path to restoring our economic liberty and unleashing prosperity begins by holding our state politicians accountable. No images? HELLO, PATRIOTS! The path to restoring our economic liberty and unleashing prosperity begins by holding our state politicians accountable. is a 3-part series that examines how to eliminate Texans' massive property tax burden. In our first paper, , we found that Texas has one of the highest property tax burdens in the United States. The effective tax rate on Texas businesses in the state's most populous urban areas is 2.50%. This makes the property tax burden on Texas businesses the 9th highest in the country. Homeowners fare even worse. The average ranking by several websites of the property tax rate on owner-occupied homes is the 6th highest. The driving factor behind Texas' increasing high property tax burden is increased spending by school districts and local governments, which go to great lengths to conceal these increases from voters. If Texans want to reduce property taxes, we must convince our politicians to exercise fiscal restraint. The only way to have limited government is to limit government revenue. Our second research paper, , examines Texas politicians' failures and provides a plan for meaningful property relief in this legislative session. Texans have a long history of expressing concern over high property tax burdens. Texas politicians also have a long history of being unable (or unwilling) to stop property tax growth. Since 1997 politicians have attempted to provide tax relief five times and failed each time. Instead, they have increased spending at the state and local levels, placing ever higher tax burdens on Texans. The failures of Texas politicians provide some lessons for meaningful property relief in the upcoming legislative session. To make this happen, the Texas Legislature should limit state spending growth to no more than 4% per biennium and use the resulting surplus to permanently reduce property taxes in Texas. Our third research paper, Eliminating Texas' School M &O Property Tax in 10 Years, will be out very soon! Texas' school maintenance and operations (M&0) property tax, about 43% of the current $76.4 total property tax levy, drives the ever-growing property tax burden on Texans. To eliminate the M&O tax, the Texas Legislature must: 1) limit annual state spending growth to no more than 2.5% 2) allocate 90% of surplus funds created by the spending limit to property tax relief 3) freeze and then reduce school property revenue each year until school M&O property taxes are eliminated 4) require local governments to get the permission of voters to raise property tax rates above the "No New Revenue" tax rate In ten years, depending on what the Texas legislature does this session, the school M&O property tax will be either closing in on $60 billion or $0. Eliminating the M&O tax will not reduce funding for public schools or change school funding formulas. But eliminating the M&O tax will reduce approximately a third of the total property tax burden on Texas homeowners and businesses. Throughout the year, we will continue to release research papers on how Texas can stop the invasion on our border, eliminate property taxes, and implement educational freedom. Stay involved because you do not want to miss this! For Liberty, Prosperity, and Virtue Always, Don Huffines President, Huffines Liberty Foundation | | | | ---|---|--- (214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. | | | House Republicans just placed conspiracy theorist and Trump-enthusiast Marjorie Taylor Greene on the House Homeland Security Committee. In 2021, Marjorie Taylor Greene lost her committee assignments after making many incendiary statements, including inciting violence against Democrats. Some Republicans even joined Democrats in voting to take away her assignments! But now, Greene will be on the Homeland Security Committee which oversees national security issues like border security, counterterrorism, election security, and cybersecurity. This conspiracy theorist has even spread lies that the September 11th attacks were a hoax – she should be nowhere near matters of our national security! We need Congress to act with courage once again and strip Marjorie Taylor Greene of her committee assignments. Some Republicans did it before, they can do it again. [Sign the petition: Ban Marjorie Taylor Greene from serving on the Homeland Security Committee >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d90bbee-5d48-4030-863d-febd3c4f7614/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Explaining our campaign debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress before the end of the year, and we’ve got just a little bit left to go. If you could give just $10 right now -- split with Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link: secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
Look – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were doubting whether we could win.
My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might that the funding will come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.
Will you please give $10 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Serve America, and I’d be grateful for anything you can give. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off.
Thank you for your help.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

body:

name: Kirsten
subject: big problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
I promise to make this quick, friend.

With Democrats fighting to hang onto our razor-thin Senate majority, Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ says that the GOP has a clear path to retake control. They only need to flip two seats — and after Republicans won more races in New York last November than they have in two decades, they’re targeting my seat as a key pickup opportunity.

That’s why this is such a big problem: **My team just updated me that we’re way behind our $15,000 fundraising goal. If we don’t close the gap before our midnight deadline, we could get outpaced by the GOP megadonor machine right at the beginning of this tough reelection fight.**

**I don’t take any money from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying entirely on grassroots support from people like you.** **[_So please, will you rush $5 or more now to help me reach this goal before midnight, defeat the GOP in New York and keep the Senate blue?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57509974/388226239/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3896-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2IxZjE3Yy0xYjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=58eJjrTGjYG8cfLlWNHMLhwDvulHGAgJoIT3nrpFkpk=)**

Thank you for coming through in such a critical moment,

Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Your America
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7877%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=uG0edP6QT174mOGV0NMqaQ&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92135%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2fG1PRpRceELZ5QSX6argw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we’ve produced the new online course, **“The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism.”**
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92136%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LByYy2I%2fE0lbwx4i6kHHLw&sysid=1)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You’ll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you’ll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today’s global elite; and, you’ll explore how these movements overtook America’s key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92137%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C5npkx7B6bC3RE8BGy8IOA&sysid=1)**

I hope you’ll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7877%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=uG0edP6QT174mOGV0NMqaQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7877%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=uG0edP6QT174mOGV0NMqaQ&sysid=1)

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we’ve produced the new online course, “The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism.” | | In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You’ll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you’ll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today’s global elite; and, you’ll explore how these movements overtook America’s key institutions. You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below: I hope you’ll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ff9a3e477594d44b7fde8e2416d6df5&_e=ghdFT4LDbv5r0tARhdBLkZHhE1BSTjID5OlObgSLaUJlniqzlfw9FUJ9zaGSTEUs14ATR8kLfv1y8vqyTZeMrv9I-hwqyDR1HfS4hOfWPipAsQ0JIw2ZEUuVlLYk4KOLPb1ZYbp4wt1knuIYo0MeqdYfRle3ABCTlIVlJDLd3bY_i_odzoozlnk3yohyKl26W1tJ0XSMp1Rj6QW70ssbEE_N_kP_J6-CbWQEc6eBXDi2TFh49m_BuJkHCmduCBzfvhH5KcX3G0JOtqYpzrURWb0tykOn3SPGR2b6rBFKn5ig5K22SsrtuF3AECzc1WKcFU0KkDVWhikIj9JPajM1gVYRD7DitUEU0dN9wWYtH97o3znTK4e3seXOWBLWf3KAMQC0rjsxEKJw6cZfQWx5zkKwRFWmWdYKXNSnfQusHnU%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ff9a3e477594d44b7fde8e2416d6df5&_e=ghdFT4LDbv5r0tARhdBLkZHhE1BSTjID5OlObgSLaUJlniqzlfw9FUJ9zaGSTEUs14ATR8kLfv1y8vqyTZeMrv9I-hwqyDR1HfS4hOfWPipAsQ0JIw2ZEUuVlLYk4KOLPb1ZYbp4wt1knuIYo0MeqdYfRle3ABCTlIVlJDLd3bY_i_odzoozlnk3yohyKl26W1tJ0XSMp1Rj6QW70ssbEE_N_kP_J6-CbWQEc6eBXDi2TFh49m_BuJkHCmduCBzfYRe4_-D2cCjJkXSNwAiKCEzjmMGeySZjN5K_H6T0ZjghawF3H0GEAe-Sot7xCvu9P1d2TPXYY0wtL8ly3d59kyCDllkw0VqiM4Bl32jDvRnM22-Bu39GdCIm78sFHnEdHl-T8q52mgRwVgJXaWR4RTWzvUorXzNaeTkWuw-uHAI%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ff9a3e477594d44b7fde8e2416d6df5&_e=ghdFT4LDbv5r0tARhdBLkZHhE1BSTjID5OlObgSLaUJlniqzlfw9FUJ9zaGSTEUs14ATR8kLfv1y8vqyTZeMrv9I-hwqyDR1HfS4hOfWPipAsQ0JIw2ZEUuVlLYk4KOLPb1ZYbp4wt1knuIYo0MeqdYfRle3ABCTlIVlJDLd3bY_i_odzoozlnk3yohyKl26W1tJ0XSMp1Rj6QW70ssbEE_N_kP_J6-CbWQEc6eBXDi2TFh49m_BuJkHCmduCBzfSPO-YNiX3vI7DggIfUQsSjZVJdNmCDHQUcQKH1Kt5NFKKPBqz_wahzPZDKUD5zArIu1FOHLb7gtJ9p06k9F7v_4H86RxwguGxSJeAP6zjVPY4Sm6lENDUR2Tqbd9Q8tzcVNcm0hnqt4EC5SymHdDLrEOnTuR3dwlZmMHm1RvkKs%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=8ff9a3e477594d44b7fde8e2416d6df5&_t=bANqqeclZc7Zqy7QvFQniwF0-BnU62wm0LqBHSUSRcMvMAJLq2HfEf9iKiM5yf1UdpiVZWuwhmAOClqzIgzTEjIjWb12iGfu-0xJSsJVR1_wF20TZ3NZacgJ8H_7WZhICpNsJrbhYH39H4mNsrlIEOUjfk_h9MnYBT_aAU1LcXQ%3D)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu8nmun1qg206cbgqe8q5c6gi362c6m3eaijjqag_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chgm9pj0s5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8404qfinkj5vmqjff68crq72d88jj158l0mn9p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chgm9pj0s5h2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd4554ko7ads74su423ipnb110lubeal1sgqt190_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chgm9pj0s5h2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zn1uj7gld6mb1ral6pu842k40556gabhtososjk8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z914fqlv59287265h6eemuf7h6u1snn75hnkhj58_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c5i62p76c3gm49fg)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc0sn06ptt2ehr80auga8ucjmons7cr6majrf440_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chim0pj6cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0phdbbdhrqob62aafjkem4njsv011tui8jj34j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chim0pj6cdh2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb01iqljs8csgdo35nc8g22h24o6pf0k68u07o8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chim0pj6cdh2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zp95dsed7kvo4a2d72mkdsgui49shp30t0m7nn70).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sherrod Brown keeps defying the odds and winning with voters, so Republicans are going to try and drown him in a pile of cash in 2024. We can help him fight back.
body:
Keep a great Senator?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90f8c102-7495-4289-8dad-bc7d70da3bee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Sherrod Brown isn’t just a bright light in Ohio, he's our sun (and much the same for working people and progressives across the country)._** _Because the Ohio GOP controls nearly everything, defies our courts and uses gerrymandering and now an egregious voter suppression law just passed to be handed what they can't win, they have a lock on most positions of power._ **_Sherrod's defied them, winning time and again._** He's a Senator because he beat then Senator Mike DeWine in '06. **_So, here comes wealthy Republican, state Sen Matt Dolan, to try to drown him in campaign cash._** Dolan won't have Peter Thiel's money (that we know of) like J.D. Vance, which upended a 50-50 race for Tim Ryan. But Dolan's loaded, as he proved by spending ~$11 Million outta pocket to lose to Vance in the GOP Senate primaries in '22. [_WE MUST begin supporting Sherrod NOW, as Dolan begins to spend millions daddy gave him to try and steal another seat. _**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or more to keep the exceptional Senator Sherrod Brown where he belongs, in his Senate seat in Washington fighting for our values?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0741bc87-b677-49ab-85d2-9607fad58245/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) If you're from NYC you're likely familiar with the Dolan family's ineptitude. Matt's cousin, James, CEO of Madison Square Garden sports, has presided over a tenure of total failure and sexual harassment. Matt wants the seat because he's rich. That's it. He's using the right-wing playbook of blabbing about inflation (Note: it's coming down) and calling Sherrod a partisan. LOL.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88050592-67cd-492a-a8ff-d68418151365/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Sherrod's been outstanding on every issue we care about from abortion rights to gun safety, a living wage to climate. But, on issues like trade, he breaks with the party to fight for Ohio's working class. He ain't partisan._** **_What he is, to be honest, is a national treasure. _**_We can keep him in the Senate, or allow a spoiled brat resembling Donald Trump, Rick Scott & Vance take the seat and have its progressive values do a total 180 towards autocracy._ [_So WE MUST begin supporting Sherrod NOW, as Dolan begins to spend millions daddy gave him to try and steal another seat. _**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or more to keep the exceptional Senator Sherrod Brown where he belongs, in his Senate seat in Washington fighting for our values?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teceff576-9de7-47e0-9bb6-35dc39dc02fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks so much for continuing to fight. Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a1a6a9a-68e9-48e0-9a4f-8a90bffe8513/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/sherrodbrownschallenger2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td6ea4542-ff00-40c3-bc08-43a5e63da715/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=bbc64022-eb31-4558-8b88-a048f952897b&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=bbc64022-eb31-4558-8b88-a048f952897b&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2023-fr-january?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2023-fr-january?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
Team,

Last week, while getting in an elevator, George Santos told reporters, if 142 people ask for me to resign, I’ll resign.”

We can come up with those numbers. Team, will you be one of the 142 people we need to tell Santos to get out of Congress? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/fMTZrjU2_UODnJYoTvM_hg2]

FIRE SANTOS [https://secure.ngpvan.com/fMTZrjU2_UODnJYoTvM_hg2]

We all know George Santos is a con artist who has no business being in Congress. Every day, the newly uncovered falsehood feels more outlandish than the last. But Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans are deliberately turning a blind eye to Santos’ lies and deceit because they care more about their majority than holding him accountable.

So now it’s up to us. Let’s give Santos the numbers he needs to resign from Congress and restore some sanity in the GOP. Add your name to be one of the 142 people calling for his resignation. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/fMTZrjU2_UODnJYoTvM_hg2]

FIRE SANTOS [https://secure.ngpvan.com/fMTZrjU2_UODnJYoTvM_hg2]

Thank you.
— Team Swalwell

name: Team Cammack
subject: Send Agents to the Border, not the IRS
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014Wko6SuVcdx_HPEcHdjsgecZ5y9AD5HHTggan0hHKph8-LbpfwwQOnLmZs7Y0Ce8yKA5QWynoyD0976Fv44PoyCYQKeEkgimKH6zSiOpBTkOLh7rFW0UknYb30xS4NPW0CIN2xtvq-1gzB3lbZpeyA-G9kxcAir1TTOtJKMvH5tIDoF1es8NXi7DJxsFBN9XdJIcEw7HLQc=&c=mEuk07kLzcsRpFDNhMsmeWhjnFXPa76o6Y7HuLvpHKxuFlP7beRI0g==&ch=8lN7UE6bkaYf0-mgN-ZG3ffUc-SQAOViHZsMU6U3CqUADGpV3Pbpcw==)
---
| Friend
While our Southern Border becomes overrun with cartel crime and illegal immigration, Biden is spending $80 billion to expand the IRS and audit everyday Americans!
Clearly, Biden is too preoccupied with paying for his agenda, or he would realize that our border is America's greatest crisis.
When the Border Patrol has seized enough Fentanyl in one year to kill every man, woman, and child in America, we don't have an IRS problem... we have a border CRISIS!
---
| | [TELL CONGRESS: SEND AGENTS TO THE BORDER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014Wko6SuVcdx_HPEcHdjsgecZ5y9AD5HHTggan0hHKph8-LbpfwwQOnLmZs7Y0Ce8yKA5QWynoyD0976Fv44PoyCYQKeEkgimKH6zSiOpBTkOLh7rFW0UknYb30xS4NPW0CIN2xtvq-1gzB3lbZpeyA-G9kxcAir1TTOtJKMvH5tIDoF1es8NXi7DJxsFBN9XdJIcEw7HLQc=&c=mEuk07kLzcsRpFDNhMsmeWhjnFXPa76o6Y7HuLvpHKxuFlP7beRI0g==&ch=8lN7UE6bkaYf0-mgN-ZG3ffUc-SQAOViHZsMU6U3CqUADGpV3Pbpcw==)
---
| Border Patrol is doing the best they can to control the flood of immigrants and smugglers heading to our border, but without support, the job simply can't be done. If we want to ensure our nation is kept safe, we must send more agents to our border.
Kat and her Republican colleagues are fighting to end the border crisis, but with Biden and the Democrat controlled Senate in their way, Kat wants to hear from you. [Should Congress send 87,000 agents to the border?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014Wko6SuVcdx_HPEcHdjsgecZ5y9AD5HHTggan0hHKph8-LbpfwwQOnLmZs7Y0Ce8yKA5QWynoyD0976Fv44PoyCYQKeEkgimKH6zSiOpBTkOLh7rFW0UknYb30xS4NPW0CIN2xtvq-1gzB3lbZpeyA-G9kxcAir1TTOtJKMvH5tIDoF1es8NXi7DJxsFBN9XdJIcEw7HLQc=&c=mEuk07kLzcsRpFDNhMsmeWhjnFXPa76o6Y7HuLvpHKxuFlP7beRI0g==&ch=8lN7UE6bkaYf0-mgN-ZG3ffUc-SQAOViHZsMU6U3CqUADGpV3Pbpcw==)

body:
The Democrats are already eyeing 19 pickups.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225761:6FxhnKGEN:m:1:3331421248:449B4207240B2630D306A2E2FB8A41AD:r)
---
Peter,
---
Nancy Pelosi may no longer be speaker, but that doesn't mean she isn't still plotting to take back the majority from us next year.
---
**House Democrats ' main super PAC has _already_ listed 19 districts they're planning to spend MILLIONS to flip in 2024.**
---
After we won Texas' brand-new 38th district in 2022 - _1 of the 5 key pickups to secure our slim majority_ - Pelosi and her cronies immediately began gearing up to attack me once again with everything they've got.
---
**So as of 9 A.M. this morning, I instructed my team to officially launch our Conservative Majority Defense Fund to HOLD THE LINE.**
---

---

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >> $1,500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225766:6FxhnKGEN:m:1:3331421248:449B4207240B2630D306A2E2FB8A41AD:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225761:6FxhnKGEN:m:1:3331421248:449B4207240B2630D306A2E2FB8A41AD:r)
---

Over the last 2 election cycles, the Democrats' House Majority PAC has raked in more than **$340 million**.
---
This is what we're up against next year, Peter...
---
_... Radical socialists who have the funds at their disposal to attack us non-stop until Election Day 2024._
---
That's why I know we can't waste a single day in preparing for this fight.
---
But I'm counting on conservatives like YOU to help us go toe-to-toe with Pelosi and the Democrat's warchest.
---
_Last year, we won the districts that mattered most to reclaim the House, and with your help, I know we will do it again and DEFEND our new majority._
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my brand-new Conservative Majority Defense Fund to help me hold the line for our razor-thin majority - 500% MATCH active for the Fund's first 30 minutes. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225761:6FxhnKGEN:m:1:3331421248:449B4207240B2630D306A2E2FB8A41AD:r)
---

Thank you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62225761:6FxhnKGEN:m:1:3331421248:449B4207240B2630D306A2E2FB8A41AD:r)

Wesley Hunt

The days of increased spending en route to Zimbabwe Level Inflation are THROUGH!

NONE of these things would have gotten through if we had caved as the Establishment wanted!!!

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49f894515dc643adb6d57f24d1cf61a7&_e=3Nos-I6P3Lbtad0Pm_pvzGVqPyhJVchyv-3Jj9jrfsY9tL_5xbGHVVPI9eLhrPRU-HQokwsh3ilBUpQQZu3DaiKisegBhDVUmvf86A8io2GjyvMu5WjohUHcCYbOaJl7IY6ztn87OL3JWSvmlyiNb8uUk-yORtHXekG9-VEjybXvzddUqfy_5f6MkaH-camnXya7wNwZT6CWJ1rA4dM8BBzaXiT54hMgF9S6UOglfqH7naNRnrIaehOwOwgUd4XjG6b4QsSnrfPydJMSeFjVgGMny5BtlbRc-CiRIjt2bDHgiLBV0saeIjW0x5wM8YXh6gfbXn63aAIcnNGvJj74GZ-cuWbZBZo-UTaw_vbx49G414e00N3NshL8_JcyXqmlhwb9QhzSsQNUg27bI06ixMRhMQq7UX2BK7FB8530WGc%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49f894515dc643adb6d57f24d1cf61a7&_e=3Nos-I6P3Lbtad0Pm_pvzGVqPyhJVchyv-3Jj9jrfsY9tL_5xbGHVVPI9eLhrPRU-HQokwsh3ilBUpQQZu3DaiKisegBhDVUmvf86A8io2GjyvMu5WjohUHcCYbOaJl7IY6ztn87OL3JWSvmlyiNb8uUk-yORtHXekG9-VEjybXvzddUqfy_5f6MkaH-camnXya7wNwZT6CWJ1rA4dM8BBzaXiT54hMgF9S6UOglfqH7naNRnrIaehOwOwgUd4XjgxZKzF6bAj3zg8MSjh1OtlMgwwBDHNnkl3rm8FIWd7oyS-asM1vNzDI6QZhd5ZI9nBdZTVemFAhn-Jf8XSMrVUDdL9FJ_B8dSZLf49p5vQcNlYC-XaotyREEIW5hJTi1DnlQ56dwPaZRE4Rv1ACFvpLMJ1jFYmotPcQzUkpnqzs%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49f894515dc643adb6d57f24d1cf61a7&_e=3Nos-I6P3Lbtad0Pm_pvzGVqPyhJVchyv-3Jj9jrfsY9tL_5xbGHVVPI9eLhrPRU-HQokwsh3ilBUpQQZu3DaiKisegBhDVUmvf86A8io2GjyvMu5WjohUHcCYbOaJl7IY6ztn87OL3JWSvmlyiNb8uUk-yORtHXekG9-VEjybXvzddUqfy_5f6MkaH-camnXya7wNwZT6CWJ1rA4dM8BBzaXiT54hMgF9S6UOglfqH7naNRnrIaehOwOwgUd4XjXP7mxNciibZutgg3Ajw_xKz0wgTo59wRS3VJm8fxzMGyS3gX69zm-N8pcKU_NAe2YQYrgF5oh8N0W7FxrArTKmFktgFggnTeGuQe3dqCABNk5hfZ2ynbctq8dsGwIrfRXmEE8t3n-0whILEPNJ7QB3RYaZUj-MFzTUxFabrB4jU%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=49f894515dc643adb6d57f24d1cf61a7&_t=-6cn81yaeD5GjsC2H4puZQrwhI_HGQCeLxL3EDIk42Yh7Pv1cH2vxqhjMeNx6rhvulXY_bEv3lzrXHTYfWnXoPEjYLveJSqr1Yx1Jylsye7LO30Dl-siJM2rM4T8vZv5wO3di7ABbiMCfewLCQhopo4T7bEg_ocV_Zt92kPKD34%3D)

Team -- extremist lawmakers are plotting before the 2024 elections. These attempts are so they can tighten rules around absentee voting, giving these lawmakers power to prosecute election discrepancies. This is another unprincipled power grab by imposing voting changes and suppressing voters' access to the ballot box.
When A.G. Holder started this organization, we knew the impact of gerrymandering and how it allowed politicians to pick their voters instead of the other way around. So, these anti-democratic tactics come as no surprise.
**Here's what All On The Line is doing to champion voting accessibility and help ensure millions of people in this county have a say in their future:**
* **Organizing our volunteers** to take action in holding politicians accountable for decisions affecting the communities they serve.
* **Mobilizing our people power** to ensure that voters have the knowledge and resources they need to make informed decisions within their constitutional rights.
* **Engaging the public** as we prepare for redraws in states where gerrymandered maps persist and restrict voting accessibility.
* And more!

Voter suppression is an emergency. And we won't take any of these attempts from power-hungry lawmakers lightly. **[Take action. Join our movement in championing voting accessibility and make a donation to All On The Line today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57516015/388238237/39773360?refcode=20230119_AOTL_F_votingaccess_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwMTgwNzVmLTI3OTgtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aHGZtw6y46AGTS4ql8PKSoeyypH7hrorrzaO10XgRVQ=)**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Add your name to tell my colleagues you want further action to tackle climate change in 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
To see our planet as this majestic blue ball floating in the blackness of space is breathtaking.
#

Friends —
Looking at Earth from space is remarkable and hard to describe. To see our planet as this majestic blue ball floating in the blackness of space is breathtaking. It’s truly the most amazing thing I’ve seen.
But when you look more closely at Earth, you start to notice some of our planet’s scars. As a former astronaut, I’m often asked about the climate and damage to our planet. My response often surprises people:_“Don’t worry about the planet. Earth will be just fine. What you need to worry about is all of us.”_
But right now, Washington isn’t doing enough. Failure to tackle climate change comes with a price we will all have to pay in the years and generations ahead.
Most climate scientists believe time is running out if we are to prevent irreparable damage to our planet.
That means there is no time to lose.
2023 must be the year we take more action on climate. I’m committed to making that happen. Please let my colleagues know you agree:
[**Sign my petition: Tell my colleagues you believe 2023 must be the year we take further action to save our planet and tackle climate change.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/climate_change_petition_230119/?source=em230119-1-7&refcode2=4902.6688874.td36nj&akid=4902%2E6688874%2Etd36nj)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/climate_change_petition_230119/?source=em230119-1-7&refcode2=4902.6688874.td36nj&akid=4902%2E6688874%2Etd36nj)**
Make no mistake, our planet is sending us a message. We can’t ignore it, and I can guarantee you it isn’t going to fix itself.
All my best,
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=4902%2E6688874%2Etd36nj).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

However, this is a look at what is to come in the next few weeks and months as the Republican party goes against the will of voters who, by a vast majority, support abortion. We knew this was coming, and now, it is playing out before us. House Republicans, and Kevin McCarthy in particular, have learned nothing from voters wholeheartedly rejecting their so-called “red wave” in 2022. As one of the few frontline races that Republicans fought hard trying to flip, we need to begin preparing for 2024 now. clean_body: The dysfunctional GOP is trying to ban abortion at the federal level ALREADY. | | It took over a dozen votes for Kevin McCarthy to finally become Speaker, but he earned this new position by giving the most extreme members of his party exactly what they want. We're now entering an era in which a few extremists have an outlandish amount of power in the House. They wasted no time getting to pushing their extreme agenda. The newly Republican-controlled House kicked off its session with a series of votes including two anti-abortion measures, which will surely fail in the Senate. However, this is a look at what is to come in the next few weeks and months as the Republican party goes against the will of voters who, by a vast majority, support abortion. We knew this was coming, and now, it is playing out before us. House Republicans, and Kevin McCarthy in particular, have learned nothing from voters wholeheartedly rejecting their so-called “red wave” in 2022. As one of the few frontline races that Republicans fought hard trying to flip, we need to begin preparing for 2024 now. Two years of this dysfunction, extremism, and blatant disregard for the will of the American people are more than enough. We MUST flip the House back to blue in 2024, and CT-05 will no doubt be one of the closest races in the country once again. = | = = \-- Team Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: Tom Fitton
subject: A Very Critical Time for Judicial Watch!
body:
If you have already made a contribution to support Judicial Watch in 2023 thank you!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

_Thank you for your commitment to upholding the rule of law_. Our shared commitment means a great deal to all of us at Judicial Watch as we confront our biggest, and I believe _most important_ set of challenges in our 29-year history.
In fact, we are carrying perhaps our most consequential caseload ever...and [that means we must absolutely count on concerned Americans, like you, to join with us at this critical time!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61828&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61828&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)
---

Our caseload includes vital investigations and lawsuits protecting the integrity of our elections, fighting for accountability from corrupt politicians, and exposing and stopping **Critical Race Theory** propaganda. As they say, these are very big deals...so I am turning to you today for your help.

**[Can I count on you to make a contribution to Judicial Watch today?](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61828&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61828&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)
---

Over the years Judicial Watch has learned how to use the legal system to force the release of documents the American people have a right to see. And not surprisingly, federal agency heads appointed by Joe Biden and secretive, Deep State government bureaucrats at all levels are fighting our lawful open records requests.

But now, the pace of our work and calls for legal and investigative assistance we're receiving from around the country are _accelerating_. Many patriotic citizens and honest public officials are seeking Judicial Watch's help to enforce the rule of law.

_In short, demands on us are at an all-time high_.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61828&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)
---

I'm particularly concerned about newly emerging threats to honest elections, border security, our "right to know" the facts about government's response to Covid-19, the spread of **Critical Race Theory** and other extreme woke programs in our schools and other public institutions...and whether we can trust the Biden Justice Department's investigation into classified documents found at a Washington office that President Biden used before his election, and in _two_ locations at his home in Wilmington, Delaware!

Clearly, there is much _more_ work to do to combat voter fraud, address the illegal immigration crisis, fight for your right to know what our government is up to, and fight for accountability from our nation's highest elected official.

_**[And we need additional help to get these jobs done...and done right_.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61828&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61828&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)
---

**_Judicial Watch is the one conservative and "rule of law" institution in
__Washington that Americans can rely on to stand firm for our Republic_.**

And with your help today, I'm certain we _can_ meet these new challenges.

We are conservative...we are independent...we hold Democrat politicians, Republican politicians _and_ secretive government bureaucrats accountable to the rule of law...and _we are fighting for you_!

**Thank you!**

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

Benefits for helping out.

**Rally Against Censorship** event

**When:**
January 26th, 2023 at 6pm

Eschibit Hall 2
9333 Airport Rd

Conroe, TX 77303

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 11 years in prison for defending his son?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | |
---
| | Dear Friend,I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges.Please let me explain.In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately.**With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court.[**Can I count on your best, tax-deductible gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._vmZ3VbAXivxQlqKFQ) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor.He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in vulgar and aggressive ways**.Mark defended his son and himself against the escort, after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse.The escort then wanted Mark prosecuted for assault and battery, despite Mark acting of self-defense and defense of his son, but the State Courts in Philadelphia threw out the case.Instead of the matter ending there, Joe Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...**_and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._**We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this.**Mark's trial is set to begin on January 24th** , so we're running out of time.[**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in** \- ** by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._scEKpC8-UA05oXXQ3TBoQ)Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith.The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out.Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us.My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck.We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible.Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution.[**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more......because time is of the essence.We're expecting that Mark's defense may cost us as much as hundreds of thousands of dollars, as the Justice Department is out for blood and targeting Mark with its vast resources, all at taxpayer expense.To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn.So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can.[**Please don't delay in sending your tax-deductible donations to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._7sCU9_TMCw) I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him.Again, the January 24th trial date is FAST approaching, so please don't hesitate!I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense fund of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
[**DONATE
**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---

name: Barbara Lee
subject: I want you to hear this from me directly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8f3ZYLnF7jEnTKaXzAQnWSkLNHzuvInHOuNqaH9R1pa9zGOWr10m3CFE_DdpHPKoz9RGmkQXUuFqtrPo6muKW3SZX-YTfAxH3SffhpVx80d_P97QpONeW1oBwnAB4MwVm7mIyTtGqahCEFnTPp-3OJcMwHeOgXyv-6jbflCCU4fQuAH7me10_vp53wxqJ9bzYCeI2UOHYoykjUuRM9k7v1Lho1vspixk1xNg6JehBvlWpafFt1nDlGpLnAzI6n1hTZ8vSaoGo9e8TvosCGWa84i7PyaglpDeraywmhnEUayCaZUVOL-oJ9QBbpPfbJbcFw/3sz/0-PUJtCYThi5UJxX0sL8Dw/h0/FSC4w0idtRX-SNwJmKq_q43R0w-HRtuQ9kPF7H3Fon8) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAfdTtMfM7A9xP0dRoRICHomEkjEb8-r08tMQKsl7VZ4L3-xetlryan7EjwHLdDeQecWO-KahbAiYsCR5lQtnsZNsisF2LCyy044maybKF2ZdEvQj0rSMAeDIlV1XoRj1LI_mYUNRn4FnX7oJSMxzh81GHsWQ29R0r4G_92RnGizW2QWpYDOwBMRH2vrODOYpiRHOqA5CGZUKFWoaEK_3mvlUZGCv86XRq8vSnR1YsLJ94YGkh8pQMKxCGuevmXAu4LoTEf4zAn6XXH1Ia3puLhlgzYwC6-HDxmmBN4aACDay-jlBiVA3ikc9uQg7Zsbf1uFOaKKoeIY0x43_sKV8r7o_F_lcJd-GIxjrn8HiPOl4/3sz/0-PUJtCYThi5UJxX0sL8Dw/h1/18vmMLGf4e_jq-gJocyrzPIwt4O-WzmquaXhkHZgUqw)

Peter,

**During my time in Congress, I've fought tirelessly to make peace, justice and equality a reality for _all_ people across our country.** But my drive to help my community didn't start in Congress. It comes from the very beginning.

It comes from growing up in segregated El Paso, Texas — where my sisters and I were the only Black kids at our Catholic school. It comes from working alongside the local NAACP to integrate my cheerleading squad at San Fernando High School. It comes from trailblazers like Shirley Chisholm, the first African American woman elected to Congress, who inspired me to vote for the first time and who later became a mentor and friend.

And it's this activism that has driven my career in public service, from my time as a community advocate to the California State Legislature and then on to the halls of Congress. I've never stopped fighting to build a state and a country that works for every single person — no matter what zip code you come from. And I never will.

But the challenges our country is facing need bold, progressive solutions. We need to tackle the climate crisis so that we leave the planet better than we found it, not worse. We need to increase access to raise the minimum wage and pass pro-union policies so that working families can thrive. We need to secure and expand our civil liberties — from reproductive freedom to voting rights — so that we can build a progressive future that works for everyone.

Now, as I reflect on how I can best continue this fight, I want you to hear this from me personally: **I told my colleagues I'm exploring a run for Senate and asked for their support. And now I am asking you for yours.**

**If I’m going to become the only African American woman serving in the Senate, I'll need the strongest possible grassroots team behind me. That's why I'm personally asking you, Peter:[If you're with me in this fight, will you split $10 or more between my campaign and The Collective PAC to join Team Lee and help me build a progressive future for us all? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAfdTtMfM7A9xP0dRoRICHomEkjEb8-r08tMQKsl7VZ4L3-xetlryan7EjwHLdDeQecWO-KahbAiYsCR5lQtnsZMzLAfhHpi_4yrDOWFGV8wfezkNDnnsTvx29R8-SWcBshjITYITXzD6GPCfXDk7qId5YVjX_YhlpcoUK8YvxRe6uRa1_c1UtmXMkAFaBzA5E_ew1HE_BH_4cgOR9Y53CZ9GagVjos4UOk8v-YtrtyVAsyN9C4Ty3uHlgDmUHuQ8T7mpDhgbqNyCcIAETfd_3-vRjrDYIKWCVr2u3MpNoa9DugKUSVZdU9PilSERo2XJ48CVrv8fFM8RolPDzwcItuT_vBi4fi3fLJsbHFlfhTE8/3sz/0-PUJtCYThi5UJxX0sL8Dw/h2/eD24CgX4gzGr1kwT9nKQMpj8iZK8NjXVHIZAUKtVXTU) ** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC.

| | NEGOP Unicameral Update "2ND HOUSE ACTION ALERT"Thursday, JANUARY 18, 2023
---
| | Senator Kathleen Kauth put forth two gender-related bills; one that bans gender change treatments for minors and another that prevents biological males from competing in female sports, as well as ensuring biological males and females use their own bathrooms and locker rooms. Democrat Senator Megan Hunt immediately filed motions to indefinitely postpone the bills citing "Rule 6/ sec 3" calling them attacks against "Civil Rights". Senator Kauth and the NEGOP ask for your SUPPORT of these 2 bills NOW ! [LB 574 ](https://www.ne.gop/so/f4ON8Aot7/c?w=pv8-KbnVNIR7q2k6_Y4OgEqNpVWgRP4x8wtpMCMoPVQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9GbG9vckRvY3MvMTA4L1BERi9JbnRyby9MQjU3NC5wZGYiLCJyIjoiNjljNWI3NmEtODQ5Mi00MjVjLTk2OTUtMTJlZTlkZGE1ZDM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)(CLICK BILL NUMBER FOR FULL DETAILS) Let Them GrowIntroduced by Kauth, 31; Aguilar, 35; Albrecht, 17; Bostelman, 23; Brewer, 43; Clements, 2; DeKay, 40; Dorn, 30; Dover, 19; Erdman, 47; Halloran, 33; Hardin, 48; Holdcroft, 36; Hughes, 24; Ibach, 44; Jacobson, 42; Linehan, 39; Lippincott, 34; Lowe, 37; McDonnell, 5; Murman, 38; Sanders, 45; von Gillern, 4. LB 574 – Let Them GrowThis bill prevents irreversible, often dangerous surgeries, hormones and puberty blockers from use by youth under 19 years of age. Research has shown that a vast majority of youths who experience transgender thinking desist as they mature. Suicide rates for those who have undergone sex-reassignment surgery rose to 20 times that of comparable peers. This bill gives these youth the time and space to address their mental health concerns. [LB 575 ](https://www.ne.gop/so/f4ON8Aot7/c?w=DCtcQYj9BjAKo1r5uIYxuQHZ9ZCfF4P8wphJjR7VY3Y.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9GbG9vckRvY3MvMTA4L1BERi9JbnRyby9MQjU3NS5wZGYiLCJyIjoiNjljNWI3NmEtODQ5Mi00MjVjLTk2OTUtMTJlZTlkZGE1ZDM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)(CLICK BILL NUMBER FOR FULL DETAILS) Sports and SpacesIntroduced by Kauth, 31; Aguilar, 35; Albrecht, 17; Ballard, 21; Bostelman, 23; Brandt, 32; Brewer, 43; Briese, 41; Clements, 2; DeKay, 40; Dorn, 30; Dover, 19; Erdman, 47; Halloran, 33; Hansen, B., 16; Hardin, 48; Holdcroft, 36; Hughes, 24; Ibach, 44; Jacobson, 42; Linehan, 39; Lippincott, 34; Lowe, 37; McDonnell, 5; Murman, 38; Riepe, 12; Sanders, 45; von Gillern, 4. LB 575 – Sports and SpacesThis bill ensures the privacy and dignity of all students in K-12, and it maintains the rights of female athletes to compete on a level playing field. This bill also ensures that BIOLOGICAL males and females use their own bathrooms and locker rooms. Actions Needed:
1. Encourage your Senator to be a co-sponsor! (if not listed).
2. So why is this happening?| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57502824/388198371/1060786640?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTRmNTcyYS0wYjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1iNSuRhO70EdKnDnK-Wmwkf_MwxJwj0Z4eTuB5sTTJE=)

| | Friend, today the United States government will hit the debt ceiling, and begin implementing extraordinary measures to avoid default. This is incredibly dangerous, and is completely preventable. **So why is this happening?** **Ask House Republicans.**
---
[STAND WITH US](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57502825/388198372/1060786640?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTRmNTcyYS0wYjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1iNSuRhO70EdKnDnK-Wmwkf_MwxJwj0Z4eTuB5sTTJE=)
---
| | **Kevin McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor Greene and their MAGA friends in the House have decided to use increasing the debt ceiling as leverage to try and force cuts to Social Security benefits for seniors and other Americans.
** **They're content to risk devastating our economy to cut benefits that Americans have spent their lives paying into._It's irresponsible, it's dangerous and it's an insight into what the Republican Party has become: a tool to enact policies that benefit the top 1% while hurting working families._** **We know that the overwhelming majority of Americans support protecting Social Security benefits from ANY cuts, and as the top Democrat on the House Budget Committee, know that my colleagues and I will NEVER give an inch on this issue.
** **While we resist Republican efforts in the House to cut benefits now, long term, the only way to end this threat to our economy and Social Security cuts is to take back our House Democratic majority next year and to end this debt ceiling dysfunction once and for all.
**
---
[STAND WITH US](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57502827/388198373/1060786640?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTRmNTcyYS0wYjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1iNSuRhO70EdKnDnK-Wmwkf_MwxJwj0Z4eTuB5sTTJE=)
---
That's where I need your help. I'm working to help recruit and financially support candidates in swing districts to beat MAGA Republicans in 2024, _but to help our candidates win, I need your support._
Thanks for standing with us in this fight.
Congressman Brendan Boyle
