name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 kangaroo court seals records for 30 to 50 years!
body:
Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS! [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7879%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=ZsRpT6G4ouGde1u9cfhavA&sysid=1)
Yes, you read that right - the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS! | | | [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92130%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hi1Auyq2w%2f21kwNNUIXelg&sysid=1)
|
---

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92131%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iiaD9ahGm3JxAQZJv6zbqQ&sysid=1) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.

**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92132%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RaEebqYfULU1psClFs9iNA&sysid=1) **The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public.”_

**Yes, you read that right - the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.

** They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they’re trying to bury that evidence until everyone they’ve falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms - especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!

** And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.

**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92132%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RaEebqYfULU1psClFs9iNA&sysid=1) Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.

**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92132%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RaEebqYfULU1psClFs9iNA&sysid=1) Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, it’s been two years since the fake insurrection on January 6 ...and the real reign of terror launched by Biden and his lawless FBI and DOJ on Trump supporters and peaceful protesters. **

[**Please help me fight for them in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92133%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5tUVlEADzVuC1ihUEi1ecg&sysid=1)

They want to bury: • Videos from police body cameras, • Videos from on-site security cameras, • Videos from countless smart phones, • Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement, • And so much more. Why? Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful. They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble. They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building. They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie. So, they’re trying to bury that evidence until everyone they’ve falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age. This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms - especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured. That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court. I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray. Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation. Thank you so much! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, it’s been two years since the fake insurrection on January 6 ...and the real reign of terror launched by Biden and his lawless FBI and DOJ on Trump supporters and peaceful protesters. | * (C) 2023 American Backers 8111 S US Highway 75, Suite 75 Sherman, TX 75091 Material Connection Disclosure: The sender of this email may receive compensation for the advertising contained in this message. name: Giffords
subject: Our hope vs. the gun lobby’s fear
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The only way we can keep moving forward in the fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence is through hope.
#

Fear. It’s a message that gun lobby groups have been selling to the American people for decades. Fear of people who don't look like you. Fear of people who don't believe the same things you do. Fear of the government. And the only way to alleviate that fear is to buy guns—and lots of them.
But the NRA and other gun lobby groups have one mission, and it’s not to keep Americans safe. It’s to sell more guns.
While the gun lobby uses fear-mongering tactics to rile up their base, we want to focus on hope.
We hope for a future where we can freely go about our lives without the fear of gunfire.
We hope for a future where our children are safe at school.
We hope for a future where people feel secure in their places of worship, in their grocery stores, in their shopping malls, in their movie theaters.
The only way we can keep moving forward in this fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence is through hope. And that hope starts with you and your support of Giffords.
[**If you can, please make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC today. The only way we can stand up to the gun lobby’s large sums of money is through the support of grassroots donors like you.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230119-1-15&t=1&akid=4060%2E3935704%2EIzYh15)

Can we count on your donation (of any amount) to protect abortion rights here in North Carolina?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57524155/388253172/435245919?refcode=ea.89e0ac40-3698-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.89e0ac40-3698-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWUwYWM0MC0zNjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kqaF7LKbxc37MA4LZ1m028vcpn2fbCXKdg49SwZrmLo=)** Believe it or not, 24 states have banned abortion or are expected to do so in 2023. Several more are planning to heavily restrict its access. **North Carolina could soon be on that list.** Republicans in the State Senate now hold a veto-proof majority. That means they hold enough power to push through any piece of EXTREME anti-choice legislation that could devastate millions of people in our state. They fell one seat short of a veto-proof majority in the State House. That means if any Democrat has to miss session because they’re sick or anything else comes up, Republicans could ram through a veto override. Roy is working hard to protect abortion access for North Carolinians and anyone who comes to our state. But he needs our help. Republican lawmakers won’t stop their assault on reproductive freedom until they strip every last bit of access to it. **We cannot let them win.** **[We need to know you’re with us, Peter. Roy is working hard to protect abortion access for North Carolinians and anyone who comes to our state. But he needs our help. Republican lawmakers won’t stop their assault on reproductive freedom until they strip every last bit of access to it. We cannot let them win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= = = = = Let’s get to work, Team Cooper **=** **=** Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Why Are Some Evagelical Leaders NOT Supporting Trump? | This Is The Most Important Interview I Have Done...
body:
What's Up With Evangelical Leaders & Trump? The Establishment Media is having a field day right now because some prominent Evangelical Leaders are re
| | |
---
## What's Up With Evangelical Leaders & Trump?
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10000.1.0c5c7b8904bea4bb0b582b7e5960ba81)
---
The **Establishment Media** is having a field day right now because some _prominent_ **Evangelical Leaders** are refusing to support **Donald Trump** for POTUS in 2024.
Why is that the case and why is this a major problem?
Today, I was invited to join the _GREAT_ **David Broady** on **Real America's Voice News** and break all this down.
I believe **this is by far the most important interview** I have done so far.
Please listen to it and then share it!
Click here: [https://youtu.be/wA-i5wasguU](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10001.1.b78dcff21f72d5b3e97a76a7ff86c001)
| | [ Lahmeyer Interview On RAV ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10002.1.afc5ec224242a0f024ad2865dd217c44)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10003.1.0d8110f22e00423b91d9a22d4afbb952)
---
**I want to personally invite you** to join me for February's National Prayer Zoom Call hosted by [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10004.1.a292f7f8bcb268979ab09cbf3b4255dc) with special guest **Roger Stone**.
**Roger Stone** is a seasoned political operative, speaker, pundit, and New York Times Bestselling Author featured in the Netflix documentary ‘ _Get Me Roger Stone_.’
A veteran of ten national presidential campaigns, he served as a senior campaign aide to three Republican presidents: **Nixon** , **Reagan** , and **Trump**.
Mr. Stone will provide us with **insights** and **updates** regarding the 2024 race for the White House.
We will have Pastors from across the nation lead us in a time of prayer and I believe it is important for you to join us.
This National Prayer Call is not just for Pastors only but for believers across America. Therefore, encourage others to join in!
You can register at [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10005.1.f18bb39027fb770abef7758b372052ae) and when you register an email will be sent to you prior to the Zoom Conference Call with the link and details of how to join.
The National Prayer Call will take place on Monday, February 6 at 7:30pm EST.
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10006.1.c4d04ed8ed9506b7312a57b5a944f4ab), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10007.1.a4262b826823330ba6becaf84f3f2720), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10008.1.fbe149a7aa74cbbdaa6fb3baf83b7ed6), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10009.1.ad8f9c449d27317d54ef2a321cfef64a), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10010.1.9abbb9c9756c1c0bafec141f5eb84a4f) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10011.1.136dbe18a37ed68139eb570420c43472)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10012.1.0720f5f4493a595ac9393e326e56bd4d)
| | [ Join February's National Prayer Call ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10013.1.ad7657c5aac4a89b1fbe798ffce94c7d)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10014.1.c2b6353b1af1e5ef788797cb7dc7dac4)
---
Recently, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10015.1.c10084112054c2c935a6dcf7926f4748) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10016.1.55946a99936be9525cbafe564a69491c)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10017.1.e815e1951cbabf1519982621ac707361) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10018.1.d1e320f6c3c3be2782f312a2d31bb8ed) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10019.1.d7b9c6ab5a3f4255db51f8b0f24da915) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10020.1.b3f5ecbe355c0e5c5fb4313ca90051eb) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10021.1.a9b2e5b2a8d5d07da45a00b0eeeafde9) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10022.1.691fa2a854f70e5bd6f61945eb961e2f) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
---
---
## Mike Lindell Needs Our Help!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10023.1.22cc4bfc01d206b14470ea66b27aa954)
---
I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships with great America First leaders such as **Mike Lindell**.
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10024.1.b70cce045603ff60168fba0126c48420), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and now his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10025.1.9bd2e5675bbd450802d5783bc9284e32).
I want to encourage you to visit [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10026.1.288006a9561603592670a1c83c471b49) and look at all of the great America First products available (much more than just great pillows).
We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.
Use the Promo Code **JACKSON** at checkout to save up to 66% while shopping at [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10027.1.1ab08169c0143c07b42cb35c6d538637)
Kendra and I love all of our [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17089956.10028.1.02d71d0d0cc7b837f9002bdb16c32fc0) products and we TOTALLY support Mike Lindell! I hope you will too...

_Meku! Our January pause has been deeply healing and restoring. We're grateful for the support of our community and coalition as we've slowed down and stepped back._ _Here are some important updates from_ _our frontline partners:_
---
Tell the U.S. Forest Service: Don't destroy public forests for Mountain Valley Pipeline **** The U.S. Forest Service broke 11 of its own conservation rules governing old-growth forests, scenic viewsheds, soil health and more to accommodate one project — the Mountain Valley Pipeline. But, the agency’s permission for MVP to cut through the protected Jefferson National Forest was revoked by the courts two separate times — in 2018 and in 2022. **** Now, the agency is trying to rewrite that same permit for the MVP and has opened a new public comment period. Your help is needed to tell the U.S. Forest Service there should be no special exceptions for this harmful project. Changing the rules for corporate profit is NOT acceptable. **** [Please send your comment to the Forest Service to say NO to destroying public lands!](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQusZewhglcaHHXqSpLEjlAfgSyVMDeHptG2aklT8gncuqwjFWmklNgLTfVqbqFux-U6B1D_Ih6h-6mjPLWV8fJkknluZId6qILrMb-brs8144gObQZD8-H3-H5ReXviVW27-bi84jxxoRiA0R2rD99dCCY9Kh4uU0psljMcCllc9cVBavgNFIWYucQcC7JSQ463h-gkiVxRA8-U6XIOQBGJtuqMa0xbJ6kBf0NbUmD40xZ_tOWzQCo-x9isHQI3u0ULuR-JYhCHSyKCsdjRclvx74AtwPAAbc-giUrSaA_XbkiYohMq_1GeaMpiFJCv0nWCtWLcuWTGWkS09zZ6oC1eJtNZd2Yokvop5KdV2asU8lQURHGvTHhDgXVXtejsXkW71i3Qucko84-vr2gZlrqQm0_MH7jnpTeRSUhmk3oNQZL4vt1RpPfXA-1islWpbWPFyKJS0TPdX-VzVDXcVbCZiwhsmubc5-JTqSwnRCyWbZ5opDBeGUh_i1dM3NAEdLkUK1As8Fz3v30X7pdctF2BGjJFM9pgFEIl7Mg4Kabxqv-3K0tuCCuLoI3Kw0FXEA4xSV1nnjcXHA-agpeSRzoFrRAKjf-JVNkGSowh_glmySYdjjpwxZ0EKQ5R6Ox2Uc63x7gDQnqYsuCsWad5P9VOesIYPv3nL_RKkpPXsIEcSHJKpMQtMzIGREfLw5jhhkJrOmwj4g4z8R3AlLtA5iM74IPr5CZKTzFgPNz5TNRIv-tAGgbEfxItqXqyEpKRhlkzCNNo-1Dzp_MJ947e_fJK8ph_OoXJLR0RdzCOQTW-QL5kSa87SXy2nJje2dtA1ho69eC8IsP7wvgEl_b7oKShfyGpfoqnjxwPJwiLUyZcZ5DQLeLc_dovoDbZGLj0lm9nPj_JQxGz0JrNh_g3zKr1xr_D-yb4PTaGs5mI2aJ8nmU0jx4G47UcXirvpXBWT981Mz5pt606yRLTh1Ycmn5yTOHlSgAPW5SeFD2d4C7xv/3sz/svJyomq-SDGRWPa_wCsIwg/h1/FhKxkmRlLhj0FjO2yUa5Ge-fLwlURLCzwu4ljWE6mJQ) After you take this action, you’ll see a link with information about the U.S. Army Corps stream-crossing permit that MVP is also seeking. clean_body: Get updated and join us in taking action against MVP | | Meku! Our January pause has been deeply healing and restoring. We're grateful for the support of our community and coalition as we've slowed down and stepped back. Here are some important updates from our frontline partners: Tell the U.S. Forest Service: Don't destroy public forests for Mountain Valley Pipeline ** The U.S. Forest Service broke 11 of its own conservation rules governing old-growth forests, scenic viewsheds, soil health and more to accommodate one project — the Mountain Valley Pipeline. But, the agency’s permission for MVP to cut through the protected Jefferson National Forest was revoked by the courts two separate times — in 2018 and in 2022. Now, the agency is trying to rewrite that same permit for the MVP and has opened a new public comment period. Your help is needed to tell the U.S. Forest Service there should be no special exceptions for this harmful project. Changing the rules for corporate profit is NOT acceptable. After you take this action, you’ll see a link with information about the U.S. Army Corps stream-crossing permit that MVP is also seeking. Take the next step and tell them to deny the 404 permit! | REJECT MVP COMMENT WRITING PARTY JAN 25 at 7pm ONLINE In this webinar, you'll learn: how and where to submit comments pointers on how to make your comments most effective ideas about the subjects and issues that should be addressed where you can get more information and help if you need it | | Graphic by Angel Garcia JAN 20 Joye Braun Day of Action ** Tomorrow, Jan 20th will be a day of action in honor of Joye Braun, a true warrior and force of nature. In Joye’s words, we are demanding that President Biden “Be a climate warrior not a wimp. Trump is now _one step closer_ to answering for his actions that led to the violent attack on the Capitol -- but now that they're in power, House Republicans are doing everything they can to protect the disgraced former president!

We URGENTLY need to know where Americans stand on holding Trump accountable. **Please answer our EMERGENCY Live Poll before it closes at midnight -- we need 15 more responses from Pennsylvania:**

name: Representative Gregg Johnson
subject: Hi, I'm Gregg 👋
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Peter, Gregg is a fighter. | | | Hi Peter, My name is Gregg Johnson and I represent Illinois House District 72 in Western Illinois. I am a labor leader with over 40 years under my belt of advocating for working families. I ran for office because I wanted to see Rock Island County get the investment it deserves. Like many small towns across America, many of us have felt left behind. The UAW job that put food on my family’s table growing up was gone. I want to help make Western Illinois the best it can be and that is why I am proud to join the Advisory Board of United Rural Democrats. Last week, I was sworn into my first term as a member of the Illinois General Assembly and I can say I have seen United Rural Democrats’ work in action. URD’s President, Joe Shepherd, was my campaign manager. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gco_dNvHp8mOPHN_ybwdRCyNBMvfwtUVb6XZG8FMWEky4Wx1Duq61JX9igmH9zqafw2p4sLKZR4uGwOYrJ5S8VSC3tt38Ku9-Fn7R-7d4I6Ki8vsuoOGXTm1hSAbJcqtQWIt8JJRWyiACvT9LjnwKO-bnK9CKaSUgam3n3mV9W0y21nsv70GdBTIJfsx7qTALZKWPVpYrt4m8k66Cn4NLK7M-ewHl1ix8W7UbFjP3WapUttrY_0J1jxfsOUFObP5nzB1H6yPHJ7fJSEE3lLhY8G9wqkntgizIAYW5IpG8765w/3sz/BOJzC7ukSgWdAkUdJb5BYQ/h0/2imfkeyhyNISCyG-mWLKIs20v5TldHtLSd89834ra2o) Together, Joe and I knocked on every single door in my district, over 26,000 in total. Thanks to our hard work, I was elected with over 60% of the vote, outpacing 2020 despite the tougher year. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gco_dNvHp8mOPHN_ybwdRCyNBMvfwtUVb6XZG8FMWEky5P_ZgMlAJRkzVl540bVPB68e0OKlv42RRPcStyvf2A7LWd6oPFd0lSdPxGLgJ-lWTOTnbTm25jt-L2RdrAhX4ppuXUDCmU517S9LJFKS9-X1T5r_s1SUsf5PoTefX17Vmj03IxE88pve4EHjhMBiNCFKzMew03MFgDZnRcRbdaWai-JGJY1cNyavJnYEs0YIT6UumBXCLbjHbQR9zy08dKmuNWWR9D9-2C1NSZjIWH02RX2531G_3_W5tJyS_kxv0/3sz/BOJzC7ukSgWdAkUdJb5BYQ/h1/Faqo4wOrqQvHsh-h_XBYIrLmGdW6OH1jY91hcLHipRs) We won big because we ran on our values, like women’s reproductive rights and worker’s rights. We didn’t shy away from who we were as Democrats. People here want a better future for their kids and I know small towns across Illinois and America can have a second golden age with the right leaders in office. **[Like many small town Democrats, my district is never safe from a Republican takeover. We need to recruit more candidates who want to make their homes the best they can be and invest in races to pull of important victories at every level of government. Help us carry out that mission at United Rural Democrats.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gco_dNvHp8mOPHN_ybwdRCyNBMvfwtUVb6XZG8FMWEky5PpJLPlWMFehPKvSQkQcnxBiO9OPbA5WxOAQvGIB1JJFwJd5diwkDOrm3mirTKonDaWxygnjxcQRfqgrdk1gXlgSKjW16iA5YoWY9IUb0Y6FPCy7raGvoWPQDPeKozBrrCLCX-T4RsmLDt2GTnmre1493-weL4NRNg3rNodhv_VG0GYFsuWRRta9ZilcuS9NftAPGhDaiXPgDgWcXXzS2qeFDIw-6g0CNMsnlAf42kxFzZTUzeVOUGBYuLhgeM_hQ/3sz/BOJzC7ukSgWdAkUdJb5BYQ/h2/qBEW3rFLryBBIP8gTpfJTDA5swX-zbJ5wwer2iIuL1E)** **[Chip in](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gco_dNvHp8mOPHN_ybwdRCyNBMvfwtUVb6XZG8FMWEky6UjKLDN0HVyfKtbSdEb4ElnOqC3hnElGTTBuPw5peFEZKvYNFtmMHg5uIhAKvA3mRlAHc__cAVNkAgFxzLtt84mNVuayC_Oiune8Q_UEpHlIOpenq99ZjqBwia-QViBkjv3eZkH3UOgNQAuvTO0hOqTTtpELsJJUAGwQif3MnzZlDFVGMQ_XrR_PRD90Sn5ODpVXgmvahud4NILAVODAh8AGrtYhyWryKOKq5hk5AN3aOphC-KJUG4z_Iq-7Bof1Q/3sz/BOJzC7ukSgWdAkUdJb5BYQ/h3/FU0JDk2TGaYgQb5pjPw2UAeTw3ytgbGIEOm-D1XfCiY)** Thank you, Peter! – Rep. name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: I need your endorsement, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
---
| | | Peter, I was just sworn in as House Democratic Leader – and what I need more than anything right now is your personal endorsement.

[**Will you sign on to officially endorse me before midnight? It would mean so much to me.**

**_BEFORE MIDNIGHT: I’m personally asking you to be one of the 10,000 Democrats I need to sign your name, lend me your endorsement, and help me prove we have what it takes to flip the House and deliver for the American people. If we don’t kick this year off with a huge show of support, extreme MAGA Republicans will use it to their advantage. I won’t let that happen. Can I count on you to have my back with a quick signature before midnight? >>_**

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Milford, CT 06460
United States
clean_body: | = By now, you know Katie Porter. After being elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2018, she has shown as much courage as anyone we have ever seen, and her public cross-examinations of special interests (featuring her famous whiteboard) have been must-see TV. Katie honed her understanding of right and wrong through years of public service teaching law at the University of Iowa and the University of California-Irvine. From Trump's appointed postmaster general to Big Pharma executives, Katie has impressed us as much as any member of Congress over the last few years with how she's held public figures accountable. = = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = We need Katie working for Californians, someone who values the work public service professionals do on the outside—and an unabashed fighter for our progressive values on the inside. It’s the reason Trump took office, and it let him nearly stage a coup in 2021!
Luckily, Democrats like Pete Buttigieg, Amy Klobuchar, and Robert Reich are trying to ABOLISH the Electoral College once and for all!

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: I’m taking on the cartels
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Mexican Cartels are a menace to our national security and your community’s safety.

They’re not just disorganized bands of thugs - they’re paramilitary groups that are running the chaos at our Southern border and defeating Mexico’s own military forces.

**The cartels’ destruction is seeping into our country - and ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.**

**I’m introducing an Authorization for the Use of Military Force to allow our military to go on the offense of the cartels infiltrating our communities through the Southern border.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, Mexican Cartels are a menace to our national security and your community’s safety. They’re not just disorganized bands of thugs - they’re paramilitary groups that are running the chaos at our Southern border and defeating Mexico’s own military forces. The cartels’ destruction is seeping into our country - and ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. I’m introducing an Authorization for the Use of Military Force to allow our military to go on the offense of the cartels infiltrating our communities through the Southern border. These cartels have billions at their disposal to unleash havoc not only on our southern neighbors, but within our own borders, Peter. They have heavy machine guns, armored vehicles, and more to traffic drugs, weapons, and human beings. America CAN stop them, and I’m ready to use our military resources to do it. -- | | In Service, Col. name: Chris Deluzio
subject: How I’m using my lessons from the Naval Academy in Congress →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
These values are core for me, and they're what this fight for our common good is all about.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57526019/388260691/-1511406121?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.19_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzUyOGY1OC0zZjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DjVMD1Usji6HDwMpTIsno28d1hlm-zAUI1gOdnE5umM=) Just a few weeks ago I was officially sworn in to Congress, so I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about the values that are guiding my decisions and actions while I’m in Washington.

**Ship, Shipmate, Self.**

Derek, that’s one of the first lessons I learned at the Naval Academy. You put the mission first, and you put others before yourself. **These values are core for me, and they're what this fight for our common good is all about.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57526020/388260692/-1511406121?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.19_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzUyOGY1OC0zZjk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DjVMD1Usji6HDwMpTIsno28d1hlm-zAUI1gOdnE5umM=) **Fighting for our common good means putting people first. And as long as I’m in Congress, you can count on me to never lose sight of that mission.**

I’ll never stop advocating for the union way of life, for our small businesses and bringing manufacturing back home, for our wives and daughters to have access to an abortion without fear of being thrown in jail, for our LGBTQ+ friends and family to move freely through society rather than live in the shadows, and for peace and prosperity across the world.

**Republicans have had control of the House for less than a month, but already we’ve seen how their party is beholden to huge corporations and right-wing extremists, and they’ll put those interests over working families in America _every single time._** They care about power and profit at whatever cost.

**[Derek, we have a tough fight ahead of us. I know that my fellow Democrats in the House will stand beside me to fight back against Republican extremism, but I also know we can’t do it without you. These values are core for me, and they're what this fight for our common good is all about. = Fighting for our common good means putting people first. And as long as I’m in Congress, you can count on me to never lose sight of that mission. I’ll never stop advocating for the union way of life, for our small businesses and bringing manufacturing back home, for our wives and daughters to have access to an abortion without fear of being thrown in jail, for our LGBTQ+ friends and family to move freely through society rather than live in the shadows, and for peace and prosperity across the world. Republicans have had control of the House for less than a month, but already we’ve seen how their party is beholden to huge corporations and right-wing extremists, and they’ll put those interests over working families in America every single time. name: Brent Bozell
subject: Breaking - Soros spends $131 Million to influence media
body:
Our new MRC Business analysis reveals that Soros specifically funneled at least $131,111,250 between 2016 and 2020 into 253 jou
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbistmgfvlb7bck0id4cicttbkf4evqr4g2g8rtg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)
Friend,

Our new MRC Business analysis reveals that **Soros specifically funneled at least $131,111,250 between 2016 and 2020 into 253 journalism and activist media groups worldwide** to spread his radical leftist ideas on abortion, Marxist economics, anti-Americanism, defunding the police, environmental extremism, and LGBT fanaticism.

Soros blew past the $100 million global media funding milestone again in just a four-year timespan.

And most people have no idea this is happening, Friend.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is a conservative organization dedicated to exposing Soros ' dealings and working to hold him accountable for advancing his radical left-wing agenda around the globe.**

**That 's why I've set a goal to raise $20,000 before midnight on Friday to continue our investigation of George Soros.**

[_**Friend, can you make an urgent gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount?**__**Click here**_ _**to send your support >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc6e7s02a58u8lb15ojmonea30747sr151vgrmo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqqru8pfm9t1lhcgestfvrnk056a7ii9ohvbo41g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)

It is easy to criticize Soros' politics, but as he told The New York Times, he is using his fortune to "bend" the arc of history "in the right direction," and he's using his global media clout to do it.

* **$131 Million to Advance Soros ' Leftist Global Media Agenda**

Soros spends hundreds of millions of dollars around the world in "private-sector investments to advance" his left-wing agenda on topics such as "racial equity" and "climate justice."

The organization states it has doled out $400 million to 54 countries as of April 2022, $9.3 million of which went toward "independent media."

* **Views Pushed by Soros-Funded Outlets Are Radical, Dystopian: **

Global outlet openDemocracy -- which received $1,633,457 from Soros between 2016-2020 -- published an op-ed from a "queer communism" activist who said the COVID-19 crisis "shows it's time to abolish the [nuclear] family."

The Soros-backed Free Press -- financed to the tune of $1,625,000 between 2016 and 2020 -- pressured the Federal Communications Commission to label former President Donald Trump's coronavirus briefings "hoaxes" and censure broadcasters that aired them.

[_**Help expose the extent of how Soros is influencing the globe by**_ _**clicking here**_ _**to send your support >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ukaca2q1v8p4jn9u8gd447p603ecaciqsno7s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)

* **253 Journalism/Media Groups Tied to Soros: **

MRC Business discovered that Soros funded at least 253 organizations across the world that focus on news and activist media. **A number of these groups wield massive power over the flow of information in international politics. **

Project Syndicate claimed its commentaries were published 20,393 times in 156 countries in 2021 in more than 66 different languages.

OpenDemocracy claimed it "attracts more than 11 million visits per year" and has projects published "in Russian, Spanish and Portuguese as well as English."

**The Poynter Institute 's Soros-funded International Fact-Checking Network controls global fact-checking for 100 organizations and influences much of Big Tech content and social media with that power.**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu0b21a18jstfscu866vq45su9r7v1atefd14b3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)

It's time for far-Left billionaires to be held accountable for their actions.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media.****Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Now we're attacking the Left and exposing how they're pushing their radical agenda of abortion, Marxist economics, anti-Americanism, defunding the police, environmental extremism, and LGBT fanaticism.

Can you help us continue our investigation into George Soros?

Click any link below to help MRC reach our goal of $20,000 before midnight on Friday.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl8m3uo012sipmm5d76naq21g5nsqrj08lc2iheg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ph0mb0cnls4m2aktc2l3db8hq74eur9sller10_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zikctjqb0osu0tsl7n0kst66c8gcv8gafell8j6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo2h403u00dca1lpsfqldtcv2cr98q3vq1458ueg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za6rakpb3tqj4kel7bds3g2ah6vet5nea48n3o4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjbv55o6sosoa51e9di5kto1vp95pinqh7hb8q9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zudjsqlmhe6dvdg1925bvqsng6u7qorsrchlhlq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zehg56rbjhji10i55kaep35fqpcb1i9qltsjmfio_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zat5qq01096o1k30gja5rpla1cvltfpea69hf5eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm4or6c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade yet...

Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx1UU1vpDAM_TVwAyUOkM6BQ9vRVHuo9tL2GnkSB6LytRDK8u_XjGZ7WGmjJJLfe36xY6plpQtZVEJWqasLQOltGmoQoISUJ1kpCZBrS0goT6oEoSsLSSGox9DlfiaKbRg-aXYc77kd-7StC-uITvBQenWSVp106a9CVFdC8Ci0T7u6jXFaEvWYwIX3tm15SziHockwuAzdV7B0uDHp-FxpieauMKxYDHoviiNbXdDGRJ0fn9_EsQqtoeAggWqNvVnGdbbEfOzxDvXkwtozxB6hCxjpTljsJwzNwNS6GBoMdqZFNN86wyYHkvlxHRzNS-bG9doxroT5TwETC8LS0myCY-PL2_nva-MQaThKH2yX7e5heykLAGDaDN1N_A_YcuMHKj9__GrwZzrXbtpCx_aV5pk0t5kcI-A-uuD3OtFPCcAtjS2O34Y1qg98f3-d9-y3HLOX8gOag4RnvuM-0bfybpLfRn2g-vwHbkKw8g)
[ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx1UcGOnDAM_Rq4gYiTJZoDh-1Mp-2hag-7c41MYiBaCCyETvn7GjTdQ6VGSRS_9_zixFSJUiuhykKUqasUoGhs6isoQBZCnEQpBUCuLSGhOMknKHRpIVEFDej7vJmJYufDG82O4y2345B2FWiJQgiFEk91LQt34mPtnLaqhoYg7asuxmlJ5HMCV573-z3vCGcf2gy9y9D98pZ2NyYdr5qWaB4Kw4rFYNMUas-WV7QxkZfn80uxD6U1KA4SKNc4mGVcZ0vMxwEf0EDOrwND7OF7j5EehMVhQt8GptbFUDDYmw7RfOgMm-xI1oxrcDQvmRvXumdcFuY_BUws8EtHs_GOja8vl7-3jSFS2EsPts9-fv56niS-dzemTegP8T9gxw9ndBNv395b_JHOlZvuvmf7UnNP2qMnewv4Hb1vtirRnxKAIw3g-G1Yo7zh6-v3ect-izH78nSDdifhzHvcJvpQPkzyo9U7qi9_AL5NsdQ)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's **45-day no-risk trial.**
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJx1UU1vpDAM_TVwAxEHks6BQ9vRVD1UPey01ygkBqKGj0JYlv31NWjaw0obJZH83vOLHWPJhMxZLjImYlvmoFltYldCBjxj7MQEZwCpNKhRsxMvIJPCQJRn2Gnn03pCDK3rP3CyFG-pGbq4LbGouDW5KHhVoawAwHDITsKauhAS72JftiGMc8TvI7jQXtc1bVFPrm8S7Wyi7W9ncHcj0tKpcA7qplCkmJWu6yzfs_lFmxDx8_3jNdtXLiXkFEQgltCpeVgmg8SHTt-gDq1bOoLIw3mnA94Io7tRu6YnapkV9kp71WqtfnSKTHYkqYeltzjNiR2WyhPOM_WfAkYSuLnFSTlLxpfr-fu1oQ_Y76X3xifLr2vzNP3Fu5Vo1ftD_A_YUuOEbuzj-bPRr_FU2nF1nuyFpJk0x0z2EVAf3tVbGcmHCOBIAzh-G5bA3_Xb28u0JX_YkDwV79DsJDzSHbYRf5Q3k_QY9Y7K8xczarKu)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 kangaroo court seals records for 30 to 50 years!
body:
Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our famili
Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS! | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2lrsd219dmiakbejdm5bkg0cbdke2g45dcjrvco_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm2ob1c5h2bs)

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z815rcrc94rsfhp6mmt1inon99ip0dnitfsqgaq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm2ob1c5h2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.

**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhvm9e2rs0s9pevg5noue93g5jcbk1bn51kn58kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm2ob1c5h2bs) **The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public.”_

**Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.

** They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they’re trying to bury that evidence until everyone they’ve falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms – especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!

** And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.

**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcocb4e719f9nk7j5o4biel6re9k9s71ktcv2jdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm2ob1c5h2bs) Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.

**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znof27c797tp70ahj9qkt4nuscgeoj7q19c41us8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm2ob1c5h2bs) Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, it’s been two years since the fake insurrection on January 6...and the real reign of terror launched by Biden and his lawless FBI and DOJ on Trump supporters and peaceful protesters.**

[**Please help me fight for them in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3tf8fjk1dl7nvanobkqp88hhvabs4isisk83qi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm2ob1c5h2bs)

voices of Veterans will have a HUGE role to play in staving off this catastrophe
#
Derek -
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to VoteVets ahead of the coming debt ceiling fight. Please give us a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth:
The far-right has already promised to hold the country hostage during the debt ceiling fight — even though the price of default would be catastrophic to every single American.
Prices and interest rates would go up further.
Services would be cut.
Social security and other benefits, including Veterans benefits, would also be at risk.
And that is just the start.
Now let us tell you this: voices of Veterans will have a HUGE role to play in staving off this catastrophe — just like they did eleven years ago, the last time the threat was this acute.
That puts VoteVets front and center. But we cannot do that work without you. So please, play a role in ending the debt ceiling fight and saving our economy:

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Six Seats to Save the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57508385/388219887/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTg3MzM0MS0xOTk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GHUzFMmUmu7Y2bxlCCd9Xw5hVrwLTt54Hmm9vsi7qzo=&emci=544f3ae9-9297-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=f5873341-1998-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)
---

| | _Did you see what the new MAGA-dominated House made their first priorities out of the gate?_ First up: gutting IRS enforcement so billionaire and corporate tax cheats don't need to worry about getting caught. Then, a draconian bill to curtail abortion rights, even in blue states. Thankfully we have a Senate majority that makes those bills a non-starter. For now. **That's why I'm already thinking a lot about 2024 — and how we keep the Senate in Democratic hands.** Make no mistake, it is going to be a tough cycle. Here are some key races we need to be ready to jump into: **MICHIGAN:** Senator Debbie Stabenow has already announced her retirement. We don't know who is running yet, but expect a top-flight crop of candidates in a tough swing-state. **OHIO:** Senator Sherrod Brown is a powerhouse champion for working folks, which is why he's won three times in a state trending redder and redder. As the chairman of the Banking Committee, he's taken on Wall Street, big banks, the crypto industry, payday lenders, and more. **WISCONSIN:** Senator Tammy Baldwin has been elected twice in the swing state that in 2022 re-elected hard-right Republican Ron Johnson to the Senate while re-electing Democratic Governor Tony Evers. As the first out LGBTQ Senator, Tammy's a fighter who's not afraid to smash glass ceilings. **MONTANA:** Senator Jon Tester is up for reelection. He's won three times in a state that's picked a Republican for President seven times in a row. It's going to be tough, but Jon's a tough guy, and we'll have his back. **PENNSYLVANIA:** Senator Bob Casey is a champion for children's health care that's been elected three times in another one of our most competitive swing states. **NEVADA:** In 2018, Jacky Rosen was the only Democrat to defeat an incumbent Republican Senator. In her first term, she's been one of those folks working hard, away from the cameras, to deliver smart, innovative solutions to improve tourism and commerce, among other issues. If you're keeping score, you'll see I just named six seats that Democrats have to defend in 2024 in red and purple states. With only a two-seat majority, we've got our work cut out for us. **[If you're ready to get to it, please consider making a donation to the Blue Wave Project – my program to support the candidates we need to keep our majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57508399/388219893/-641752998?refcode=2023-01-18-senatemap&recurring=0&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=f5873341-1998-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTg3MzM0MS0xOTk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GHUzFMmUmu7Y2bxlCCd9Xw5hVrwLTt54Hmm9vsi7qzo=)** clean_body: | | | | Did you see what the new MAGA-dominated House made their first priorities out of the gate? First up: gutting IRS enforcement so billionaire and corporate tax cheats don't need to worry about getting caught. Then, a draconian bill to curtail abortion rights, even in blue states. Thankfully we have a Senate majority that makes those bills a non-starter. For now. That's why I'm already thinking a lot about 2024 — and how we keep the Senate in Democratic hands. Make no mistake, it is going to be a tough cycle. Here are some key races we need to be ready to jump into: MICHIGAN: Senator Debbie Stabenow has already announced her retirement. We don't know who is running yet, but expect a top-flight crop of candidates in a tough swing-state. OHIO: Senator Sherrod Brown is a powerhouse champion for working folks, which is why he's won three times in a state trending redder and redder. As the chairman of the Banking Committee, he's taken on Wall Street, big banks, the crypto industry, payday lenders, and more. WISCONSIN: Senator Tammy Baldwin has been elected twice in the swing state that in 2022 re-elected hard-right Republican Ron Johnson to the Senate while re-electing Democratic Governor Tony Evers. As the first out LGBTQ Senator, Tammy's a fighter who's not afraid to smash glass ceilings. MONTANA: Senator Jon Tester is up for reelection. He's won three times in a state that's picked a Republican for President seven times in a row. It's going to be tough, but Jon's a tough guy, and we'll have his back. PENNSYLVANIA: Senator Bob Casey is a champion for children's health care that's been elected three times in another one of our most competitive swing states. NEVADA: In 2018, Jacky Rosen was the only Democrat to defeat an incumbent Republican Senator. In her first term, she's been one of those folks working hard, away from the cameras, to deliver smart, innovative solutions to improve tourism and commerce, among other issues. If you're keeping score, you'll see I just named six seats that Democrats have to defend in 2024 in red and purple states. With only a two-seat majority, we've got our work cut out for us. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = Jeff | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. body:

Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zstjkca4c14h4060c7gfmbihet2kbcfornl8sq1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm2pr4c3h2bs)

---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrqoq9igqic6aqmqhgjc6eunkmqh2oj00sp2lp80_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm2pr4c3h2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zil33us12aj1tltqkbd2up57rt7d9ka4tpjrmpno_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm2pr4c3h2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvh7lj37iveujl7bhl07eafkfesrd9043vk831ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm2pr4c3h2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zse99nptmm3j5rsv9047moti7h19s6toaslnrn0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm2pr4c3h2bs)

---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

subject: The American response to the Great Reset
body:
This is one of my biggest fights yet. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0495%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=JAICpJll9jmjuUxXqRLV5A&sysid=1)

---
Fellow Patriot, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656149%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pPGbnbT0XZhxeeimNrdWYQ&sysid=1)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just five dollars!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656140%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vavTedqyaBzldsWqp4d%2b8w&sysid=1)
---
[Get your book now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656141%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Am618gERXzRBKEJpX1QuZw&sysid=1)
---
I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656142%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5fZL5SooOyZYvq9hpUl5Ww&sysid=1)
---
[Get your book now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656141%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Am618gERXzRBKEJpX1QuZw&sysid=1)
---
Whether you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before, or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. [**And I want to send you a copy of _The American Response to the Great Reset_ RIGHT AWAY. Please claim your book right now with a gift to Turning Point USA of ANY AMOUNT, even just five dollars.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656143%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v5amrDjuWYieiLjgLgo7CQ&sysid=1) Thank you for helping Turning Point USA expose and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

body:
It’s time to hold this administration accountable
| [](https://links.fitzgerald4congress.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=fa3bb9bd3bdd4d96bd97521fca877622&_e=Asq1Sv8Xedmu_ABJnGzc0Q3daty2_fOjxMqMsFIj0x2X-sder7J4Wlm5uOQqRPpbj3CzS6L7oushEIEVoYchzbGgawFAhEZX1Q5jbMUx5SHo9eqKQFOzlXH6bZNLl_5p9YPkVySZ_4d3IIzHnyfGxxJVR2j8qbVITKlGWvEjGCL2QNqsm0eCsHpwEIshP7xRvipqUvuwHLPJSMDnZ6H9oi8tB4u9qBei1g0e1vEOKFvvkNVT4WSNgbu0BLd8P0z0QYpqKNhQtX2EAfT91Xk64GGRp8GbUznCpN6wLp0l2oEV4QsAJx5NWRhja9aYgH-AsupQITRWuXR9xfaCXEEhx9-3fXZXVcd1zA-2Ij_YhP4%3D)

Peter,
---
One of the most important things to understand while being a member of Congress, is how to properly handle classified documents to ensure the safety of the information and our country.
---
**And yet, Biden is now under investigation for the mishandling of classified documents showing his neglect of basic security protocols after 50 years in political office.**
---
_These recent events, on top of the record high inflation, historic border crisis, and our energy crisis, proves that it’s been one failure after another for the Biden administration._
---
That’s why House Republicans are dedicated to ensuring that Joe Biden and his administration are held accountable for their many failures that have harmed the American people.
---
And with your continued support, I know that we can succeed.
---

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: Important: EPA to make major decision on air pollution (time sensitive -- LCV members needed)
body:
__Your impact goes three times as far when you renew today. |
---

|
The Biden Administration has a chance to deliver _**BIG for public health and environmental justice,**_ Peter.

The EPA just put out a long-needed proposal to set stronger yearly limits on soot pollution, which comes from places like coal plants, refineries and diesel engines. **But EPA 's draft rule doesn't strengthen _daily_ limits that could protect communities from spikes in soot pollution.**_****_

The EPA has a short window where they're accepting public feedback. We _need_ to escalate our pressure campaign ... and we need to do it _right now_.

**LCV members can make a real impact right away.** We just kicked off our Membership Drive for 2023. _This is the absolute best way to help right now._ Help fund our hard-hitting environmental campaigns by [renewing your LCV membership for just $5. For a limited time, every gift makes 3X the impact.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2z_wYC-)

They need to get this right -- soot pollution from sources like coal and diesel fuel _kills over a hundred thousand Americans each year_. Communities of color, low wealth communities, older adults, and children are hit hardest.

| | **
** **League of Conservation Voters
2023 Membership Drive **

Supporter Record: Peter Willis
Match Status: [_TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE_](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Deadline: January 31, 2023
Fundraising Goal: $35,000

**Member Status:**[EXPIRED -- renew your membership today -- it only costs $5 right now](https://links.messages.lcv.)**** |
---|---|---

While this is happening, anti-environmental Republicans in the House are moving ahead with their plans to sabotage the clean energy transition. First up, they're moving closer to a vote on a _massive handout to Big Oil_ on the backs of taxpayers. It gets worse -- they're hoping to _force_ the Biden Administration to open _more of our public lands to dirty oil and gas drilling_.

Can they sink any lower, Peter? While we're pushing the Biden Administration to strengthen environmental standards, we need to keep playing defense on Capitol Hill to prevent horrific policies like Republicans' giveaways to Big Oil from becoming law.

**Last year, our movement proved that _when we fight, we win_** -- we secured historic climate legislation. Now we're facing a two-front fight for healthier communities and environmental justice. The truth is that we need more resources to make sure that our movement is heard.

So we're asking: help fund our campaign when you [renew your LCV membership for just $5 today. For a limited time, a group of generous donors will TRIPLE every gift to jumpstart our campaign.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVH2z_wYC-)

Thank you for everything you do to fight for a better and healthier future for our communities.

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

---
**[**RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9106399&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDQzMTc2MgS2&spReportId=MTY2MDQzMTc2MgS2). name: Team Beshear
subject: Outside spending has entered the race.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Help Andy fight back and secure the resources he needs to take on outside money attacks. Peter,

An outside spending group is already raising _tons_ of money to support one of Andy's opponents. And this is just the beginning. We know that there will be much more outside money flowing into Kentucky to defeat Andy.

**That's where you come in.** Andy won in 2019 thanks to his incredible team of grassroots supporters who volunteered, canvassed, delivered yard signs, and donated to support this campaign. **Now we're asking for your support again to take on the outside money flooding Kentucky so Andy can keep moving Kentucky forward!**

name: John Pierce
subject: A historic J6 case!
body:
I’ve been in D.C. since last week defending my client, Lloyd Cruz, in a HISTORIC January 6 case!
I’ve been in D.C. since last week defending my client, Lloyd Cruz, in a HISTORIC January 6 case! | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze0cdvrch97m0o9d9chv7gnkaq26p3n4g7hlh4rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmaor4chh2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6v9fss38ltubglmij4dfrf70k6f3r9c9ldiudv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmaor4chh2bs) Patriot,

[**Please donate $25, $50, $100, or more today to help cover the legal costs for the DOZENS of January 6th peaceful protesters who I’m fighting for in the courts!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zraa9qlvqj1fpsgefvdjlufmnfsjqc3ml3dbsjo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmaor4chh2bs)

**I’ve been in D.C. since last week defending my client, Lloyd Cruz, in a HISTORIC January 6 case!**

Lloyd Cruz is a loving husband and father of 5 children, including his nephew who has been welcomed into the Cruz family with open arms. Let me tell you, Lloyd is a great man who has an unfortunate story like so many others.

On January 6, 2020, Lloyd went to our nation’s capital to support President Trump. He didn’t riot, break anything, or hurt anyone. He was actually getting lunch at a nearby food truck when he heard loud noises from the Capitol building, so he left his friends to see what was going on.

**Lloyd simply walked into the Capitol building, saw everything was fine, and walked back out without touching a single thing. There were no signs stating not to trespass, no barriers, and not even a single Capitol police officer discouraged him from entering – but now he’s facing TWO years in prison.**

I’ve seen case after case like this... Leftist politicians went on their witch hunt, vilifying peaceful men and women and “making an example” out of them, just to prove their political point.

**But here is where Lloyd’s case is different. In Lloyd’s historic hearing last week, we challenged the unconstitutional warrant that allowed the FBI to conspire with Big Tech to gather the location data of every cell phone around the Capitol building.**

**This is huge! We’ve entered a stipulated trial agreement so we can pursue this historic appeal, which could impact HUNDREDS of other J6 cases!**

The rights and liberties our Constitution bestows are rapidly being trampled, violated, and rescinded by the socialist Left, and I’m done watching our corrupt government destroy the lives of good Americans.

I’m representing dozens of January 6th peaceful protesters in court – more than any other legal team! But legal costs are mounting...

[**Will you donate $25, $50, $100, or more today to help cover the legal defense for Lloyd and the dozens of other January 6 peaceful patriots I’m fighting for in the courts?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5p1b14n4bl2c8ferij2s70jum5tm9omicsas8p8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmaor4chh2bs)

Every dollar makes a difference in the lives of these persecuted patriots, but also for the future of our democracy and freedoms.

Thank you for your support and for standing with me in the defense of our beloved Constitution and our great country!

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Founder and General Counsel
National Constitutional Law Union

---

name: Team Gallagher
subject: Your Monthly Foreign Policy Briefing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
Overview: Mike leading the charge on China, a potential nationwide ban on TikTok, the Marines going woke, and so much more...| | | [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=d358683a174243e69dffbafe73405f7c&_e=hs-4F1HnS1N6Cbas8_QATZc5BJJaaYvOpwCFZdR_UVynPQryDHuT-uggjDUKvJkqo_YOhPAP6E2zLLwLQ1GvKQLCvSI5s0a0UyIVOVCB0Q9b8Z9y9gSnPkRAA3WKAmfI2X97QKeXWCTgYeJE-5QnKHTWBHgySdnSgVsjwnh0SYM48rLaEcE7aVCvEDzumtu7mfJ5sw_QHxKbrO9pKRmv7Q%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter, The 118th Congress is finally underway and there is no shortage of issues to address both at home and abroad. Mike isn’t wasting any time. He’s leading on critical issues that impact our children, our military, our economy, and our standing in the world. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema called voting rights bill “premature”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, Live, from the Swiss Alps.... it’s Kyrsten Sinema doubling down on the filibuster and making light of voter disenfranchisement!
It’s one thing for Sinema to spend an entire week abroad schmoozing with billionaires and corporate CEOs (in between time on the slopes, we’d imagine)... But then to sit on a world stage and undermine voting rights, yet again... is really something.. It’s one thing for Sinema to spend an entire week abroad schmoozing with billionaires and corporate CEOs (in between time on the slopes, we’d imagine)... But then to sit on a world stage and undermine voting rights, yet again... is really something.. If there’s one thing we’ve learned in Sinema’s entire time in Congress, it’s that she doesn’t care about voting rights. She doesn’t care about reproductive rights. She doesn’t care about saving the planet. She cares about making headlines for upholding the racist filibuster, running marathons, and cashing checks from her wealthy donors. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win!
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1gs3bafpnta6881nv4s9m4p4d09h2rvjjfjqnvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmaor4c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztr3c1qekckjq1plc3sjb1u7p4b8q24124691pqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmaor4c1h2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgm2ogu9vgrq5tonfbgsd9e7rs15eibhjua9m44o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmaor4c1h2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9lvbhok756a2o0isma7173fqqtk7f1pvbhgdhno_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmaor4c1h2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z33rjnr7cel7ts22qnn81ofog2tv8nldnc4t6b78_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmaor4c1h2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaml77jna4k27gel2i2423ddfkdqonmmc6m1rofo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmaor4c1h2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3f3cohvtu2kp2q3g84cddlo21vbmhadcjm7tir8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmaor4c1h2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z601n6kiihup6r44ckqe1a3bbhmqhq8su0ptqjko_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmaor4c1h2bs)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z30gjq0cj1euide1esm35aqps0ea3kj8vboo6280_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmaor4c1h2bs)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zgats9icqv2bf60br64hatrjv3g1bc4og03ndqr0).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zai180hpdhr7le65jq61lfl5q0h2vg759n19b1uo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c5i66pb3chg649fg)
