name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We can and will win the House back in 2024. But it starts with holding onto our most vulnerable seats. Which includes Rep. Marcy Kaptur of Ohio.
body:
Want the House back in 2024?
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta0b4db1e-bee1-402f-9a4b-fe28b498f1d2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _We send you the first congressional seat we absolutely MUST KEEP in 2024._ [**_Will you join us, giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Rep. Marcy Kaptur's reelection?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82f61578-ca89-485c-9a5d-4b1a533365df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We're down only 5 seats in the House. People switch parties, they get ill and even pass away...and then there's George Santos, from a Democratic district and likely has a future date with a prison cell in New York City or Sao Paulo._ **_The point is, this could get even closer, and we can and will win the House back in 2024. __But it starts with holding onto our most vulnerable seats. Which includes Rep. Marcy Kaptur of Ohio._** _Kaptur is a star. Republicans in Ohio, with forethought of eliminating her from Congress, gerrymandered her district from Dem leaning to +3 Republican._ **_She responded by saying, ok, you think that's gonna be enough, and went ahead to beat J.R. Majewski, 56-43%. She stared down their sexist attacks, and responded the best way possible--by crushing them._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b6cf025-1b7d-48c4-bff3-90323c97609f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Yes, Majewski, with his Republican-like lies about his record (said he served in Afghanistan and Iraq, really loaded cargo in Qatar) and conspiracy theories about the election and pretty much everything else, helped her out. But **_it was her experience as a longtime lunch-pail Midwestern Democrat that was key here,_** and led to one of three huge Democratic upsets in Ohio House races. _Now Republicans will throw everything--and I mean EVERYTHING--at her. So we must be there to protect this amazing Democrat who fights for her values._ As you can see by the results of the last election, she'll do her part. _We must do ours, providing her with the resources to run a great campaign._ [**_The Blue Amp Action community's behind Kaptur now, as we must start early to fend off attacks by Republican billionaires. Will you join us, giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Rep. Marcy Kaptur's reelection?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4373f12b-6d71-42a5-90cf-2dc59fb2bb36/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for helping us win back the house from these (dragging) knuckleheads, Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T80c56687-35e4-4a62-bc69-53af8f5f0d32/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/holdingmarcykaptursseat-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f3f9883-e206-469a-9605-55eeb9e7a7ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=2bfd177c-7038-404a-a6c7-099c81e2b4b7&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=2bfd177c-7038-404a-a6c7-099c81e2b4b7&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: Want the House back in 2024? | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, We send you the first congressional seat we absolutely MUST KEEP in 2024. We're down only 5 seats in the House. People switch parties, they get ill and even pass away...and then there's George Santos, from a Democratic district and likely has a future date with a prison cell in New York City or Sao Paulo. The point is, this could get even closer, and we can and will win the House back in 2024. But it starts with holding onto our most vulnerable seats. Which includes Rep. Marcy Kaptur of Ohio. Kaptur is a star. Republicans in Ohio, with forethought of eliminating her from Congress, gerrymandered her district from Dem leaning to +3 Republican. She responded by saying, ok, you think that's gonna be enough, and went ahead to beat J.R. Majewski, 56-43%. She stared down their sexist attacks, and responded the best way possible--by crushing them. | | | | | | | | Yes, Majewski, with his Republican-like lies about his record (said he served in Afghanistan and Iraq, really loaded cargo in Qatar) and conspiracy theories about the election and pretty much everything else, helped her out. But it was her experience as a longtime lunch-pail Midwestern Democrat that was key here, and led to one of three huge Democratic upsets in Ohio House races. Now Republicans will throw everything--and I mean EVERYTHING--at her. So we must be there to protect this amazing Democrat who fights for her values. As you can see by the results of the last election, she'll do her part. We must do ours, providing her with the resources to run a great campaign. Thanks for helping us win back the house from these (dragging) knuckleheads, Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | or

| | | **ABC News: Ohio House ex-speaker's trial in $60M bribery probe to begin **

_"Former Ohio House Speaker Larry Householder goes on trial next week in a case that alleges a $60 million bribery scheme federal prosecutors call the largest corruption case in state history"_
---
Team,

Over the coming days and weeks, we’ll hear about the alleged misdeeds of Larry Householder and Matt Borges. But the scandal reaches much deeper within the Ohio Republican Party.

Top-level GOP leaders took MILLIONS of dollars from FirstEnergy-connected dark-money groups in order to enrich themselves in **the largest corruption scandal in Ohio history.**

Top Republicans in our state have made it clear that they're willing to exploit hard-working Ohioans for money and political gain.

But the connection between FirstEnergy and Ohio Republicans runs deeper than former Speaker, Larry Householder, and former Chair Matt Borges. Many disgraceful current elected officials with higher political ambitions have questionable ties to FirstEnergy – from Dave Yost to Matt Dolan and Frank LaRose to Mike Carey.

Corruption and bribery at the expense of working people are always unacceptable.

**The Ohio Democratic Party is fighting tooth and nail to bring accountability and transparency to Ohio, but we need your help.**

name: Conservatives Give
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f32ea69162c64a98858805be45db5cba&_e=sTFhhpUInHprVYAfZJSVUVXFmCv11eA3RR2g0NQSjhScYaAQKMlfp85NxDYmrCxjY9qrG4s911zX3uZ-CvaIVUX24t88Ob2crNyNAtWQP0gqazW6HaYyMc6nbH7q7QLDT7UpVgWytwM0wnZZg09rQ-mCLOStu_Y8j83oSn9QKizSKmjtmaEVCwB--GNaK6oOP3NkNd7HonK56jChIMmLeNe0dgwjwoR3doL3GzDGQ7-IK7b-rqf-FPF4XALxCzhKDxUgRqE-qX-6_J22sSHbxZ9t5BN3XAnVblCx3F0GuTa0t6Gv5H8wMhLF-meKyiOE0s41qSxPDrZtXGVkoZPXEGD7WpTUdHQhKM-RhD-ISyGAw4ve1jrGXzA177Emu-VKpeDypBeX945VXmPo41Ygcw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f32ea69162c64a98858805be45db5cba&_e=sTFhhpUInHprVYAfZJSVUVXFmCv11eA3RR2g0NQSjhScYaAQKMlfp85NxDYmrCxjY9qrG4s911zX3uZ-CvaIVUX24t88Ob2crNyNAtWQP0gqazW6HaYyMc6nbH7q7QLDT7UpVgWytwM0wnZZg09rQ-mCLOStu_Y8j83oSn9QKizSKmjtmaEVCwB--GNaK6oOP3NkNd7HonK56jChIMmLeNe0dgwjwoR3doL3GzDGQ7-IK7b-rqf-FPF4XALxCzhKed2WaqTCLKHa8GjcwcpdNU1YdS6NEPcJgBaJOhOIvNP2Uwi32D-kE3ArHqN-l6L25k_fe1ysu1WeaVb6Zw7aDFYCvgqphYPgM5OhoyBw2tVVn67_qrFIAftQwZmp9l8sAjNW8HLOT5ThwT-znuSoJw%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f32ea69162c64a98858805be45db5cba&_e=sTFhhpUInHprVYAfZJSVUVXFmCv11eA3RR2g0NQSjhScYaAQKMlfp85NxDYmrCxjY9qrG4s911zX3uZ-CvaIVUX24t88Ob2crNyNAtWQP0gqazW6HaYyMc6nbH7q7QLDT7UpVgWytwM0wnZZg09rQ-mCLOStu_Y8j83oSn9QKizSKmjtmaEVCwB--GNaK6oOP3NkNd7HonK56jChIMmLeNe0dgwjwoR3doL3GzDGQ7-IK7b-rqf-FPF4XALxCzhKuIFzjStqzHSDIh9OdMUTMOyx_xy2nXcvUPJhK1Lzn5TyFrh_niTHmY4HxE649W7vmU_Z1eFjL0m_QlD2BPAAprHhfYtqXRkQIaBBcsgH5ksjcwXAbCbqyetEe93trl6OH2BKIyX_iZoGDdIWAM_cNQ%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

The marshal reviewed forensic evidence and interviewed nearly 100 employees, the court’s statement [...] READ MORE ]() ---|--- | #### [ BREAKING: Alex Baldwin CRIMINALLY Charged With Involuntary Manslaughter Of Halyna Hutchins Previously, it was believed that Baldwin would not be facing criminal charges for his role in the killing of Halyna Hutchins. However, it was not confirmed that Alec Baldwin will be charged with two counts of involuntary manslaughter in New Mexico, which could land Baldwin 18 months in prison if found guilty. The shooting at [...] READ MORE ]() ---|--- | #### [ Mayor Adams Pleads for Biden to Address Migrant Crisis New York City Mayor Eric Adams said on Wednesday that there is absolutely “no more room” for asylum seekers in his city as Republican governors continue to send immigrants by the thousands. Adams spoke to Politico and told them, “We’re at that point,” when referencing his cities inability to take on more migrants. “At the [...] READ MORE ]() ---|--- You Might Like | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- American Briefing 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: The Grassroots Army
subject: Is the Vaccine to blame?
body:
Uptick of Cardiac Arrest Cases in Young People Sparks Old Debate on Link to COVID-19 and Vaccination
====================================================================================================

**All of these Medical emergencies in young people are from January 2023**
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

The research and data below was from a recent “The Epoch Times” Article.

An uptick in sudden cardiac arrest cases in young people has been widely reported in recent months. The cases, many of which have occurred in young people, celebrities and athletes, have sparked intense discussions on social media along within the medical community.

A study published by Dr. John R. Giudicessi, an American cardiologist, on Jan. 17, 2021, in the medical journal Heart Rhythm suggests a possible causal link between COVID-19 and the rise in out-of-hospital cardiac arrest/sudden death cases.

“Areas such as New York City, the Lombardy region of Italy, and Paris, France, hit hardest during the early pandemic (defined classically as March and April 2020) all have reported a marked rise in the incidence of out-of-hospital cardiac arrest/out-of-hospital sudden death,” according to the study.

An analysis done by Ziyad Al-Aly, an epidemiologist at Washington University in St. Louis, and his colleagues, showed that people who had been admitted to intensive care with acute infections of COVID-19 had a much greater risk of cardiovascular problems.

The study, published last August in the science journal Nature, compared more than 150,000 veterans who had recovered from acute COVID-19 with their uninfected peers and with a pre-pandemic control group.

“For some conditions, such as swelling of the heart and blood clots in the lungs, the risk shot up at least 20-fold compared with that in uninfected peers. But even people who had not been hospitalized had increased risks of many conditions, ranging from an 8 percent increase in the rate of heart attacks to a 247 percent increase in the rate of heart inflammation,” the study said.

Authored by structural biologist Panagis Polykretis and board-certified internist and cardiologist Dr. Peter McCullough, the letter’s cited data found that from 2021 to 2022, at least 1,616 cardiac arrests or other major medical issues have been globally documented in vaccinated athletes, with 1,114 of those being fatal.

[Click Hereto READ Dr. Peter McCullough's Article](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/KmaOX3ahpixX8eHG00agqpWPHS3plrupG4DKGlQvHEOpC9oYKcmVPmYMe8-wYxHEk27rOGDYmYnW7BeQOkmkGfvfzhMPGF5GOZ5D8fIdDhutwHLdHkwj9eYbxjbWO5uadCBotXS5hjMfFjKmd3IYSC4tOq1bt-okzYz8zVskvS_cA7yGDEC4WnQazIRyx6VQJ1Uf5WZL4HDWSBtZrHYm6Gctc4Rc0H8GP-r5PAwFFtNi1qUHYTRPEvCefg4P9OUi6EV5D-PzQWL8Go0xLtU3jL8E)

The global data showed that between 2021 to 2022, current and former American athletes made up 279 of the mortalities.

McCullough said, looking at the data, “there’s no doubt” that sudden cardiac deaths have increased following widespread COVID-19 vaccinations.

Obviously, research and studies must be done to address the sudden uptick in cardiac cases, especially in young healthy kids/adults.

Unfortunately, if we find out the vaccines are causing this, there will be no liability for anyone who administered or manufactured the vaccine.

Read Why Below

[Professionals and Entities Covered by ImmunityPREP Act immunity applies to:licensed health professionals authorized to administer covered medical countermeasures under the law of the state where the countermeasure is administered, and other individuals identified in the declaration by the Secretary of Health and Human Services (HHS) to prescribe, dispense, or administer covered countermeasures, including the COVID-19 vaccine ](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/SQuzRrKmwLdLcq1bwLm2TIt4l28T0llOP1YtgLaGmy_RUHccZh_y90tf6mwQOsoVFeIDzAg_qflXgaY7oVcUdBtsl2-RgXwkoFLe4gm19XL6S8HM-DbUglHK6vQy0q2Ukf3v1WjwcI1Scow8LQb87ZMl5-wOdRoif8koV1e50eSVFniTk0CF2jrBaMRyKXqxHchA1OUyqVgOn7h4TomNp4ZP51L-jp9ZF041v6_r1pTHQ9msWp__sVWrFNWhOQSLSJAZ9ldaO6M_-UjUcE7DT2jFrQSUaI7HVbyfuqD4Hr5FVuJ0wvV2fHqsqcylHkPGECAnTC5cKpWTv66Kt9D-jmUK2nDEww)

[ In 1986 Congress passed the National Childhood Vaccine Injury Act](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/Oc9rVPvvo5SHeg6C85Yze9ywdEeBxnaQiMS9WA4ZE-ciaJDVkODwGn97UrqIja7AjKEGa1NvGXIpVARN9u6_fE71Gr808VV4zA61gtkq1FyL9ZC5AXE__kR-9K_LAtJqJ4wPsK1eLTfrwV7YeL8UyJJsbwYIZnBepjZnPJjiu8VMvcZTeRsklA4hXQdDVKkS99QCd3WPZi1ogmEBammn-YrlOAbe8v16u0DghkcSo7V0O7QdqaXd-FzHPHVidgCpAU9Kofwh1rH_yho)

Myocarditis and Cardiac Arrest
------------------------------

In an interview with The Epoch Times on Jan. 10, Japanese physician Ke Xia said she believed that “COVID-19 and its vaccines’ side effects are indeed correlated to many cases of cardiac arrest.”

“Cardiac arrests in many young people, even children, are caused by myocarditis. Four students and a class teacher died in an elementary school in Yokohama, Japan, in 2021, and it was later discovered that the deaths were all caused by myocarditis,” she said.

It is well documented in scientific literature that myocarditis (heart inflammation) is a known risk of COVID-19 vaccines and that it disproportionately affects young men.

Moreover, a 2021 study by French researchers suggests that a history of myocarditis may increase the risk of sudden cardiac death in contact sports.

However, Ke explained, myocarditis may go unnoticed because it is difficult to diagnose clinically. “The reason is that the virus invades the heart and causes inflammation of the myocardium. The general symptoms are like a cold.”

Vaccines Could Put Hearts at Risk
---------------------------------

Ke noted that receiving a large number of vaccine injections may be a contributing factor to myocarditis. “When the needle is inserted, you have to withdraw it a little to see if there is blood. The purpose of this is to prevent the vaccine from being directly injected into the blood vessel. If the vaccine directly enters the blood vessels, it may cause myocarditis when it reaches the heart with the blood flow. With such a large volume of vaccination being performed, it is difficult to ensure that no vaccine enters the blood vessels,” Ke said.

“Myocarditis can directly cause heart arrhythmia, a symptom where electrical signals that coordinate the heart’s beats don’t work properly. That’s why it’s so deadly.”

Ke stressed that heart problems are often difficult to diagnose as many people have no external symptoms before experiencing a cardiac arrest, resulting in a high mortality rate.

[The FULL Epoch Times Article Click Here](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sSh8EU_jUAXR01pGoMbhk6FMUTzK8UIfeCe5TtVUmr7JpLbS6rVXVKXmGN1QUSGXe7A1iyfa6nipibJDK3843MsEFFEC2Rb3ou24Wcd0Hl40Ln_mfD_klRhbHZYzFtqJ9cfQ5NtCV9hpQtyAMjPYvCSPUun6o2MlXpO8oqQq8__vdAWYMdwqg0ghPBEJnfMF-rt9xbyq0Q5zcUoBuXH9zhOCv7-nrnhsFFbYaReeP6S8fml14qyn6Gn7Yegu4L_PgPNd75X9TyF4QNsj_6BlzFIkp3xzc8pxoIY__y6BH96bJbdykHdcvk3m7_0W7UD4ff-Ngws-mXGZv7Ok70kPfBBqaEYBQw9dmoDkhA)

**Grassroots Army**

8357 Barony Pt, 49071, Mattawan

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

You've received it because you've subscribed to our newsletter.

[Update your preference](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/up/bwvW1Kys_JwNOjDM4uxkwmLSKji8XD_-IqeRIg) | [View in browser](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/mr/sh9dgbrLH4h-4EGY135wE1cMKKm-EacvI5kcVpB00UpbGzF8Hh_2qemWQKrNUcOHUhgppka9QKVy3I2hbgr68MxNzZBusz-xpq6LV3wjJjXQ9MkHUtf5fYnA6yvCUkFvotqCbq7E) | [Unsubscribe](https://9l762.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/un/6DRdQI7FZBGxEXchT7bKeeLCsdkgruBiEyJdY0L0nlF3dCnobwUOx3iKRyS0iGPOuDzZ92brOZqF5NKxUQK5jAQNFnWULXryykeXQgpfYJ6Ak-tKNW-5lGZkLfG2VkqUqfzlAgsKe1mwLvnc91_9WIIZ0qvbQhR3tfknKAFLpA)

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Do you know how it worked, and why it doesn’t?
body:
You’re someone who follows the news. Often, it revolves around what’s happening in Washington, D.C. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0536a9b419a4733b18c97821f14ee37&_e=wwFGtYZCdZCAIe5NvzDnMjOkBuh2mXU9JNaZqk5nS3w4RqElUccgw-9xKJGc9QOY3N5HrEKp9ttbmbA_-4PDRnuYip7Krnr8_nZev441s9ZQmeP5xLo3E0EOkX7aUJVVbY0VMN7uXcBTxcyCjBPTNmP1_ZQ51OKX5NFH0zJJtbh69TDQM5hT84N2PaZHtX6C39caR_IMWxuMdqnBj7XLQJ22mm5PvxoKbZqg-znio7RbMEQc0a8pkmsfbDaiV8Xm6D1Qlu4RoKqT-ipU8iNApYuEWQC3amSsFSK7JTofSDW0jbVm25cexF5EqS-Md11paCG4dN6MUZVm3CV67ZLTiDpFsMzmq5BhV1M2yHL_qab_Z6u8W4dSkCBQ7Px4DCm1) Dear Fellow American, You're someone who follows the news. Often, it revolves around what's happening in Washington, D.C. So, I have a question for you. Do you want to know how the Founders thought the United States Congress should work? Watching the news today, I'm sure you've asked yourself that. If you've ever wondered, then I encourage you to learn more with our free online course, **" Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn't." ** [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0536a9b419a4733b18c97821f14ee37&_e=wwFGtYZCdZCAIe5NvzDnMjOkBuh2mXU9JNaZqk5nS3w4RqElUccgw-9xKJGc9QOY3N5HrEKp9ttbmbA_-4PDRnuYip7Krnr8_nZev441s9ZQmeP5xLo3E0EOkX7aUJVVbY0VMN7uXcBTxcyCjBPTNmP1_ZQ51OKX5NFH0zJJtbh69TDQM5hT84N2PaZHtX6C39caR_IMWxuMdqnBj7XLQJ22mm5PvxoKbZqg-znio7RLl_XprqSbqBRWAVHcleMNuurARPXlSmmeyoPS1Hs7guRF8UVYV_7qCMiR0ioMALgsDrB6snkQi6G6BMiwt4qvex94nP6AUwbCNivoIeaMicgssRbvT3ppSb7MKRkmioya7v7UXYo471fede_GcTHg) This popular online course is available in a special DVD box set for viewing in your home or with a small group for a limited time. **You can order your copy at this secure link:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/congress-thank-you](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0536a9b419a4733b18c97821f14ee37&_e=wwFGtYZCdZCAIe5NvzDnMjOkBuh2mXU9JNaZqk5nS3w4RqElUccgw-9xKJGc9QOY3N5HrEKp9ttbmbA_-4PDRnuYip7Krnr8_nZev441s9ZQmeP5xLo3E0EOkX7aUJVVbY0VMN7uXcBTxcyCjBPTNmP1_ZQ51OKX5NFH0zJJtbh69TDQM5hT84N2PaZHtX6C39caR_IMWxuMdqnBj7XLQJ22mm5PvxoKbZqg-znio7Qruo0IfT25MZXQkELve1sm3kzjW3muOqS3MZOsqn2SCIOvlqpq_HlccgQLb_TW7bypUHJZRoq5VXyutZ4DRQq_GsOVIpNEHUkkIJM89rYFAd53MxrVz8XF9HlkwQKiordeptnRR3p5rysRDCZvjNu6) The 11-lecture course explores the Founders' understanding of the legislative power and how Congress should work, the Progressive rejection of that understanding, and how it has affected American politics. On a personal note, this was one of my favorite courses to film. I really enjoyed it, and I know you will too. You can get your DVD box set of **" Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn't"** right away with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more. Your gift will support our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts that **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans nationwide. As you may know, these online courses, including **" Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn't"** and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, are only possible because of the **generous support **from donors like you. Your gift really matters because Hillsdale doesn't take a dime--NOT EVEN ONE PENNY!--from the government. Even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. So, will you help us **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans with free online courses and other educational programs by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today? Your gift will really help so that we can maintain our independence and our critical educational outreach. Here is a secure link for you to get your DVD set of **" Congress: How it Worked and Why it Doesn't"**:
[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/congress-thank-you](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0536a9b419a4733b18c97821f14ee37&_e=wwFGtYZCdZCAIe5NvzDnMjOkBuh2mXU9JNaZqk5nS3w4RqElUccgw-9xKJGc9QOY3N5HrEKp9ttbmbA_-4PDRnuYip7Krnr8_nZev441s9ZQmeP5xLo3E0EOkX7aUJVVbY0VMN7uXcBTxcyCjBPTNmP1_ZQ51OKX5NFH0zJJtbh69TDQM5hT84N2PaZHtX6C39caR_IMWxuMdqnBj7XLQJ22mm5PvxoKbZqg-znio7Qea_kcLsKmM7GzicDKQ5j0Io5y8XWGY6th9YvxBWF3GYKcbTP4M7StORsZ4kKwwb2Px3Gsy70I0aJ7c83TQlWETgMGDGibe6MAgXAvktNvJygOoKLYa8vdpLU4u5j7HKkvBq49l3Ztw9ZU4Vrcwr7o) In this critical time for America, know that we are deeply grateful for your friendship and support. On behalf of Hillsdale College, I hope you enjoy the course! Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College |

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 [**unsubscribe**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=b0536a9b419a4733b18c97821f14ee37&_t=M_AqNO5lB32-YF6YFZMaUjVmNrMeilIIe0QJfDu4fChJaB6fIbrEBhNVdXcm6-ehjQ7XH0S4xngF2PboS7ms5stdJHSFZzP-h-t5I0hcQqCcaxyuduhlO32ASI5UHT0X0TacED8UneckAS1Cvl_uHoE8pYPl-bVC4LoJ4rPS2zc%3D)

name: American Defense News
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ide

| | | This sponsored message fromAmerican Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk6i129kbpejo5n4thfos8m1a2mn4ormg05kqj8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm1pj4c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9lqrcndcq98sm8gb4ki7dkdb9pn15fkfamp9950_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm1pj4c9h2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj478h46aeb73ctp21rea7sps2hh34jo89osctc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm1pj4c9h2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

subject: The big lie.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
It’s a disgrace.
It’s a disgrace.

| [ ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcob1l6s265h8p4b0q181u3mbl661tua081jhjq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm1pj4c9h2bs)

---
Patriot,

No one in their right mind believes that Katie Hobbs won the election — even 69% of DEMOCRATS in Maricopa County believe Americans have been deprived of the right to vote in this election.

**So much fraud has already been uncovered, but it will take more time to reveal the true scale of the corruption that influenced our election.** **[We just need to hold the line.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb8jd74rkrj831cl83eitlt063ctg5o9fl1gg51o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm1pj4c9h2bs)**

**The Fake News Media is painting me as a villain because the establishment has directed them to crush our movement. They want to make asking questions a crime.**

**[It doesn’t matter who’s against us.

As long as I’m still breathing, I will not stop uncovering the truth.

](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z22hefd7q0n1ibf183uuja0eu0uldto69fnkt7eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm1pj4c9h2bs)** | [**JOIN THE FIGHT!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhkuf82jo766k9a822p7ifmfaemmo3ak45hb6v5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm1pj4c9h2bs)
---

Every day more light is shed on the simple fact that **the Arizona election was RIGGED.** Americans are waking up to this undeniable truth.

Unfortunately — the fact is we’ve got a tight timetable.

**At MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, we’re going to be dangerously close to running out of funds. If we lose our cash flow, we lose the ability to fight — that’s the sad reality.**

**_[That’s why I’m reaching out to you — I need a $25 gift as soon as you can spare it.

CAN YOU HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7qico8hcvuso8uup63suhklc09ucrf614k5mllg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm1pj4c9h2bs)_**

subject: The Liberal's Minds Exploded!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Leon Benjamin, inc
body:
We are making waves and even the Democrats are taking notice. | | | |
---
| | | [Contribute](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=71ced24d85&e=3cd8121505 "Contribute")
---
|
#### We are making big waves in the 4th district
# We Can't Wait to Tell You All About it!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
| The campaign trail is heating up! Big things are coming our way, and we wanted to share the good news with you. We can't do this without Patriots like you on our side!
---
|
---
|
### Guns, the Woke Mob, and Freedom
This week was filled with excitement from beginning to end. We celebrated Dr. Martin Luther King and his contributions to Black Americans on Monday.

In a time when our country seems more divided than ever, I remind you to look at the teachings of the great Reverand and ask yourself if this is what he envisioned.

A country divided and torn based on race?

A country so wounded that we have forgotten to care for our neighbors?

This isn't Dr. King's vision at all.

On Monday, I marched Virginia's Capital in Richmond with other great patriots for Lobby Day. Our Second Amendment rights have never been questionable. We refuse to let the Democrats infringe.

On the subject of division...

On Sunday, I walked into the lion's den when I decided to go on MSNBC and interview Jonathan Capehart. I spoke truth to power, and the Woke Mob didn't like that very much.

The mob came after me on social media, but luckily I had supporters like you to support me.

Lastly, I had an opportunity to go on War Room and talk to Steve Bannon about the future of America and the 4th District. We had a great discussion fueled by our love for this country.

---
|
### This week...
We published our newest commercial, all about uniting the 4th District. Will you join us on this wild ride?

---
| [ ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=5185965146&e=3cd8121505)
---
|
### Things are Heating Up
I need your help. We are door-knocking every Saturday and need volunteers to phone bank and work election day. If you are interested in getting more involved in the campaign, please reach out to Angie at info@benjamin4congress.com .

We can't do this without you!

---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Exposing the Great Reset
body:
Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6r5plk6vr8gi1g08akdc8bupt7f2kh3sljrgin0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmep76c9h2bs)
---
Frined, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zglhnqemh8ahkhddbfbn8v3pme2fn9vbe9phrfmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmep76c9h2bs)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just one dollar!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z56vrmb16nso9rktom60fifkn0g1q6jrvc4onq4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmep76c9h2bs)

---
Frined, I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7hep8qr2f63erf9mekbi90bbvpbj1ucie1bimco_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmep76c9h2bs)

[Get your book now](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6vfg5ubncud4dpq68f0hu8bt1r6jl9i0ereq9ho_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmep76c9h2bs)
---
If you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. [**And I want to send you a copy of _The American Response to the Great Reset_ RIGHT AWAY. Please claim your book right now with a gift to Turning Point USA of ANY AMOUNT, even just one dollar.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpt8tdk2j3ab0v2ov9uc7mibmqhbo6860ihhoskg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhmep76c9h2bs) Thank you for helping Turning Point USA expose and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. For America,

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20McIntosh=2C=20Club=20for=20Growth=20Action?=
subject: This is the guy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Club for Growth Action and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I have someone I want to introduce you to... | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=dc114c5862&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Hey friend, I have someone I want to introduce you to: **Congressman Jim Banks.**
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=95ca84ba9d&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Jim’s a devoted husband, a proud father of three, a current U.S. Naval Reserve Supply Corps Officer, and **he recently announced his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Indiana.**
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN $25 or MORE**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9247d35c13&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | In 2014, he took a leave of absence from the Indiana State Senate in 2014-2015 to deploy to Afghanistan during Operations Enduring Freedom and Freedom’s Sentinel. He received the Defense Meritorious Service Medal for his military leadership in Afghanistan.
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b0e9460390&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN NOW**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=1f81f7cb3b&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | **But his fight didn’t stop there.** In 2016, he was elected to Congress, where he worked alongside President Trump to roll back some of the most egregious and burdensome Obama-era rules and regulations. Jim knows what it takes to balance a budget and believes Washington ought to do the same, and**that is why he was tapped to serve as Chairman of the Republican Study Committee’s Budget and Spending Task Force to get our nation’s fiscal house in order.**
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7d2fa11a78&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | **Jim is a proven fiscal conservative leader who will fight for a pro-growth agenda, and that’s exactly why Club for Growth Action is backing his fight for the U.S. Senate.** [**_Friend, will you send Jim Banks to the U.S. Senate to restore fiscal sanity to our government?_**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=593b4330d4&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | [**BACK BANKS FOR U.S SENATE >> CHIP IN NOW**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ace6b91708&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | Thank you, David McIntosh Club for Growth Action
---
| | Club for Growth Action is an independent expenditure committee established by the Club for Growth. We want you to become a member of the Club for Growth, the leading free-enterprise advocacy group in the nation. Please join the Club for Growth by contacting the Club for Growth at [www.clubforgrowth.org](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=75b8b2b639&e=fdefed58de) or by making a contribution to Club for Growth Action or to any other federal candidate on a Club for Growth Action hosted Win Red page. clean_body: I have someone I want to introduce you to... | | | | | | | | | Hey friend, I have someone I want to introduce you to: Congressman Jim Banks. | | | | Jim’s a devoted husband, a proud father of three, a current U.S. Naval Reserve Supply Corps Officer, and he recently announced his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Indiana. | | | | In 2014, he took a leave of absence from the Indiana State Senate in 2014-2015 to deploy to Afghanistan during Operations Enduring Freedom and Freedom’s Sentinel. He received the Defense Meritorious Service Medal for his military leadership in Afghanistan. | | | | | | But his fight didn’t stop there. In 2016, he was elected to Congress, where he worked alongside President Trump to roll back some of the most egregious and burdensome Obama-era rules and regulations. Jim knows what it takes to balance a budget and believes Washington ought to do the same, andthat is why he was tapped to serve as Chairman of the Republican Study Committee’s Budget and Spending Task Force to get our nation’s fiscal house in order. | | | | Jim is a proven fiscal conservative leader who will fight for a pro-growth agenda, and that’s exactly why Club for Growth Action is backing his fight for the U.S. Senate. | | | | Thank you, David McIntosh Club for Growth Action | | Club for Growth Action is an independent expenditure committee established by the Club for Growth. We want you to become a member of the Club for Growth, the leading free-enterprise advocacy group in the nation. Please join the Club for Growth by contacting the Club for Growth at or by making a contribution to Club for Growth Action or to any other federal candidate on a Club for Growth Action hosted Win Red page. By doing so you affirmatively accept membership in the Club for Growth or affirm a prior membership. name: Josh Stein
subject: Let me explain:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230118-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230118-email]Team,
We are coming up on the two year mark since President Biden’s inauguration. Since then, the President and House Democrats have delivered on their campaign promises. From the American Rescue Plan to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill, Democrats said they were going to make progress for American families, and they have.
Now that I am in Congress, and Democrats have lost the House Majority, we are going to have to keep up the hard work for the next two years to continue moving the needle forward. Your support is a critical part of this plan. Can you chip in to support my campaign and help me do my part to push Democratic priorities forward? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2301-q1-wn?refcode=230118-email]

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win!
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh3nr0qs2u99t2ot059aiat1tdrlp04e4dlpt4r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cjh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win!_ **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr9sohc21uuprgulquca6pq0oog0l7hegkl7iir0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cjh2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi56h5k35fmkonffgebgiheuoaqk4oh4830bqmb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cjh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ru8cu0dggk7ulv969hbuvc5nk0o6l1kib5ji9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cjh2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgjd1vn791dj0t3ehdv7slv77ineoqtpfg2id2p8_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cjh2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z18gq3shdv0fo6j4ogl7a2f4c66goqgs2bflddf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cjh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3sufkckh1676jg92s3e1t4ja7boo4809binphco_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cjh2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlpel5q42klmmd30sb29ubg7mnafitvb2qtb56pg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cjh2bs)
---

---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: The old saying about Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/HtOSnRu3vJpOJienhmmoZh5y2tho39w0vNL1HrI9cqg=/PHc5FaPs9vSN37uyWfzVMh9BvSvoOq-9x-bWQQag5BQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230119-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

In advance of the 2019 state elections in Virginia, I spoke to some colleagues on Capitol Hill and said, "well, as they say. . . 'as goes Virginia, so goes the nation'!"

To which a colleague quickly replied, "Abigail, nobody says that!" I countered that anyone who doesn't should because, after all, _**Virginia holds elections every year that set the tone for what 's to come nationwide:**_
* In 2017, we won 15 House of Delegates seats back -> 2018 was an incredible year for us in the House of Representatives.

* In 2019, we held our House of Delegates and won the Senate -> we saw a great year at federal level in 2020.

* In 2021, we faced losses here in Virginia -> we saw a similar story with our 2022 elections.

So now, as we head into 2023, **all eyes are on Virginia.** This year, every seat in our Virginia General Assembly is up for re-election. Virginia Democrats will make clear that our policies are good for people, communities, and our economy, and that our legislators - state and federal - work hard for the neighbors we represent.

**To support candidates running across our Commonwealth, I have launched a leadership PAC.** This PAC will support candidates across the state and across the nation to help build strength for critical elections. Supporting candidates who can build momentum for Democrats is vital work, and I hope you will join us!

[_**Would you consider supporting these efforts today by splitting a contribution between my campaign and SPAN PAC?**_ _**Your contributions will directly support VA Democrats who will shape the future of our Commonwealth.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/HtOSnRu3vJpOJienhmmoZh5y2tho39w0vNL1HrI9cqg=/N6RoY6P5KMnSKt8m2BrbC9HosnmLZQHF4HL8-jZlQSM=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230119-1-EM&amount=25)

Thank you for your consideration,

Abigail
---

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/HtOSnRu3vJpOJienhmmoZh5y2tho39w0vNL1HrI9cqg=/PHc5FaPs9vSN37uyWfzVMh9BvSvoOq-9x-bWQQag5BQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230119-1-EM&amount=25)

---

body:

| |

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgr3o6a8hpl64mdglvi361ush8fs4bcn44imbjtg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf8jmemj72sjkm1qj78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrqcsbieio7adt2ekoj9cjl6oonfphmevajbd1km6qu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr69hmevb72sjkm1qj9c9lshh64p74s1hicdjnqpqj7c9km4qu0p34cjh60oj6ccj3ctunmcpjct9heng669hmevajcs3lsio7fdjhe8gq48bi4bh28or7c5i66p72cpjm49fg)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb0en1ies565ln24rm0blq45uohh6v789lg9opio_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cth2bs)
[ White House: Republicans Are "Playing Politics" Over Biden's Classified Docs ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z04655rdcr185jfh8rbedirv13tok7rotu4rvq0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cth2bs)
---

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Open border extremism
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zodpkna3dim1tuh05hi9ab0iupmbs1bmh261qrg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cdh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z319pk6orlvm12bdg0ur9404qq12jcjdrikr58cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cdh2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbae48teo20qnk5dtbsfihur2hsbdn7sa5ipqf1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cdh2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjn42tv4r699k0gdjf6s02t8mjj1buvoaeqcuduo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cdh2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5kud70dq4u7tqt46cjalvv7htq7r801tl8rh7oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chhm9oj6cdh2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: 2023 is a make-or-break year
body:
For years, the Radical Left has pushed self-serving policies that put America and Americans last. Through it all, they have show

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3o8rvv42kakhi533dul36roto9sgojucehou2qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chjm0pj6c5h2bs)
---

Dear Fellow Conservative,

For years, the Radical Left has pushed self-serving policies that put America and Americans last. Through it all, they have shown a willingness to subvert our nation's rule of law to force their own liberal worldview on others.

That's why it's no surprise that our nation is dealing with so many crises on so many fronts.

**But right now, conservatives hold a majority in the House, and that means 2023 is a make-or-break year.**

At a time when many Americans are desperate for bold leadership and fresh ideas, Heritage is America's outpost in our nation's capital--representing the forgotten men and women and ensuring policymakers deliver on the promises made to voters.

As we promote policy solutions based around the issues of education, border security, election integrity, inflation, and more, **can we count on you to support these efforts by activating your Heritage Foundation membership?**

**If so, please use this secure link to join today:[https://secured.heritage.org/activate-now/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhhm6otqdojdqlb1n3f2t9om03mtmnlb95bbn45g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chjm0pj6c5h2bs)**

Thank you so much for your support.

Best,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Conservative policy victories are riding on your support. We can 't do this work without you. # [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16160%2E3422442%2EJoaq5i)
Derek,
Katie is all about transparency, so we want to give you a rundown of exactly how your founding donation to our Senate campaign will be spent—and why we’re asking for your support in the first place.
One of the biggest expenses of any major political campaign is TV advertising. TV ads show voters who Katie is, what she stands for, and why she’s the best person to fight for working people in the U.S. Senate.
It’s not cheap to create these ads—the process comes with design, filming, production, and editing costs. **But the real price tag of our TV ads is getting them on the air.**
In order to reach voters in every part of California, we’ll need to purchase airtime in every single media market—regions defined by TV broadcasters—in the state. And California has 16 media markets, including two of the nation’s largest:
**Top U.S. Media Markets**
New York (#1)
---
**Los Angeles (#2)**
Chicago (#3)
Philadelphia (#4)
Dallas-Fort Worth (#5)
**San Francisco-Oakland-San Jose (#6)**
Atlanta (#7)
Houston (#8)
Washington, D.C. (Hagerstown) (#9)
Boston (Manchester) (#10)
In other words, since California has more voters than anywhere else in America, the amount we have to spend on TV ads is _significantly_ higher than the national average. Our TV budget will undoubtedly be in the millions.
So Derek, now you know exactly why we’re asking for your support. Sending Katie to the Senate will require serious resources, and $0.00 of that will come from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Banks, Big Pharma, or Big Oil.
**[Will you make a founding donation to our campaign to help Katie reach persuadable voters all across California? We’ll need to dig deep to afford to air TV ads in this competitive race.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15646?refcode=EMAF19_1_CMM_20230110_V1_F&t=2&akid=16160%2E3422442%2EJoaq5i)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Donate $15 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15647?refcode=EMAF19_1_CMM_20230110_V1_F-el&t=3&akid=16160%2E3422442%2EJoaq5i) [Donate $22 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15648?refcode=EMAF19_1_CMM_20230110_V1_F-el&t=4&akid=16160%2E3422442%2EJoaq5i) [Donate $50 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15649?refcode=EMAF19_1_CMM_20230110_V1_F-el&t=5&akid=16160%2E3422442%2EJoaq5i) [Donate $100 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15650?refcode=EMAF19_1_CMM_20230110_V1_F-el&t=6&akid=16160%2E3422442%2EJoaq5i) [Donate $250 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15651?refcode=EMAF19_1_CMM_20230110_V1_F-el&t=7&akid=16160%2E3422442%2EJoaq5i) [Other amount ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15646?refcode=EMAF19_1_CMM_20230110_V1_F&t=8&akid=16160%2E3422442%2EJoaq5i)

subject: BREAKING: January 6 kangaroo court seals records for 30 to 50 years!
body:
Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our famili
Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS! | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z07ougiino9l4vdpv50mut303kjdol6v3f9l7vkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chjm8o34cdh2bs)

---

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zedr7487d3j89950970d07ov37ae55fc0sc3bkpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chjm8o34cdh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.

**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0h3o5bj77s0t5s0mk3jmufcde7qpodcvsn5tkpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chjm8o34cdh2bs) **The lawless January 6 Congressional Committee is trying to conceal its crimes against the Constitution and the American people.** Yahoo News reports:

“House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-San Francisco) already named the House Committee on House Administration the custodian of the records. Under current House rules, the committee is obligated to hand over the official records to the House clerk, who transmits them to the National Archives. _The rules also prevent the National Archives from releasing committee records for at least 30 years. Sensitive records, such as those from a major investigation, can be held up to 50 years before being made public.”_

**Yes, you read that right – the J6 Kangaroo Court is trying to cover up crucial information that affects you and me, our families, and our fellow Americans, for 30 to 50 YEARS!

** They want to bury:

• Videos from police body cameras,

• Videos from on-site security cameras,

• Videos from countless smart phones,

• Emails and texts from federal agencies and law enforcement,

• And so much more.

Why?

**Because they know that the patriots who protested that day outside the U.S. Capitol building were peaceful.

** They know that the U.S. Capitol Police were warned that Black Lives Matter terrorists would disguise themselves as Trump supporters and cause trouble.

They know that undercover police and federal agents were in the crowd and may have even provoked attacks on police and the Capitol building.

**They know their narrative that patriots took part in a bloody insurrection to overthrow the government is a lie.

** So, they’re trying to bury that evidence until everyone they’ve falsely accused, ruined, browbeat...and everyone who pushed the lying Biden narrative...has died from old age.

**This is an outrageous attack on our Constitution, our rights, and our freedoms – especially in light of the two years of abuse, torture, and injustice January 6 peaceful protesters have endured.

** That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

** I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

** I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!

** And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.

**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5nf6gojcuit31l6u79qlg75fplq9mb7nkh16a30_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chjm8o34cdh2bs) Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.

**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg8lnitm9kr1hmvm05c0p94dfmvvn8reu0p1m6e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chjm8o34cdh2bs) Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, it’s been two years since the fake insurrection on January 6...and the real reign of terror launched by Biden and his lawless FBI and DOJ on Trump supporters and peaceful protesters.**

[**Please help me fight for them in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhrgnpvi6rs96j3h5jscfdvod8cmql56a537kn5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chjm8o34cdh2bs)

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: ICE Arrests Double in 2022; Thousands with Multiple Convictions, Terrorists, Gang Members
body:
Arrests of illegal immigrants inside the United States nearly doubled
last year over 2021 and tens of thousands had serious criminal
histories that include multiple charges and convictions, according to
a recently published Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) report.

[alt_text]

[*****]
January 19, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61840&L=28681&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWNlLWFycmVzdHMtZG91YmxlLWluLTIwMjIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]

Arrests of illegal immigrants inside the United States nearly
doubled last year over 2021 and tens of thousands had serious criminal
histories that include multiple charges and convictions, according to
a recently published Immigration and Customs Enforcement
(ICE) report. The 80-page document, which contains fiscal year 2022
figures, helps illustrate the devastating impact of the Biden
administration’s reckless open border policies which have allowed
record-breaking numbers of migrants into the country with minimal or
no vetting. This has made ICE’s task overwhelming as the Homeland
Security agency responsible for enforcing immigration laws to preserve

clean_body: Arrests of illegal immigrants inside the United States nearly doubled last year over 2021 and tens of thousands had serious criminal histories that include multiple charges and convictions, according to a recently published Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) report. [alt_text] [*****] January 19, 2023 [article-image] [] Arrests of illegal immigrants inside the United States nearly doubled last year over 2021 and tens of thousands had serious criminal histories that include multiple charges and convictions, according to a recently published Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) report. The 80-page document, which contains fiscal year 2022 figures, helps illustrate the devastating impact of the Biden administration’s reckless open border policies which have allowed record-breaking numbers of migrants into the country with minimal or no vetting. This has made ICE’s task overwhelming as the Homeland Security agency responsible for enforcing immigration laws to preserve national security and public safety. body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=ebde803b513841a08059f985b581104d&_e=9xyCeCIRgSWznUvcnTft8CurOdJ72X0cD41FX1jioEsYyV96Bcs-6-BrjdzUUDZYEHXUkkHpwO86awnerd1GHuf4pejFhWy8Pio_VHo8ueng9rRi-YHKVAMcgKDHjTTxmnsIbgbNzn6PczFgRYG2LHnTfyQW4jOkwG5Qn4nGLVUurgAnaNaPuRglGJLVtGTVtRG_1LYol-GP9jBMA7KkTlE3kpEZNnxcEM9Pv51Qy6ADGuqpYHlZt4ofBjWSnHHsA9Lml2s3AoQYym_Fzm1kMQ%3D%3D)
---
The truth will set us free, my friend. Are our elected officials and leaders being honest with us? Are they working to earn your trust? Too often now, Washington politicians let power and ego shade the truth. They hide behind the cover of lies, toxic politics, and bitter division. **But here's the thing... the American people won't be fooled.**
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=ebde803b513841a08059f985b581104d&_e=9xyCeCIRgSWznUvcnTft8CurOdJ72X0cD41FX1jioEsYyV96Bcs-6-BrjdzUUDZYEHXUkkHpwO86awnerd1GHuf4pejFhWy8Pio_VHo8ueng9rRi-YHKVAMcgKDHjTTxJcNmO3Q9fV-4RCm9dZRXzrvHmmuUpO-bVsp2KrWwylLUPlsTvZ0H0JtwdwMXPgavQp-b0MpG8QO48117LeYRhX6KlibKpowHfkUEig5ZB78PsFiZl4GK6oerP76DkJtSMgx6VQWrZqk_cNPgh28KHQ%3D%3D)
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=ebde803b513841a08059f985b581104d&_e=9xyCeCIRgSWznUvcnTft8CurOdJ72X0cD41FX1jioEsYyV96Bcs-6-BrjdzUUDZYEHXUkkHpwO86awnerd1GHuf4pejFhWy8Pio_VHo8ueng9rRi-YHKVAMcgKDHjTTxLPFNCIB-McWMWUQaxHFna29m_0FZgoKrN_HUAPm46vn0Aak2xSFck7eBVNHsxzyBQbzibi2CaUJXbavh_RP8R8hDYiAvABH-uakGdnc_oDc7lcb5GNFNqB6OMScqLge6AOOzVh8Ozi1j6tycOgWqYA%3D%3D)
---
Our shared common sense & conservative message will never have a chance if we allow dishonest leaders to use our values simply as a pedestal for their own selfish gain. _**We must demand honest leadership.**_ Whether it's about major policy or the tiniest detail of our public resume... I believe honesty should be a core tenet of leadership. **[$10 goes a long way in helping An America United continue to push for honesty and integrity in our leadership, and help us focus on the issues that matter.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=ebde803b513841a08059f985b581104d&_e=9xyCeCIRgSWznUvcnTft8CurOdJ72X0cD41FX1jioEsYyV96Bcs-6-BrjdzUUDZYEHXUkkHpwO86awnerd1GHuf4pejFhWy8Pio_VHo8ueng9rRi-YHKVAMcgKDHjTTxeMOV9WcPaGPoLRbH1kVrBpscDx0kOK8DUA08RA13mJjxvXVWiKoq6jfyZeL5XMZ5mUAAMIbXZYNhIW02E2XhEWSIudZAarM1sT9aQyX4RerWPE_6uIUd03CMgRlaKijA0ST8JLa1_BM4SWIuyEuElg%3D%3D)** Can I count on you to join this important & unifying movement today?
---
| | Thank you, **_Governor_ _ Larry Hogan_**

subject: re: MAGA takeover in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
if Democrats lose this Senate seat, we lose EVERYTHING.
| **__BREAKING:__**
**MAGA Republican Enters Highly Competitive Ohio Senate Race**

[**We already lost one Ohio Senate seat to a MAGA extremist, so we cannot afford to lose the other! HURRY: Rush $7 by MIDNIGHT to protect Democrats like Sherrod Brown and SAVE our fragile Senate majority »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38667?t=6&akid=6077%2E878179%2EwWnNKe) | [$10,000 GOAL: CHIP IN $7 NOW TO SAVE THE SENATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38667?t=7&akid=6077%2E878179%2EwWnNKe)
---

**Here are three things you need to know about the Ohio Senate race:**

name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: We’re done compromising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
For too long, politicians in Washington have taken the easy way out.
| | | Fellow Conservative,
---
For too long, politicians in Washington have taken the easy way out.

They’ve compromised with the radical Left and watered-down their conservative agenda to the point that it starts to look like a Democrat wishlist.

**_We say ENOUGH._ **

There’s a new generation of conservatives in Washington, and we’re ready to stand up for the ideas we campaigned on to get here - but we can’t do it alone.

**[Pitch in NOW and say NO to bowing down to the Left.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z69ov2be48k07tsk336bmg4gprr8oipatm1q3l1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chjm4o74cdh2bs)**

We’re sick and tired of letting the Left lay out the terms of America’s agenda, Fellow Conservative.

It’s time to stop being followers and start being LEADERS!

That means we never compromise on our values.

**We’re ready to get to work for YOU - are you ready to stand by our side? **

**[Join us now and stand by our VALUES!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4p5lh5c9014vl68tmjgc86okonls1nj3rig6k6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr1chjm4o74cdh2bs)**

## Former Speaker Newt Gingrich reacts to election of new Speaker Kevin McCarthy...
Speaker Newt Gingrich has been a friend and a mentor for a long time, so it was a lot of fun to have him join me for this podcast. We talked about how he decided to run for Congress, what he would tell a first time candidate, how to message to voters, the “Contract with America” and so much more. Really enjoyed this conversation, don’t miss it:
| [Listen here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=03bdfd5249&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
And as I mentioned in the podcast, I’m out of the country on military leave, but I have a great conversation that will be released on Monday with a colleague and reporter who’s work i’ve respected for a long time. Get notified as soon as it drops:
| [Subscribe here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ed0fef031c&e=f6564bbe3b)

clean_body: SOON: Fed-surrection Exposed. --> | | | | == | Peter, | You and the Patriot 20 who held the line with me during the Speaker vote have helped deliver a CRUCIAL commitment from Kevin McCarthy... A pledge to release EVERY SECOND of the video security footage from January 6th that will EXONERATE OUR PATRIOTS! == == For too long under this Regime, Joe Biden and his henchmen have been trying to scare the entire country into thinking that MAGA was some kind of threat... They locked Trump supporters in solitary confinement over this. They wanted to take out our Movement FOR GOOD. And in the old GOP days, Peter, weak RINOs would have just rolled over and accepted the Left's narrative... Not anymore. You and the MAGA Movement stood with me and made sure our party fought on OFFENSE, demanding that the truth from the JAN 6 FED-SURRECTION BE REVEALED! | | == | Take a look: | == | Things are looking up for our patriots and our movement, Peter. But we're not out of the woods yet - the Democrats and Never Trump RINOs aren't going to let their Jan 6 "insurrection" lies be exposed without a fight! Because they know if this House of Cards falls down, the entire country will see them for the liars and propagandists that they are... The truth about the Russia Hoax has already been exposed. The double standard about their "Classified Documents" attack on Trump has already been revealed (my constituents care about inflation - not this BS!). So if their January 6th narrative falls apart, too?! These fraudsters will have NOTHING left! name: Joseph Geevarghese, Executive Director
subject: the high-five seen around the world
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, did you see
Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin high-fiving in front of billionaire donors
at Davos over stopping voting rights and abortion rights legislation by
blocking filibuster reform?

Their disgusting display of disdain for working people is notable for how
public it was and signals that Kyrsten Sinema thinks she can openly boast
about hurting America and get away with it by attracting billionaires to
fund her campaign.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8240?t=1011&akid=3892%2E5885482%2EXVvZnC ]Sinema’s conduct is grossly corrupt, and Our Revolution is scaling up
our Defeat Sinema fund to defeat her in the coming year by organizing now
to expand our grassroots organizing to elect a real Democrat. Can we count
on you to pitch in?

When we organize, we win.

Joseph Geevarghese
Executive Director, Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Begin forwarded message:

Peter Willis,

Yesterday, in one of the most disgusting
scenes in recent memory, Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin high-fived each
other on stage at Davos (a yearly gathering of billionaires), grossly
celebrating their work to stop filibuster reform.

Watching them high-five over stopping critical legislation for voting and
abortion rights was nothing short of sickening.

Instead of trying to rehabilitate her image with actual voters, Sinema
jetted off to Davos to secure support from billionaires for her
re-election campaign, and we can't let her get away with it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8240?t=1012&akid=3892%2E5885482%2EXVvZnC ]We're fighting back by expanding our Stop Sinema Fund, but with her
sucking up to billionaire donors, we need to act fast. Rush a donation
here to help us support a real Democrat and defeat Sinema in 2024!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8173?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230119_2_3&t=1013&akid=3892%2E5885482%2EXVvZnC ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8174?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230119_2_3&t=1014&akid=3892%2E5885482%2EXVvZnC ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8175?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230119_2_3&t=1015&akid=3892%2E5885482%2EXVvZnC ]CHIP IN $27 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8176?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230119_2_3&t=1016&akid=3892%2E5885482%2EXVvZnC ]CHIP IN $100 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8177?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230119_2_3&t=1017&akid=3892%2E5885482%2EXVvZnC ]CHIP IN $250 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8172?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230119_2_3&t=1018&akid=3892%2E5885482%2EXVvZnC ]CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »

Recent polling shows Sinema’s presence in the race could help Kari Lake
win a Senate seat, and the last thing we need in the Senate is another far
right extremist and election denier.

Besides the 2024 race, our work challenging Sinema will directly impact
legislation this year, with Republicans openly pushing to slash Social
Security and Medicare.

Those same billionaire donors applauding Sinema at Davos have been trying
to cut Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare for decades. We need to
make it crystal clear to Sinema that she’ll face severe consequences if
she betrays voters for personal gain.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8240?t=1019&akid=3892%2E5885482%2EXVvZnC ]Chip in here to help us counter Sinema's big money support. We're going
up against literal billionaires, so any contribution is a big help!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution
