## **FIRST MAJOR CAMPAIGN DEADLINE:****_TOMORROW, JANUARY 20th_**
[**Contribute a RUSH DONATION of any amount by Clicking Here!**](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=iVR9wgfYMQve0iI&b=k2uo1zDeNCoYWbl0U1m48Q)
* * *

Fellow Conservative,

I know you hear from TPN every day, and as CEO I am proud of our loyal patriots. What you may not know is I'm also running in a Special Election.

The Florida House District 24 Special Election presents us with a very special opportunity. __**Here’s what I mean.**__

In Florida, we have a unique opportunity to do more than mere lip service to conservatism; we have the chance to make long-lasting change in the areas that matter most - such as pro-life progress, protecting the Second Amendment, upholding parental rights, banning child castration and mutilation, and cleansing our schools of woke education.

[**For Florida!**](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=iVR9wgfYMQve0iI&b=k2uo1zDeNCoYWbl0U1m48Q)

**Does all that sound too good to be true?** Here’s the thing - it’s not. Because as I said, we have a unique opportunity in Florida. We have a majority house and a governor who time and time again has gone to bat for us.

Friend, I am running because now is not the time to elect RINOs.**_TOMORROW is our first major fundraising deadline, and I urgently need your help to come out strong!_**

[_**_→RUSH Contribute $500_**_](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=iVR9wgfYMQve0iI&b=k2uo1zDeNCoYWbl0U1m48Q)
[ _**_→RUSH Contribute $2500_**_](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=iVR9wgfYMQve0iI&b=k2uo1zDeNCoYWbl0U1m48Q)
[ _**_→RUSH Contribute $100_**_](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=iVR9wgfYMQve0iI&b=k2uo1zDeNCoYWbl0U1m48Q)
[ _**_→RUSH Contribute $50_**_](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=iVR9wgfYMQve0iI&b=k2uo1zDeNCoYWbl0U1m48Q)
[ _**_→RUSH Contribute any other amount now!_**_](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=iVR9wgfYMQve0iI&b=k2uo1zDeNCoYWbl0U1m48Q)

**If elected, I will work tirelessly alongside Governor DeSantis to make Florida the greatest state in the union.** I will not be bullied, I will not be bought, and I will not back down.

We have a unique opportunity, and I hope you will join me in jumping on it.

[**SEND CHAMBERLIN**](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=iVR9wgfYMQve0iI&b=k2uo1zDeNCoYWbl0U1m48Q)

Sincerely,

Ryan Chamberlin
Candidate for Florida State House of Representatives
[](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=iVR9wgfYMQve0iI&b=2rmYxjPG5UCpHvcEkWfmWg)

**P.S. As this major deadline is now upon us, we would be grateful for rush donations of any amount. You can find a contribution link here: **[**www.RyanChamberlinCampaign.com**](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=iVR9wgfYMQve0iI&b=ftD5V7eRJvWTjeUB5Zn8Cw)** **

12305 SE 55th Avenue Rd
Belleview FL 34420
USA

| | As the White House continues to defend and downplay the Biden Classified Documents, Americans have the right to be outraged on this issue. It’s no shocker that Biden claims he was “surprised” to learn that his classified documents were found in more than one location. As the scandal heightens, the DOJ has declined to assign any FBI supervision during the doc search, but House Republicans are investigating the matter. As a sitting president, Biden once again is receiving soft treatment, accusing Republicans of attacking Biden and “playing politics”. Here at American Greatness, we’re fighting to restore Constitutional Government – to provide oversight and stop government overreach. It’s time Biden takes accountability. **Support a movement that restores a greater future for America!**

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20H.=20McCormick?=
subject: How do we save America?
body:
My new book, Superpower in Peril, offers a battle plan for renewing our country. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/11e666ec3c71/how-do-we-save-the-american-dream-2?e=381d477081)
---
| | |
---
| | | **America is in a fight for global primacy.**
With a stalled economy, an open border, China threatening our very way of life, and failed leadership in Washington, the sad fact is we’re falling behind. But there’s nothing inevitable about American decline. What matters is what we do next, and that’s what my new book **Superpower in Peril** is about.
---
| |
---
In it, you’ll find the management and leadership lessons I learned during my time at West Point, as an Army paratrooper, as a CEO and business leader, and at the highest levels of government, and you’ll see a battle plan for how we can win this global contest and ensure America remains the greatest and strongest country in the world by:
* revitalizing the American Dream,
* revolutionizing our economy,
* confronting China,
* reviving the soul of America.

---
| My book comes out March 14th. I hope you'll pre-order your copy today and joine me in the fight to save America.
**PRE-ORDER NOW AT:**
---

clean_body: My new book, Superpower in Peril, offers a battle plan for renewing our country. | | | | | | | | | | America is in a fight for global primacy. With a stalled economy, an open border, China threatening our very way of life, and failed leadership in Washington, the sad fact is we’re falling behind. But there’s nothing inevitable about American decline. What matters is what we do next, and that’s what my new book Superpower in Peril is about. | | In it, you’ll find the management and leadership lessons I learned during my time at West Point, as an Army paratrooper, as a CEO and business leader, and at the highest levels of government, and you’ll see a battle plan for how we can win this global contest and ensure America remains the greatest and strongest country in the world by: revitalizing the American Dream, revolutionizing our economy, confronting China, reviving the soul of America. | My book comes out March 14th. I hope you'll pre-order your copy today and joine me in the fight to save America. PRE-ORDER NOW AT: | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 An Imprint of Hachette Book Group, All rights reserved.

The GOP's agenda is clear: They want to undo all of the progress we've made under Biden, and that means **a national abortion ban, further restrictions on voting rights and cuts to Social Security and Medicare.** **We won't stand for it, friend.**

Live at 1 pm

| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_hurts_episode_8_live&n=1)

## Radical Abortion Bill Vote Going Down Now
## We're LIVE at 3:30 PM!
Friend, The Democrat's RADICAL Abortion-in-All-Cases Bill is on the House floor. Debate begins at 3:30 pm with a vote expected soon. If passed, the bill heads to the Minnesota Senate where Democrats control the chamber by one senator, thanks to former Republican [Tony Jurgens](https://www.action4liberty.com/jurgens_endorsed_democrat_seeberger_in_pivotal_race?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_hurts_episode_8_live&n=2). This radical legislation has no exceptions in it. Abortion for any reason, at any stage will be fully legal. It's going to lead to the deaths of tens of thousands of pre-born babies. **We'll be doing a live stream with commentary as the debate goes down on the Minnesota House floor. | | **FIRST:** Grassroots donors helped state Democrats bring home historic victories during the 2022 midterms – flipping chambers in Minnesota, Michigan, and Pennsylvania. **THEN:** State Democrats won the first competitive special election of 2023, flipping a seat in Virginia’s Senate by just 348 votes! **NOW: We are facing even more important special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire – where special elections could determine chamber control over the course of 2023.** This is a rare and urgent opportunity to fight for control of these chambers in an odd-numbered year – so we’re doing everything we can to fight for every last seat. THEN: State Democrats won the first competitive special election of 2023, flipping a seat in Virginia’s Senate by just 348 votes! NOW: We are facing even more important special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire – where special elections could determine chamber control over the course of 2023. This is a rare and urgent opportunity to fight for control of these chambers in an odd-numbered year – so we’re doing everything we can to fight for every last seat. **[Please take my New Majority Survey to ensure that your priorities are addressed in our new House majority.](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=91c9b1ab42cf4c839ebb02153449e45b&_e=bxDQcvCgizZe-DtpGpOxk7QMJH5IFiXvftbtbhM6JnbQgdBc5HolQL6osLOFsicxJXSQv0pF7-NAbUVq7ZyaeotJ-tTLTqjsuaMjUIrn2fs2dnXnwnTgyay4poogJbtCWeKZ_YOEoCqlxywIZVkdiY2xxsTg2bQnF3ZR1BbA-k9nqltl9_thmH_45MuIi4As_Bth8km4nzgHEzVnViyIB2qlaD2Xh9r2tkm7H59dDUAxcIPKEWlwJuY4iX30scHOmHy6bRg2ihe7x3zNV4ev5yaNdWSyip9KqMEBmGhdgUN6Bg4fRgundMCK4GhVdzDZXlj_gfz9zSLvwIEVX2Xte5ZP3C_e0nhsBrKriB6cHaqRrLBWar55WzfeY_PYqZ6XuOSCS2ShUNHc_i19H9D99fBS5UeayRyXc18s9-qsXqLDqO3vxijFZHdxIDBOOH5vCyewn0zv3ZReWT650zb1ILlsjjp5baN6-nBkYuyWOIQ%3D)**

---

While I was back home for Christmas, my fellow Wisconsinites shared their grave concerns about the future of our country.
---
Folks are worried about rising costs, a looming recession, our wide-open southern border, the spread of Fentanyl into our communities, and surging crime.
---
**_That’s why I voted “no” on the $1.6 trillion omnibus spending bill that will drive up inflation and do nothing to address the actual needs of our citizens._**

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This was my view when I was stationed in Iraq:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
A message about burn pits — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.

| Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**split a donation of any amount between my campaign and Mark Takano.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57526181/388261500/720253296?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=MTFC_20230119_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhlMDg4OC00MDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qMcKJTTbhWmyQpvUIhKltLeV-c-_YOjtud5yXujyazg=) **But first, I wanted to take a moment to talk to you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57526182/388261501/720253296?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=MTFC_20230119_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhlMDg4OC00MDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qMcKJTTbhWmyQpvUIhKltLeV-c-_YOjtud5yXujyazg=) It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.

It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.

Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.

For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.

**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**

When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.

Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.

So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger?

I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.

Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.

These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**

I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.

**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.** [**If you’re with me, please split a donation of $10 or anything at all between my grassroots campaign and Mark Takano today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57526183/388261502/720253296?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=MTFC_20230119_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhlMDg4OC00MDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qMcKJTTbhWmyQpvUIhKltLeV-c-_YOjtud5yXujyazg=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lucas Kunce and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57526184/388261503/720253296?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20230119_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhlMDg4OC00MDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qMcKJTTbhWmyQpvUIhKltLeV-c-_YOjtud5yXujyazg=)

[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57526186/388261505/720253296?amount=50&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20230119_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhlMDg4OC00MDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qMcKJTTbhWmyQpvUIhKltLeV-c-_YOjtud5yXujyazg=)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57526187/388261506/720253296?amount=100&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20230119_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhlMDg4OC00MDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qMcKJTTbhWmyQpvUIhKltLeV-c-_YOjtud5yXujyazg=)
[Or a custom donation »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57526188/388261507/720253296?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=MTFC_20230119_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhlMDg4OC00MDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qMcKJTTbhWmyQpvUIhKltLeV-c-_YOjtud5yXujyazg=)
I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter.

Thanks for hearing me out,

— Lucas Kunce

When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there. Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer. So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger? I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits. Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war. These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it. I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate. We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Lucas Kunce and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | = = = = = I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter. Thanks for hearing me out, — Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. subject: I’m humbled to announce my campaign for Governor of North Carolina

body:
and I hope you’ll join me on the road ahead.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57526871/388264306/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjdmYTdiOC00NDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lT33qh3JC0eI7cTe8Ci2s4PDUTa6d58TSvAtHbvBiY=&emci=d5fe4c96-7197-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=ef7fa7b8-4498-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Hi there, Peter.

I’m Josh Stein, and I just announced my campaign for Governor of North Carolina.

Our country is at a crossroads – and here in North Carolina, our future will be decided by the slimmest of margins in the next election. The stakes could not be higher.

Will women have access to the health care they need, when they need it? Or will extremist politicians make those decisions for them?

Will every eligible voter have an equal right to vote? Or will Republicans roll back voting rights and continue to gerrymander legislative districts to discriminate against certain voters? Will people have the power in our democracy – or politicians?

Will we prioritize educating our kids and supporting our educators? Or will Republicans continue to undermine public education and pass tax giveaways to big corporations and their out-of-state shareholders?

Will we ensure everyone can get access to quality health care? Or will Republicans in North Carolina’s legislature continue to refuse to expand Medicaid?

Will our government work for all of us – or just the privileged and powerful? [**_I’m humbled to announce my campaign for Governor to build a better and brighter North Carolina. I’d be deeply grateful if you joined me. Please, split a contribution between the Democratic Party of Georgia and my campaign today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57526872/388264307/1536759036?refcode=20230119.2_JS_1Y&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjdmYTdiOC00NDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lT33qh3JC0eI7cTe8Ci2s4PDUTa6d58TSvAtHbvBiY=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The Democratic Party of Georgia asked me to reach out to you directly because they know the path forward won’t be easy.

North Carolina and Georgia are two of the most politically competitive states in the country – and national Republicans will flood our states with millions of dollars in an attempt to stop us. They know that the outcome in North Carolina can have a major impact on who wins the next presidential election.

Peter, I am up for the challenge. I’ve run statewide in North Carolina when Donald Trump prevailed twice – and won both times. I’ve taken on big pharma as Attorney General – and won. I’ve gone up against corporate polluters – and won. And I’ve taken e-cigarette manufacturer Juul to court for sparking a teen vaping epidemic – and won.

[**_Today, I’m asking you personally to join us in this fight and help us win. Please, split a contribution between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57526880/388264315/1536759036?refcode=20230119.2_JS_1Y&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjdmYTdiOC00NDk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lT33qh3JC0eI7cTe8Ci2s4PDUTa6d58TSvAtHbvBiY=)

Let’s get it done,

Josh Stein
North Carolina Attorney General and Democratic candidate for Governor

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=968d4eee6f914dc68b6a5db07de9f1e1&_e=4GCD18iFSaNARALJToJmm_BVv_0NLhBAV8Trga8MutVqDyovjoxt9rOb6idW5GAPM-l4WeWhp9D3XvHJr95mejaBDiRqKn9SGm8pZLVcH3U7S4lO1PZjMKpjqOS6fPjlEsY_mqgy96wmBAJig99QOLqgRvhTcM8pwUTKsFRAOfS9L2N9-chkb0jxLWk4opMZg6sClmgucBGB5_f7U9F888amnokEwgGiGfOQf8nDT9P2kdZFTcCzqyQ86Jf7k5p9iCRFSmJpzAFZKr2tJtrCJEueiKbuA3MzWWWENx-wR_w%3D)

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=968d4eee6f914dc68b6a5db07de9f1e1&_e=4GCD18iFSaNARALJToJmm_BVv_0NLhBAV8Trga8MutVqDyovjoxt9rOb6idW5GAPM-l4WeWhp9D3XvHJr95mejaBDiRqKn9SGm8pZLVcH3U7S4lO1PZjMKpjqOS6fPjlEsY_mqgy96wmBAJig99QOBL7fKsRlpbYozP3zwFgcoMm-hcsoUTYPXzd8MjVWyuJVYXXegxKHyBNLlMtmWvjSQFYqXxIGRPBIHTCpH02eMHnec31ODCF4WxzZaHrC1bZWeH7PxhfwkVOPORFLKiZbodjGN1LV79BG7CuyDIHIW8%3D)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=968d4eee6f914dc68b6a5db07de9f1e1&_e=4GCD18iFSaNARALJToJmm_BVv_0NLhBAV8Trga8MutVqDyovjoxt9rOb6idW5GAPM-l4WeWhp9D3XvHJr95mejaBDiRqKn9SGm8pZLVcH3U7S4lO1PZjMKpjqOS6fPjlEsY_mqgy96wmBAJig99QOOw9zp00OQHAhDEuxX-ib92WUWXaU1U_q0Qk0aLXoLttE_rvM1toAss6Nx7FXcUjQ1AbkLfje8Sdrd_2jvh-M3up-kAnRX6cl3o7KkMAdFqtpC1yCelpIAaJmFA28PQ6OkXapqgv15hOyEDukfi6ppQ%3D)
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=968d4eee6f914dc68b6a5db07de9f1e1&_e=4GCD18iFSaNARALJToJmm_BVv_0NLhBAV8Trga8MutVqDyovjoxt9rOb6idW5GAPM-l4WeWhp9D3XvHJr95mejaBDiRqKn9SGm8pZLVcH3U7S4lO1PZjMKpjqOS6fPjlEsY_mqgy96wmBAJig99QOOl02ot2yk19woZn4JAr3IUKuHCULx2I0hC5vNKnF__TfQZ3O6KAJAX_1FcBn1EYvKHvt3UAklnEXFpXi-ZbVBfTmr_18znzduCWHaMyUecnf0INLb3KXpJsNxxG9h8Uftn1JaTFvR5z22pQrujBIWs%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? clean_body: | | | Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. I was proud to share my new book, The College Scam, with President Donald Trump. I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the BIGGEST and most IMPACTFUL pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states. And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives. I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,The College Scam. Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with The College Scam to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read The College Scam, you'll learn: my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Katie Porter
subject: Our first Katie Porter for Senate campaign event
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
A look inside our very first campaign event in Walnut Creek.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16155%2E3422442%2EtbL-mc)
_I’m running to represent California in the United States Senate._
I got to say those words out loud, in public, for the very first time on Tuesday night at our very first campaign event hosted by the Democrats of Rossmoor Club in Walnut Creek.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15759?refcode=EMAF19_2_ROO_20230119_V1_F&t=2&akid=16155%2E3422442%2EtbL-mc)
It was so great to listen and learn from hundreds of East Bay voters. Here are a few of the questions people asked:
_What will happen to your congressional seat?_

Democrats will win it. I first flipped the seat in 2018, but with your help we have done the work in Orange County to change the political environment. Democrats now outnumber Republicans, and I’m confident we’ll hold this seat. At the same time, I will be in every part of California, **making sure we win seats that House Republicans narrowly won in November.** California can deliver the House majority for Democrats in 2024, and I’m committed to making that happen.
---

_Why do you think you’re the best candidate for the job?_

I am in this race because I think it's time for a change. I think it is time for a fresh new voice that understands the future that California wants to build, and knows how to help us get there. **We need someone who will truly stand up to special interests and connect with the many people who are disillusioned by politics.**
---

_Why don’t Democrats better explain the causes of inflation?_

I can’t speak for every Democrat, but here’s my answer: We are the party that will deliver a strong economy that works for working people. As Democrats, we should be talking about the economy every day. We are the party willing to hold global corporations to account for their greed and their harm.

I did a whiteboard on this—I cited a study that shows **54% of the recent price increases we've seen in the last couple years came from an increase in corporate profits.** There are a lot of investments we can make (and have made) to lower inflation. We passed the CHIPS Act to invest in American manufacturing and smooth out our supply chain. We still need to do serious work to lower the costs of major expenses like child care. **But until we tell big corporations “you can’t cheat” we will never get a real, long-term handle on inflation.** We have to be willing to stand up to these corporations, and that’s exactly what I’m willing to do.
---
I’m so excited to be in this race, and grateful to have you on our team. Stay tuned for more updates.
Katie Porter

---

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF19_2_ROO_20230119_V1_F&t=9&refcode2=16155_3422442_tbL-mc&akid=16155%2E3422442%2EtbL-mc)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=10&akid=16155%2E3422442%2EtbL-mc)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=16155%2E3422442%2EtbL-mc)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616

subject: Your input is essential for the year ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57527533/388266646/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230119SURV_N_JW_FULL_4_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGI5YzQzMy00ODk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FxHDzEj0xVztUMIwjjxAIoUtzjLdhvX68WX8LI-T3kM=)

Friend, thank you so much for your steadfast support last election cycle — and throughout the early chaotic days of this new Congress.

The Republican dysfunction and extremism that have been on display recently are only going to increase. We need to be countering them with a powerful message, and I want to make sure I'm prioritizing the issues that matter to _the people_.

There will be major legislative battles ahead on everything from government funding to the future of Social Security and Medicare. I promise to fight for our values at every turn, and I'll be able to do it best if I hear from supporters like you.

[**So please, will you take our short survey and tell us what issues you want me to prioritize in the face of the new Republican House majority? Your input is essential as we prepare for the year ahead.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57527534/388266647/776812473?ms=EM_PET_230119SURV_N_JW_FULL_4_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230119SURV_N_JW_FULL_4_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGI5YzQzMy00ODk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FxHDzEj0xVztUMIwjjxAIoUtzjLdhvX68WX8LI-T3kM=&emci=75c7e09a-3c98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=50b9c433-4898-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Voice ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57527535/388266648/776812473?ms=EM_PET_230119SURV_N_JW_FULL_4_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230119SURV_N_JW_FULL_4_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGI5YzQzMy00ODk4LWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FxHDzEj0xVztUMIwjjxAIoUtzjLdhvX68WX8LI-T3kM=&emci=75c7e09a-3c98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=50b9c433-4898-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) I'm looking forward to reading your responses!

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Kevin McCarthy just put Marjorie Taylor Greene, Rep. “Jewish space lasers,” on The Homeland Security Committee. Greene is a Qanon adherent integrally involved with Donald Trump's planning of January 6th, and now she'll have access to classified information about domestic terrorists with whom she sees eye to eye.
body:
Now there’s a QAnon supporter on the Homeland Security Committee
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb7d9b00d-848e-4957-b8e0-497abfc176d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _Kevin McCarthy has paid back the lackeys who handed him the Speakers’ gavel, at the expense of our national security and basic governmental integrity._ _You may recall that Marjorie Taylor Greene vocally supported him for Speaker, whipped votes among her fellow crazies for him and even fought with former allies who didn't vote for him. __Her reward? __**Kevin McCarthy just put Greene on The Homeland Security Committee.** _ **Let me say that again: _Kevin McCarthy just put a Qanon adherent integrally involved with Donald Trump's planning of January 6h, one who claimed Jewish lasers placed in space by George Soros started California wildfires, on the committee where she'll have access to classified information about domestic terrorists with whom she sees eye to eye._ ** [_Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries needs our support to continue this fight against McCarthy as he proves he couldn't give a damn about the United States by placing Greene, Santos and others in positions to to us grave harm. _**_Will you join us in giving Democratic Leader, Hakeem Jeffries, $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford for what may be the defining battle of our democracy over the next two years?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb9ebb86-e45c-4d58-b2fd-140964c56c0c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _McCarthy also put George Santos (if that's his real name) on the Small Business Committee, where he'll have an oversight role of one of the largest government programs in history: The Paycheck Protection Act (PPP). _**_Santos is currently being investigated for multiple crimes by two countries, including bilking victims' bank accounts and stealing and pawning items of theirs for financial gain. Again, this is a fox in the henhouse._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82cd719f-b044-4cfa-a7b6-c1ce36d00d1f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _**Democratic Leader Rep. Hakeem Jeffries already has proven himself exactly what we need right now, first by holding the entire Democratic Caucus together all 15 times Mccarthy begged for votes, and since constantly messaging via print, cable, networks, social media, etc., what Democrats are doing and how corrupt and barren is the GOP.**_ [**_Will you join us in giving Democratic Leader, Hakeem Jeffries, $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford for what may be the defining battle of our democracy over the next two years?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T760cdd52-4cc6-40cb-8fe2-fd513dd07be4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for always standing up to McCarthy and his dangerous troupe of right-wing stooges. Cliff

|
---

---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/hakeemjeffriesmccarthystooges2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1a4ed2c-46c7-4958-ad5b-bb1478b2c2a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4466c713a54c492f907a423ea003d7a3&_e=J9dmS7puGfxhACTkXEOxFX5dIGMzJabCVhBHcGrzixBhRVBjaus5ugnRO1N3yKXl9HvykFmTj4odDSlbwU7b2PYyt8YA9IQZf99QNDHMbulQfoDzycBM_4vveZSH-U0wpfeL2ohNdNYQCylXcQO4XD3VGZoC8IsTbq4_rh4L_Gre9Dv5080_xvSMNPjakbFaZ-Qio5d0uYz8Lh-gVbE9ueTMdXNAw5aC6GC17j1f2LfCFdVUc9rdkm-9LkR-bmq0D2nCk-df4pP5Yr4tv9NbTkvSMIMIimY8-nol0wrmX6Y%3D) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! body:
We don’t see you on our list, can you take a look | | |
---
| | Here are three reasons why we need you to activate your 2023 membership:
1. **We rely on our grassroots team to provide ongoing support for state Democrats nationwide. Your donations to emails like this one power this organization** – small gifts of $10 and $25 add up to make a huge impact.
2. **Your support is more impactful in the slower, earlier months of the year.** While most people tune into politics in the months immediately before Election Day, your support early in the election cycle goes further, allowing us to strategize months in advance, expand our map of target states, and devote the resources to special elections our candidates need to win – and in some cases, positioning Democrats to even flip chambers in the off year.
3. **By becoming a member, you’re helping continue groundbreaking strategy that helped us win big in 2022.** We’re continuing to build the best-in-class analytics, organizing, and mobilization programs that led us to victory ahead of Virginia elections in 2023, and up-and-down ballot elections in 2024.

[ Our members are at the core of our successes – can we count on you to make a contribution of $10 or more today and become an official 2023 DLCC member? We can’t rest on our laurels – our work never stops, and the GOP is working day and night to avenge their big losses this November. While we’re investing in our next big races, they’re doing the same.
But if we don’t have enough support, we won’t be able to do any of this – that’s why it’s so important for you to take the next step and activate your 2023 membership today.
Remember: When Democrats win, they protect our democracy, abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, our climate, and so much more. When Republicans win, they do the exact opposite.
[So can you help Democrats do the right thing and become an official 2023 DLCC member? clean_body: We don’t see you on our list, can you take a look | | | | | Here are three reasons why we need you to activate your 2023 membership: 1. We rely on our grassroots team to provide ongoing support for state Democrats nationwide. Your donations to emails like this one power this organization – small gifts of $10 and $25 add up to make a huge impact. 2. Your support is more impactful in the slower, earlier months of the year. While most people tune into politics in the months immediately before Election Day, your support early in the election cycle goes further, allowing us to strategize months in advance, expand our map of target states, and devote the resources to special elections our candidates need to win – and in some cases, positioning Democrats to even flip chambers in the off year. 3. By becoming a member, you’re helping continue groundbreaking strategy that helped us win big in 2022. We’re continuing to build the best-in-class analytics, organizing, and mobilization programs that led us to victory ahead of Virginia elections in 2023, and up-and-down ballot elections in 2024. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We can’t rest on our laurels – our work never stops, and the GOP is working day and night to avenge their big losses this November. While we’re investing in our next big races, they’re doing the same. But if we don’t have enough support, we won’t be able to do any of this – that’s why it’s so important for you to take the next step and activate your 2023 membership today. Remember: When Democrats win, they protect our democracy, abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, our climate, and so much more. When Republicans win, they do the exact opposite. Thank you, DLCC Membership Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Team Jayapal
subject: The power of our people-first campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Will you chip in today to help maintain our momentum in 2023 and beyond?
#
Peter,
With your support, our people-powered campaign was able to accomplish _**a lot_** in 2022. Now we're looking to the future to continue and build upon the momentum of last year in 2023 and beyond.
As a people-powered movement, Pramila would not be able to continue our fight for the bold and progressive future we deserve without this grassroots community. Everything we do is powered by donations from folks like you, chipping in whatever they can afford — our average gift is just $27.77!
There is one simple thing you can do to keep our movement strong as we start 2023: [**Will you chip in $3 or any amount today so Pramila can continue to fight every day for our progressive movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25843?refcode=em20230119-2072&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2072%2E420207%2EFwNy_2)
**[Chip in »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25843?refcode=em20230119-2072&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2072%2E420207%2EFwNy_2)**
We're grateful to each and every one of our grassroots supporters who have pitched in. We know that **_every single contribution counts**_ and makes all the difference for us. With Republicans now in control of the House, now is not the time to throw in the towel. As Chair of the Progressive Caucus, Pramila will continue to lead our progressive coalition in Congress to double down in our fight to pass transformative policies by any means necessary.
The strength of our movement comes from supporters like you. With your support, we can continue to ensure that our movement will remain powerful regardless of the Republican's majority. We're going to make sure they know we're not going anywhere.
[**If you're able to today, will you make a $3 contribution to support Pramila right now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25843?refcode=em20230119-2072&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2072%2E420207%2EFwNy_2)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25843?refcode=em20230119-2072&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2072%2E420207%2EFwNy_2)**
Thank you for your continued support!
In solidarity,
-- Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230119-2072-footer&t=23&refcode2=2072_420207_FwNy_2&akid=2072%2E420207%2EFwNy_2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2072%2E420207%2EFwNy_2)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2072%2E420207%2EFwNy_2)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Does the Twitter discourse bum me out?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Some people confuse bad faith criticism with real life impact.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230119-3813-header&t=1&akid=3813%2E2526796%2E5VSsmC)
Here’s another question I got on Instagram the other day: “Does the Twitter discourse concerning you ever bum you out?”
I think sometimes it does.
**But it’s not criticism that’s concerning — it's bad faith**. And that really reveals itself in patterns over longer periods of time.
I think there’s a lot of people who sit in a lot of anger, frustration, and despair, and channel it into destructive energy – which I think is understandable. But I think there are people who confuse commenting online with actual, real-life organizing, impact, and work.
I also think that – and this is a hot take – some people want to be sold out. Because **cynicism is a lot easier than hope in a difficult world where you are challenging power against all odds**. It’s just easier to give up.
We refuse to give up. Not now, not ever.
[If you’re able to support our work for a better world, could you donate $16 – our average donation – or whatever you can afford today to keep our movement strong?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230119.94PC7f&refcode=em20230119-3813-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3813%2E2526796%2E5VSsmC)
**Your donation sustains our work in the face of a constant stream of disinformation from bad faith actors, both Republican and Democrat, who are trying to keep things working for only a wealthy few. Make your $16 donation today:**
**[Contribute →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230119.94PC7f&refcode=em20230119-3813-P_FND_EXP_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3813%2E2526796%2E5VSsmC)**
Take heart,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230119?refcode=em20230119-3813-P_FND_EXP_MIS&t=22&refcode2=3813_2526796_5VSsmC&akid=3813%2E2526796%2E5VSsmC)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230119-3813-P_FND_EXP_MIS&t=23&akid=3813%2E2526796%2E5VSsmC)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=3813%2E2526796%2E5VSsmC) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=3813%2E2526796%2E5VSsmC) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=3813%2E2526796%2E5VSsmC)
---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: new voter suppression law in Ohio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
Ohio’s governor Mike DeWine recently signed a new voter suppression bill into law -- one of the worst in the country -- making it harder for Ohioans to cast ballots by:
*
Imposing
stricter
photo
ID
requirements
*
Shortening
the
windows
for
requesting
and
returning
mail-in
ballots
*
Eliminating
a
day
of
early
voting
*
Limiting
the
number
of
ballot
drop
boxes
*
Disenfranchising
military
voters

JOIN OUR FIGHT AGAINST VOTER SUPPRESSION [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe220719?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe220719_m_express_lane_5]

These new voting restrictions will disproportionately affect young, elderly, and Black voters and military servicemen and women in our state.
We should be making it easier -- not harder -- for people to vote.
That’s what I did as Ohio’s secretary of state. I worked to increase voter registration by setting up registration sites at high schools, food banks, and BMVs. I even convinced McDonald’s to print registration forms on tray liners so people could register while eating a Big Mac.
In the Senate, I’m still fighting to protect and expand voting rights. I support a measure that would secure federal voting protections to prevent voter suppression in Ohio and across our country.
But here’s the problem: Some lawmakers would rather protect their own political power than do the right thing for the Ohioans they're supposed to serve.
We need to speak out every time we witness these kinds of attacks on voting rights. Will you add your name and join the voices condemning voter suppression in Ohio and across the country? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yKmzgyCS7UaC0Txs6nhwdA2]
The new Ohio law is the first of its kind to be passed since the 2022 elections, and if previous years are an indication, we can expect even more voter suppression this year.
As Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. once said: “Human progress never rolls in on the wheels of inevitability.” Progress rolls in because we make it happen. It requires people like you and me to stand up, speak out, and get involved.
That’s what our movement does best, and I’m hoping I can count on your engagement today. Add your name and join me in condemning voter suppression in Ohio and across the country. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/yKmzgyCS7UaC0Txs6nhwdA2]
With gratitude,
Sherrod
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.
Friends of Sherrod Brown
3867 West Market Street
Ste. 289
Akron, OH 44333
United States

name: Josh Stein
subject: Let me explain:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I am asking for a minute of your time.

| Fight for Progress is dedicated to building a more progressive America and has raised over $200,000 for Democratic candidates. If you would like to donate to a deserving Democrat, you can do so _[here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57528996/388272016/838935893?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZDkyZGIxLTRmOTgtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OVufiiZdnSadiyxlGS-I5DGPMsQbwCHosLAePVgbieU=&emci=94f5e4a7-3b98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=d5d92db1-4f98-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=22408598#candidate-inner)_ And of course, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/z4lkEUrOvESaGxr1QVEGJw2?unsubscribedata=i0bEz690Ql9gifSzbF2Z5eEQJpSS6xodBS%2B6JjDJh%2BrqCOYt9wS3fnaEp6Apep8N0spJRHgo72ibwpRblcKtckncJG9HdO1i7N%2FTwngJEi1LqEVp9M0CrKnexfTOkLgtHa26D47g1P7%2FbL7l8jsvFyWZsp8yNVDys2RzeYYkygbFl5isNXtHot5LonLigzadnH4rfaPyNO9rxQrsY%2F9TXX13VvXWvmhx%2FbJ9Ap4e85WFC9YQmyae08dOa83sEvvb%2FobFXmm%2F8DwyL0yqIb6FYkXc4GK%2FUmGmRu%2Fi67w1keGdY37p%2B%2FxvquaFUZcj9KftDs8SZPdOOI8oH9ysvGiPKcIF1kY0hf7I3Di33Qb7vopfDqCZXH9b%2BJKbD3sHPI57ZpEcJ6y5YHHBEf1HwnVj%2BVoPt9b%2BuNBSFv84io1w1SE%3D) at any time.
---
| [_**I am about to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign for Governor of North Carolina and Fight for Progress. First, let me explain.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57528997/388272017/1547864268?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230119-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZDkyZGIxLTRmOTgtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OVufiiZdnSadiyxlGS-I5DGPMsQbwCHosLAePVgbieU=)

I learned early on that some things are worth fighting for – no matter the opposition.

Julius Chambers, James Ferguson, and my dad Adam Stein founded the first integrated law firm in North Carolina and led the legal battle against discrimination and for equality.

In 1971, their law office was firebombed and burned to the ground. But that didn’t stop them from fighting for what was right.

Today, we have a different set of bomb-throwers, who threaten our freedoms and our future.

And extremist politicians divide us to cling to power – they gerrymander legislative districts, promote the Big Lie about the 2020 election, and foment insurrectionists...

undermine and underfund public education, block Medicaid expansion, and turn a blind eye to corporate polluters...

attack fundamental reproductive freedoms, vilify entire groups of people as “filth,” and pass extreme, hateful laws, like HB2, North Carolina’s infamous bathroom bill.

**I’m running for Governor because I believe in a very different North Carolina – one rooted in our shared values of freedom, justice, and opportunity for everyone.**

For the last six years, as Attorney General of North Carolina, I’ve taken on big fights and won. I’ve worked hard to keep families safe, hold corporate wrongdoers accountable for the damage they’ve done, make polluters pay to clean up the messes they make, and defend reproductive and voting rights.

North Carolina is a great state! And if we invest in our people and their futures, we can be even greater.

Everybody deserves a fair shot – because if you work hard, where you come from should not limit how far you can go. Everyone should be able to get good health care, no matter where you live or how much money you earn. Every kid deserves a great education. And every family should be safe at home, at school or at work.

This is our moment.

Together, we can build a better and brighter North Carolina.

_**[But it’s up to us. Join us.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57528998/388272018/1547864268?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230119-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZDkyZGIxLTRmOTgtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OVufiiZdnSadiyxlGS-I5DGPMsQbwCHosLAePVgbieU=)

[And please contribute any amount you can. Thank you.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57528999/388272019/1547864268?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230119-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZDkyZGIxLTRmOTgtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OVufiiZdnSadiyxlGS-I5DGPMsQbwCHosLAePVgbieU=)**_

| [SPLIT A DONATION → ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57529000/388272020/1547864268?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230119-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZDkyZGIxLTRmOTgtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OVufiiZdnSadiyxlGS-I5DGPMsQbwCHosLAePVgbieU=)
---
Let’s get it done,

Josh Stein
Attorney General of North Carolina and Democratic candidate for Governor

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: #TBT
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We have a little ‘throwback Thursday’ to share with you today:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230119-27136&t=1001&akid=27136%2E1203867%2EQBq0n0 ]@AOC: "Time to say BYE BYE 👋🏽 to the Democratic establishment. Today is
why Justice Democrats ( @justicedems ) exist. We don’t have time for weak,
corporate Ds who don’t take their constituents’ lives as seriously as
their own. Ocasio2018 is primarying a bad Democrat too. Take note."
Since Justice Democrats began in 2017 after Bernie Sanders’ presidential
campaign, we’ve been working to take on the Democratic establishment by
electing progressive, working-class candidates who don’t serve the status
quo but will actually fight for the people they represent.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230119-27136&t=1002&akid=27136%2E1203867%2EQBq0n0 ]Will you join AOC in supporting Justice Democrats by making a
$3 contribution to make sure we’re able to recruit the next
generation of JD candidates in 2024?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230119-27136&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=27136%2E1203867%2EQBq0n0 ]Contribute $3

With your support, we’ve had a few incredible victories over the last few
years. We recruited AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, and Summer Lee to run
for Congress — and worked with their campaigns all the way from day one
through victory.

But, we’re up against a lot of obstacles. AIPAC spent millions against our
candidates last cycle and we know they and other corporate PACs will spend
massive sums of money against us again. In addition to that, our own
fundraising has continued to decline. So it’s really important that we
increase our pace before the month ends.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230119-27136&t=1022&akid=27136%2E1203867%2EQBq0n0 ]Peter,
please make a $3
contribution right now to help us continue to fight against the Democratic
establishment.

Thank you,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=27136%2E1203867%2EQBq0n0 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=27136%2E1203867%2EQBq0n0 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230119-27136-footer&t=1025&refcode2=27136_1203867_QBq0n0&akid=27136%2E1203867%2EQBq0n0

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=27136%2E1203867%2EQBq0n0

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: They’re planning massive cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children |
body:
Despite the strides made for school choice, our opponents are trying to... | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=cf65aa7ca7&e=fdefed58de)
---
Friend, this is urgent! If you haven’t heard the news, Michigan is planning to make **MASSIVE CUTS** to the state's charter schools. This disproportionately affects low-income families who may have no other options for sending their children to a quality school. **Despite the strides made for school choice, our opponents are trying to undo the hard work of parents and groups like ours.** We need your help to continue leading and winning the fight for school choice. [**Chip in a critical first donation of 2023 to help start our fight strong this year >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=486bab43ce&e=fdefed58de)

clean_body: Despite the strides made for school choice, our opponents are trying to... | | | | | | | Friend, this is urgent! If you haven’t heard the news, Michigan is planning to make MASSIVE CUTS to the state's charter schools. This disproportionately affects low-income families who may have no other options for sending their children to a quality school. Despite the strides made for school choice, our opponents are trying to undo the hard work of parents and groups like ours. We need your help to continue leading and winning the fight for school choice. | | Thank you, Elizabeth BeShears American Federation for Children | | | | Paid for by American Federation for Children | | American Federation for Children 5950 Berkshire Lane, Suite 325 Dallas, TX 75225 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Conservatives United. body:
